          {
            "name": "F00001_stock_prim",
            "isHidden": true,
            "columns": [
              {
                "name": "stock_prim_date",
                "dataType": "dateTime",
                "sourceColumn": "stock_prim_date"
              },
              {

                "sourceColumn": "stock_kg_"
              },
              {
                "name": "sku_guid_",
                "dataType": "string",
                "sourceColumn": "sku_guid_"
              },
              {

                "dataType": "string",
                "sourceColumn": "manuf_warehouse_guid_"
              },
              {
                "name": "stock_packs_",
                "dataType": "double",
                "sourceColumn": "stock_packs_"
              }
            ],
            "partitions": [
              {

                      "      </key>",
                      "      <value>",

                      "      </value>",
                      "    </item>",
                      "    <item>",
                      "      <key>",

              }
            ],
            "measures": [
              {
                "name": "stock_current_kg",
                "expression": [
                  "",
                  "VAR last_date_with_data =",
                  "    CALCULATE(",
                  "        MAX(F00001_stock_prim[stock_prim_date]),",
                  "        ALL(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]),",
                  "        F00001_stock_prim[stock_prim_date] < TODAY()",
                  "    )",
                  "RETURN",
                  "    CALCULATE(",
                  "        SUM(F00001_stock_prim[stock_kg_]),",
                  "        FILTER(",
                  "            ALL(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]),",
                  "            D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date] = last_date_with_data",
                  "        )",
                  "    )"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "stock_kg",
                "expression": "CALCULATE (SUM ( 'F00001_stock_prim'[stock_kg_] ),LASTNONBLANK ('F00001_stock_prim'[stock_prim_date],max(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]) ))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "stock_box",
                "expression": "CALCULATE (SUM ( 'F00001_stock_prim'[stock_packs_] ),LASTNONBLANK ('F00001_stock_prim'[stock_prim_date],max(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]) ))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "stock_current_box",
                "expression": [
                  "",
                  "VAR last_date_with_data =",
                  "    CALCULATE(",
                  "        MAX(F00001_stock_prim[stock_prim_date]),",
                  "        ALL(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]),",
                  "        F00001_stock_prim[stock_prim_date] < TODAY()",
                  "    )",
                  "RETURN",
                  "    CALCULATE(",
                  "        SUM(F00001_stock_prim[stock_packs_]),",
                  "        FILTER(",
                  "            ALL(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]),",
                  "            D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date] = last_date_with_data",
                  "        )",
                  "    )"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "stock_planned current_days",
                "expression": "F00001_stock_prim[stock_current_kg]/F00003_sales_prim[fact_sale_kg]*30",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "stock_planned_kg",
                "expression": [
                  " if(max(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]) > TODAY()",
                  "\t,TOTALMTD(F00001_stock_prim[stock_kg], D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]) + F00052_plans_manufacturing_months[f00052_plan_kg] - F00002_pivot_plans_prim[plan_sale_kg]",
                  "\t, F00001_stock_prim[stock_kg]",
                  "\t)"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "stock_kg_on_date",
                "expression": [
                  "",
                  "SUM ( 'F00001_stock_prim'[stock_kg_] )"
                ],
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "stock_box_on_date",
                "expression": [
                  "",
                  "SUM ( 'F00001_stock_prim'[stock_packs_])"
                ],
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "stock_kg_first_day_of_month",
                "expression": [
                  "",
                  "CALCULATE (",
                  "    [stock_kg_on_date],",
                  "    STARTOFMONTH ( D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date] )",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "stock_box_first_day_of_month",
                "expression": [
                  "",
                  "CALCULATE (",
                  "    [stock_box_on_date],",
                  "    STARTOFMONTH ( D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date] )",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "stock_availiable",
                "expression": " F00001_stock_prim[stock_kg] - F00055_reserve_stocks[reserved_kg]",
                "formatString": "0.00"
              }
            ],

            "measures": [
              {
                "name": "fact_order_prim_kg",
                "expression": "SUM([fact_order_prim_kg_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_order_prim_qty",
                "expression": "SUM([fact_order_prim_qty_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"

              {
                "name": "fact_order_packs",

              {

                "expression": "SUM([fact_order_prim_rub_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_order_TO_kg",
                "expression": "CALCULATE(SUM(F00004_order_prim[fact_order_prim_kg_]),USERELATIONSHIP(F00004_order_prim[fact_order_prim_TO_dt],D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_order_TO_rub_vat_client_price",
                "expression": "CALCULATE(SUM([fact_order_prim_rub_]),USERELATIONSHIP(F00004_order_prim[fact_order_prim_TO_dt],D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"

                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00004_fact_order_prim_si",
                "expression": [
                  " SWITCH(SELECTEDVALUE(D00750_units[unit_id]),",
                  "                                  1, [fact_order_prim_kg],",
                  "                                  5, [fact_order_prim_rub],",
                  "                                  12, [fact_order_prim_qty]",
                  "                              )"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00004_plan_fact_order_prim_completion",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([f00004_fact_order_prim_si],[f00500_plan_oper_SI])",
                "formatString": "0.0%;-0.0%;0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },

                  {
                    "name": "TabularEditor_TableSchema",
                    "value": "{\"Name\":\"F00003_sales_prim\",\"Schema\":\"dbo\",\"Database\":\"mart\",\"IncludedColumns\":[\"doc_type_id\",\"fact_sale_packs_\",\"fact_sale_qty_\",\"fact_sale_tons_\",\"fact_sale_rub_novat_client_price_\",\"fact_sale_rub_vat_invoice_price_\",\"fact_sale_rub_novat_invoice_price_\",\"fact_sale_kg_\",\"fact_sale_cubic_meters_\",\"fact_sale_box_\",\"discount_rub_novat_\",\"discount_rub_novat_client_price_\",\"sale_date\",\"create_date\",\"pitch_date\",\"fact_sale_to_dt\",\"prim_sale_doc_sku_guid\",\"manuf_warehouse_guid\",\"sku_guid\",\"aep_status_guid\",\"chain_guid\",\"client_guid\",\"project_guid\",\"tender_appl_guid\",\"address_guid\",\"territory_id\",\"salesplace_supply_reason_guid\",\"branch_guid\",\"document_prim_guid\",\"doc_type_id\",\"fact_sale_packs_\",\"fact_sale_qty_\",\"fact_sale_tons_\",\"fact_sale_rub_novat_client_price_\",\"fact_sale_rub_vat_invoice_price_\",\"fact_sale_rub_novat_invoice_price_\",\"fact_sale_kg_\",\"fact_sale_cubic_meters_\",\"fact_sale_box_\",\"discount_rub_novat_\",\"discount_rub_novat_client_price_\",\"discount_usd_novat_client_price_\",\"sale_date\",\"create_date\",\"pitch_date\",\"fact_sale_to_dt\",\"prim_sale_doc_sku_guid\",\"manuf_warehouse_guid\",\"sku_guid\",\"aep_status_guid\",\"chain_guid\",\"client_guid\",\"project_guid\",\"tender_appl_guid\",\"address_guid\",\"territory_id\",\"salesplace_supply_reason_guid\",\"branch_guid\",\"document_prim_guid\",\"doc_type_id\",\"fact_sale_packs_\",\"fact_sale_discount_packs_\",\"fact_sale_qty_\",\"fact_sale_tons_\",\"fact_sale_rub_novat_client_price_\",\"fact_sale_rub_vat_invoice_price_\",\"fact_sale_rub_novat_invoice_price_\",\"fact_sale_kg_\",\"fact_sale_discount_kg_\",\"fact_sale_cubic_meters_\",\"fact_sale_box_\",\"discount_rub_novat_\",\"discount_rub_vat_\",\"discount_rub_novat_client_price_\",\"fact_sale_rub_vat_client_price_\",\"discount_usd_novat_client_price_\",\"fact_sale_baza_prices_rub_novat_\",\"sale_date\",\"create_date\",\"pitch_date\",\"fact_sale_to_dt\",\"prim_sale_doc_sku_guid\",\"manuf_warehouse_guid\",\"sku_guid\",\"aep_status_guid\",\"chain_guid\",\"client_guid\",\"project_guid\",\"tender_appl_guid\",\"address_guid\",\"territory_id\",\"salesplace_supply_reason_guid\",\"branch_guid\",\"document_prim_guid\",\"order_prim_guid\",\"doc_type_id\",\"fact_sale_packs_\",\"fact_sale_discount_packs_\",\"fact_sale_qty_\",\"fact_sale_tons_\",\"fact_sale_rub_novat_client_price_\",\"fact_sale_rub_vat_invoice_price_\",\"fact_sale_rub_novat_invoice_price_\",\"fact_sale_kg_\",\"fact_sale_discount_kg_\",\"fact_sale_cubic_meters_\",\"fact_sale_box_\",\"discount_rub_novat_\",\"discount_rub_vat_\",\"discount_rub_novat_client_price_\",\"fact_sale_rub_vat_client_price_\",\"discount_usd_novat_client_price_\",\"fact_sale_baza_prices_rub_novat_\",\"sale_date\",\"create_date\",\"pitch_date\",\"fact_sale_to_dt\",\"prim_sale_doc_sku_guid\",\"manuf_warehouse_guid\",\"sku_guid\",\"aep_status_guid\",\"chain_guid\",\"client_guid\",\"project_guid\",\"tender_appl_guid\",\"address_guid\",\"territory_id\",\"salesplace_supply_reason_guid\",\"branch_guid\",\"document_prim_guid\",\"doc_type_id\",\"fact_sale_packs_\",\"fact_sale_discount_packs_\",\"fact_sale_qty_\",\"fact_sale_tons_\",\"fact_sale_rub_novat_client_price_\",\"fact_sale_rub_vat_invoice_price_\",\"fact_sale_rub_novat_invoice_price_\",\"fact_sale_kg_\",\"fact_sale_discount_kg_\",\"fact_sale_cubic_meters_\",\"fact_sale_box_\",\"discount_rub_novat_\",\"discount_rub_vat_\",\"discount_rub_novat_client_price_\",\"fact_sale_rub_vat_client_price_\",\"discount_usd_novat_client_price_\",\"fact_sale_baza_prices_rub_novat_\",\"sale_date\",\"create_date\",\"pitch_date\",\"fact_sale_to_dt\",\"prim_sale_doc_sku_guid\",\"manuf_warehouse_guid\",\"sku_guid\",\"aep_status_guid\",\"chain_guid\",\"client_guid\",\"project_guid\",\"tender_appl_guid\",\"address_guid\",\"territory_id\",\"salesplace_supply_reason_guid\",\"branch_guid\",\"order_prim_guid\",\"doc_type_id\",\"fact_sale_packs_\",\"fact_return_packs_\",\"fact_sale_discount_packs_\",\"fact_sale_qty_\",\"fact_return_qty_\",\"fact_sale_tons_\",\"fact_sale_rub_novat_client_price_\",\"fact_return_rub_novat_client_price_\",\"fact_sale_rub_vat_invoice_price_\",\"fact_return_rub_vat_invoice_price_\",\"fact_sale_rub_novat_invoice_price_\",\"fact_return_rub_novat_invoice_price_\",\"fact_sale_kg_\",\"fact_return_kg_\",\"fact_sale_discount_kg_\",\"fact_sale_cubic_meters_\",\"fact_sale_box_\",\"fact_return_box_\",\"discount_rub_novat_\",\"discount_rub_vat_\",\"discount_rub_novat_client_price_\",\"fact_sale_rub_vat_client_price_\",\"fact_return_rub_vat_client_price_\",\"discount_usd_novat_client_price_\",\"fact_sale_baza_prices_rub_novat_\",\"sale_date\",\"create_date\",\"pitch_date\",\"fact_sale_to_dt\",\"prim_sale_doc_sku_guid\",\"manuf_warehouse_guid\",\"sku_guid\",\"aep_status_guid\",\"chain_guid\",\"client_guid\",\"project_guid\",\"tender_appl_guid\",\"address_guid\",\"territory_id\",\"salesplace_supply_reason_guid\",\"branch_guid\",\"order_prim_guid\",\"legal_guid\"],\"SelectAll\":true}"
                  }
                ]
              }
            ],
            "measures": [
              {
                "name": "fact_sale_kg",
                "expression": "SUM([fact_sale_kg_])+ [f00003_fact_return_kg]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_sale_cubic_meters",
                "expression": [
                  "SUM([fact_sale_cubic_meters_])+[fact_return_cubic_meters]",
                  ""
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_sale_packs",
                "expression": "SUM([fact_sale_packs_])+[fact_return_packs]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_sale_qty",
                "expression": "SUM([fact_sale_qty_])+[fact_return_packs]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_sale_tons",
                "expression": "SUM([fact_sale_kg_])/1000 + ([f00003_fact_return_kg])/1000",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_sale_rub_novat_client_price",
                "expression": "SUM([fact_sale_rub_novat_client_price_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_sale_rub_vat_invoice_price",
                "expression": "SUM([fact_sale_rub_vat_invoice_price_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_sale_rub_novat_invoice_price",
                "expression": "SUM([fact_sale_rub_novat_invoice_price_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_sale_TO_qty",
                "expression": "[fact_sale_TO_with_returns_packs] + [fact_return_packs]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_sale_TO_packs",
                "expression": "[fact_sale_TO_with_returns_packs] + [fact_return_packs]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_sale_TO_rub_novat_client_price",
                "expression": "[fact_sale_TO_with_returns_rub_novat_client_price]+[fact_return_rub_novat_client_price]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_sale_TO_rub_vat_invoice_price",
                "expression": "[fact_sale_TO_with_returns_rub_vat_invoice_price]+[fact_return_rub_vat_invoice_price]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_sale_box",
                "expression": "SUM([fact_sale_box_])+[fact_return_box]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f003_fact_sales_vs_oper_SI",
                "expression": "DIVIDE([f00003_fact_sale_SI]-[f00500_plan_oper_SI],[f00500_plan_oper_SI])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_sale_SI",
                "expression": [
                  " SWITCH(SELECTEDVALUE(D00750_units[unit_id]),",
                  "                1, [fact_sale_kg],  ",
                  "                2, [fact_sale_packs],",
                  "                3, [fact_sale_box],",
                  "                4, F00006_discount_prim[fact_promo_rub_vat_income_price],",
                  "                5, [fact_sale_rub_vat_client_price],",
                  "                6, [fact_sale_rub_novat_client_price],",
                  "                7, F00006_discount_prim[fact_promo_rub_vat_income_price],",
                  "                9, [fact_sale_tons],",
                  "                10, [fact_sale_rub_vat_client_price] / 1000,",
                  "                11, [fact_sale_rub_vat_client_price] / 1000000,",
                  "                12, [fact_sale_qty],",
                  "                13, [fact_sale_qty] / 1000,",
                  "                [fact_sale_rub_vat_client_price]",
                  "            )"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_sales_SI_LY",
                "expression": " CALCULATE([f00003_fact_sale_SI], DATEADD(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date], -1, YEAR))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_sales_SI_vs_LY",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([f00003_fact_sale_SI]-[f00003_fact_sales_SI_LY],[f00003_fact_sales_SI_LY],1)",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_ytd",
                "expression": [
                  " CALCULATE(",
                  "    [f00003_fact_sale_SI],",
                  "    FILTER(",
                  "      ALL('D00001_main_calendar'),",
                  "      'D00001_main_calendar'[year] = MAX('D00001_main_calendar'[year]) &&",
                  "      'D00001_main_calendar'[month_number] <= MAX('D00001_main_calendar'[month_number])))"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_pm_ytd",
                "expression": [
                  " CALCULATE(",
                  "    [f00003_fact_sale_SI],",
                  "    FILTER(",
                  "      ALL('D00001_main_calendar'),",
                  "      'D00001_main_calendar'[year] = IF(",
                  "        MAX('D00001_main_calendar'[month_number]) = 1,",
                  "        MAX('D00001_main_calendar'[year]) - 1,",
                  "        MAX('D00001_main_calendar'[year])) &&",
                  "      'D00001_main_calendar'[month_number] <= IF(",
                  "        MAX('D00001_main_calendar'[month_number]) = 1,",
                  "        12,",
                  "        MAX('D00001_main_calendar'[month_number]) - 1)))"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_ly_ytd",
                "expression": [
                  " CALCULATE(",
                  "    [f00003_fact_sale_SI],",
                  "    FILTER(",
                  "      ALL('D00001_main_calendar'),",
                  "      'D00001_main_calendar'[year] = MAX('D00001_main_calendar'[year]) - 1 &&",
                  "      'D00001_main_calendar'[month_number] <= MAX('D00001_main_calendar'[month_number])))"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_ly_pm_ytd",
                "expression": [
                  " CALCULATE(",
                  "    [f00003_fact_sale_SI],",
                  "    FILTER(",
                  "      ALL('D00001_main_calendar'),",
                  "      'D00001_main_calendar'[year] = IF(",
                  "        MAX('D00001_main_calendar'[month_number]) = 1,",
                  "        MAX('D00001_main_calendar'[year]) - 2,",
                  "        MAX('D00001_main_calendar'[year]) - 1) &&",
                  "      'D00001_main_calendar'[month_number] <= IF(",
                  "        MAX('D00001_main_calendar'[month_number]) = 1,",
                  "        12,",
                  "        MAX('D00001_main_calendar'[month_number]) - 1)))"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_ytd_vs_LY_%",
                "expression": "DIVIDE([f00003_fact_ytd]-[f00003_fact_ly_ytd], [f00003_fact_ly_ytd], BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_pm_ytd_vs_LY_%",
                "expression": "DIVIDE([f00003_fact_pm_ytd]-[f00003_fact_ly_pm_ytd], [f00003_fact_ly_pm_ytd], BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_current_plan_completion",
                "expression": "DIVIDE([f00003_fact_ytd], [f00500_plan_SI_fy], blank())",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_plan_fact_completion_ytd",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([f00003_fact_ytd], [f00500_plan_SI_ytd], BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_plan_fact_completion_pm_ytd",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([f00003_fact_pm_ytd], [f00500_plan_SI_pm_ytd], BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_plan_fact_completion",
                "expression": "DIVIDE([f00003_fact_sale_SI], [f00500_plan_oper_SI], BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_plan_forecast",
                "expression": " [f00003_fact_sale_SI] + [plan_forecast_general]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_plan_forecast_ytd",
                "expression": " TOTALYTD([f00003_fact_plan_forecast], 'D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_plan_forecast_ly",
                "expression": " CALCULATE([f00003_fact_plan_forecast], previousyear(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_plan_forecast_qtd",
                "expression": [
                  " [f00003_fact_qtd] + [f00500_plan_forecast_general_qtd]",
                  ""
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_qtd",
                "expression": [
                  " TOTALQTD([f00003_fact_sale_SI],  'D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date])",
                  ""
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_pm",
                "expression": [
                  " CALCULATE(",
                  "    [f00003_fact_sale_SI],",
                  "   PREVIOUSMONTH('D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date])",
                  "   )"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_ly_qtd",
                "expression": " TOTALQTD([f00003_fact_sales_SI_LY],  'D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_ly_pm",
                "expression": " CALCULATE([f00003_fact_sales_SI_LY],  PREVIOUSMONTH('D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date]))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_fy",
                "expression": [
                  " CALCULATE(",
                  "    [f00003_fact_sale_SI],",
                  "    FILTER(",
                  "      ALL('D00001_main_calendar'),",
                  "      'D00001_main_calendar'[year] IN {'D00001_main_calendar'[year]}))"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_sale_si_minus_oper_SI",
                "expression": " [f00003_fact_sale_SI]-[f00500_plan_oper_SI]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_plan_fact_completion_pm",
                "expression": " divide([f00003_fact_pm], [f00500_plan_SI_pm_ytd])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_plan_fact_plan_forecast_general_completion",
                "expression": " divide( [f00003_fact_plan_forecast], [f00500_plan_oper_SI])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_plan_fact_plan_forecast_general_completion_ytd",
                "expression": [
                  " divide([f00003_fact_plan_forecast_ytd], [f00500_plan_SI_ytd])",
                  ""
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_plan_fact_plan_forecast_general_completion_qtd",
                "expression": " divide([f00003_fact_plan_forecast_qtd], [f00500_plan_si_qtd])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_plan_fact_completion_qtd",
                "expression": " divide([f00003_fact_qtd], [f00500_plan_si_qtd])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_vs_pm",
                "expression": " divide([f00003_fact_pm] -[f00003_fact_ly_pm], [f00003_fact_ly_pm])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_plan_forecast_vs_ly",
                "expression": " divide([f00003_fact_plan_forecast] - [f00003_fact_plan_forecast_ly], [f00003_fact_plan_forecast_ly])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_vs_qtd",
                "expression": " divide([f00003_fact_sale_SI] - [f00003_fact_ly_qtd], [f00003_fact_ly_qtd])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_SI_disc_promo_completion",
                "expression": " DIVIDE(CALCULATE([f00003_fact_sale_SI], 'D00400_discount'[disc_promo_type]=\"Промо\"), CALCULATE([f00003_fact_sale_SI], REMOVEFILTERS('D00400_discount'[disc_promo_type])))",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_sale_SI_2LY",
                "expression": " CALCULATE([f00003_fact_sale_SI], DATEADD(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date], -2, YEAR))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_sale_SI_3LY",
                "expression": " CALCULATE([f00003_fact_sale_SI], DATEADD(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date], -3, YEAR))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_SI_acb",
                "expression": " DISTINCTCOUNT(F00003_sales_prim[address_guid])",
                "formatString": "#,0",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_SI_acb_LY",
                "expression": " CALCULATE([f00003_fact_SI_acb], DATEADD('D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date], -1, YEAR))",
                "formatString": "#,0",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_SI_off_take",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([f00003_fact_sale_SI], [f00003_fact_SI_acb])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_SI_off_take_LY",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([f00003_fact_sales_SI_LY], [f00003_fact_SI_acb_LY])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_SI_disc_promo_LY_completion",
                "expression": " DIVIDE(CALCULATE([f00003_fact_sales_SI_LY], 'D00400_discount'[disc_promo_type]=\"Промо\"), CALCULATE([f00003_fact_SI_disc_promo_LY], REMOVEFILTERS('D00400_discount'[disc_promo_type])))",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_SI_disc_promo_LY",
                "expression": " CALCULATE([f00003_fact_sales_SI_LY], 'D00400_discount'[disc_promo_type]=\"Промо\")",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_demand_SI_comparison",
                "expression": [
                  "",
                  "\tSWITCH(SELECTEDVALUE(D01851_comparisons[comparison_id]),",
                  "\t7, [f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI_vs_AOP_%],",
                  "\t8, [f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI_vs_fact_SI_LY_%],",
                  "\t9, [f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI_vs_RF_%],",
                  "\tBLANK()",
                  ")"
                ],
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F00003_tender_fact_count",
                "expression": " DISTINCTCOUNT(F00003_sales_prim[tender_appl_guid]) + 0",
                "formatString": "#,0",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F00003_tender_fact_count_vs_done",
                "expression": " DIVIDE(CALCULATE([F00003_tender_fact_count], D00500_tenders[tender_appl_status] = \"Выполнен\"), [F00003_tender_fact_count], 0) + 0",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F00003_tender_fact_sum",
                "expression": " CALCULATE([fact_sale_rub_novat_client_price], isblank(F00003_sales_prim[tender_appl_guid]) = FALSE) + 0",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F00003_tender_fact_sum_ly",
                "expression": " CALCULATE([F00003_tender_fact_sum], PREVIOUSYEAR(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date])) + 0",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F00003_tender_fact_sum_vs_ly",
                "expression": " [F00003_tender_fact_sum] - [F00003_tender_fact_sum_ly] + 0",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F00003_tender_fact_sum_vs_ly_%",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([F00003_tender_fact_sum_vs_ly], [F00003_tender_fact_sum_ly], 0) + 0",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F00003_tender_fact_count_closed",
                "expression": " CALCULATE([F00003_tender_fact_count], D00500_tenders[tender_appl_status] = \"Завершено\") + 0",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F00003_tender_fact_sum_closed",
                "expression": " CALCULATE([F00003_tender_fact_sum], D00500_tenders[tender_appl_status] = \"Завершено\") + 0",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_sale_TO_tons",
                "expression": "([fact_sale_TO_with_returns_kg]+[f00003_fact_return_kg])/1000",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_sale_TO_rub_novat_invoice_price",
                "expression": "[fact_sale_TO_with_returns_rub_novat_invoice_price]+[fact_return_rub_novat_invoice_price]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_sale_TO_cubic_meters",
                "expression": "CALCULATE(SUM([fact_sale_cubic_meters_]),USERELATIONSHIP(F00003_sales_prim[fact_sale_TO_dt],D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]), REMOVEFILTERS(D00400_discount))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_sale_TO_box",
                "expression": "[fact_sale_TO_box_with_returns]+[fact_return_box]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_last_create_date",
                "expression": " MAX(f00003_sales_prim[create_date])",
                "formatString": "General Date",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "discount_rub_novat",
                "expression": "SUM(F00003_sales_prim[discount_rub_novat_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_no_provision_sale_kg",
                "expression": "F00004_order_prim[fact_order_prim_kg] - F00003_sales_prim[fact_sale_kg]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_count_sale",
                "expression": "DISTINCTCOUNT([order_prim_guid])",
                "formatString": "#,0"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_sale_FR",
                "expression": "DIVIDE([fact_sale_kg], F00004_order_prim[fact_order_prim_kg])",
                "formatString": "0.0%;-0.0%;0.0%"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_with_discount_sale_rub_novat_client_price",
                "expression": " sum(F00003_sales_prim[sale_docs_with_disc_novat_client_price_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_without_discount_sale_rub_novat_client_price",
                "expression": " CALCULATE([fact_sale_rub_novat_client_price], FILTER(F00003_sales_prim, F00003_sales_prim[discount_rub_novat_] = 0))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_with_discount_sale_kg",
                "expression": " sum(F00003_sales_prim[sale_docs_with_disc_kg_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_without_discount_sale_kg",
                "expression": " CALCULATE([fact_sale_kg], FILTER(F00003_sales_prim, F00003_sales_prim[discount_rub_novat_] = 0))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_with_discount_sale_packs",
                "expression": " sum(F00003_sales_prim[sale_docs_with_disc_packs_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_without_discount_sale_packs",
                "expression": " CALCULATE([fact_sale_packs], FILTER(F00003_sales_prim, F00003_sales_prim[discount_rub_novat_] = 0))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_with_discount_sale_rub_vat_invoice_price",
                "expression": " sum(F00003_sales_prim[sale_docs_with_disc_rub_vat_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_without_discount_sale_rub_vat_invoice_price",
                "expression": " CALCULATE([fact_sale_rub_vat_invoice_price], FILTER(F00003_sales_prim, F00003_sales_prim[discount_rub_novat_] = 0))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_discont_on_fact_sale_rub_vat_client_price_%",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([f00003_fact_with_discount_sale_rub_vat_client_price], F00003_sales_prim[fact_sale_rub_vat_client_price])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_without_discount_sale_TO_rub_novat_client_price",
                "expression": " CALCULATE([f00003_fact_without_discount_sale_rub_novat_client_price], USERELATIONSHIP(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date], F00003_sales_prim[fact_sale_TO_dt]), REMOVEFILTERS(D00400_discount))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_with_discount_sale_TO_kg",
                "expression": " CALCULATE([f00003_fact_with_discount_sale_kg], USERELATIONSHIP(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date], F00003_sales_prim[fact_sale_TO_dt]), REMOVEFILTERS(D00400_discount))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_without_discount_sale_TO_kg",
                "expression": " CALCULATE([f00003_fact_without_discount_sale_kg], USERELATIONSHIP(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date], F00003_sales_prim[fact_sale_TO_dt]), REMOVEFILTERS(D00400_discount))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_with_discount_sale_TO_packs",
                "expression": " CALCULATE([f00003_fact_with_discount_sale_packs], USERELATIONSHIP(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date], F00003_sales_prim[fact_sale_TO_dt]), REMOVEFILTERS(D00400_discount))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_without_discount_sale_TO_packs",
                "expression": " CALCULATE([f00003_fact_without_discount_sale_packs], USERELATIONSHIP(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date], F00003_sales_prim[fact_sale_TO_dt]), REMOVEFILTERS(D00400_discount))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_with_discount_sale_TO_rub_vat_invoice_price",
                "expression": " CALCULATE([f00003_fact_with_discount_sale_rub_vat_invoice_price], USERELATIONSHIP(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date], F00003_sales_prim[fact_sale_TO_dt]), REMOVEFILTERS(D00400_discount))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_without_discount_sale_TO_rub_vat_invoice_price",
                "expression": " CALCULATE([f00003_fact_without_discount_sale_rub_vat_invoice_price], USERELATIONSHIP(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date], F00003_sales_prim[fact_sale_TO_dt]), REMOVEFILTERS(D00400_discount))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_discont_on_fact_sale_TO_rub_vat_client_price_%",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([f00003_fact_with_discount_sale_TO_rub_vat_client_price], [fact_sale_TO_rub_vat_client_price])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_with_discount_sale_TO_rub_novat_client_price",
                "expression": " CALCULATE([f00003_fact_with_discount_sale_rub_novat_client_price], USERELATIONSHIP(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date], F00003_sales_prim[fact_sale_TO_dt]), REMOVEFILTERS(D00400_discount))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_sale_TO_kg",
                "expression": " [fact_sale_TO_with_returns_kg] + [f00003_fact_return_kg]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_discont_sale_rub_novat_client_price_%",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([discount_rub_novat], F00003_sales_prim[fact_sale_rub_novat_client_price])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_discont_sale_TO_rub_novat_invoice_price",
                "expression": "CALCULATE([discount_rub_novat], USERELATIONSHIP(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date], F00003_sales_prim[fact_sale_TO_dt]), REMOVEFILTERS(D00400_discount))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_no_provision_sale_rub_vat_client_price",
                "expression": " F00004_order_prim[fact_order_prim_rub] - F00003_sales_prim[fact_sale_rub_vat_client_price]   ",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_discont_sale_TO_rub_vat_invoice_price",
                "expression": "CALCULATE([discount_rub_vat], USERELATIONSHIP(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date], F00003_sales_prim[fact_sale_TO_dt]), REMOVEFILTERS(D00400_discount))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_count_sale_delivered_on_time",
                "expression": "CALCULATE([f00003_fact_count_sale], F00003_sales_prim[pitch_date] < MIN(F00004_order_prim[fact_order_prim_delivery_dt]))",
                "formatString": "#,0"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_sale_SLT",
                "expression": "DIVIDE([f00003_fact_count_sale_delivered_on_time], [f00003_fact_count_sale])",
                "formatString": "#,0"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_discont_sale_TO_rub_novat_client_price",
                "expression": "CALCULATE([discount_rub_novat_client_price], USERELATIONSHIP(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date], F00003_sales_prim[fact_sale_TO_dt]), REMOVEFILTERS(D00400_discount))",
                "formatString": "#,0"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_discont_sale_TO_rub_novat_client_price_%",
                "expression": "DIVIDE([f00003_discont_sale_TO_rub_novat_client_price], [fact_sale_TO_rub_novat_client_price])",
                "formatString": "#,0"
              },
              {
                "name": "discount_rub_novat_client_price",
                "expression": "SUM(F00003_sales_prim[discount_rub_novat_client_price_])",
                "lineageTag": "88f869a0-8c4c-481f-971f-e348c8ae9493"
              },
              {
                "name": "discount_usd_novat_client_price",
                "expression": "if(SUM(F00003_sales_prim[discount_usd_novat_client_price_])<>0,SUM(F00003_sales_prim[discount_usd_novat_client_price_]),BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "lineageTag": "b8c89df0-1937-45e7-b759-0ff32522bc04"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_sale_rub_vat_client_price",
                "expression": "SUM([fact_sale_rub_vat_client_price_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "discount_rub_vat",
                "expression": "SUM([discount_rub_vat_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_discount_TO_rub_vat_client_price",
                "expression": "CALCULATE([discount_rub_vat], USERELATIONSHIP(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date], F00003_sales_prim[fact_sale_TO_dt]), REMOVEFILTERS(D00400_discount))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_discount_TO_rub_vat_client_price_%",
                "expression": "DIVIDE([f00003_discount_TO_rub_vat_client_price], [fact_sale_TO_rub_vat_client_price])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_discount_rub_vat_client_price_%",
                "expression": "DIVIDE([discount_rub_vat], [fact_sale_rub_vat_client_price])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_sale_TO_rub_vat_client_price",
                "expression": "[fact_sale_TO_with_returns_rub_vat_client_price] + [f00003_fact_return_rub_vat_client_price]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "lineageTag": "55f0d82a-74c8-43d1-a237-c6a6eda65b05"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_with_discount_sale_rub_vat_client_price",
                "expression": "sum(F00003_sales_prim[sale_docs_with_disc_vat_client_price_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "lineageTag": "d2ff0bf5-99d2-4dd6-ada8-15e0a55001d5"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_without_discount_sale_rub_vat_client_price",
                "expression": " CALCULATE([fact_sale_rub_vat_client_price], FILTER(F00003_sales_prim, F00003_sales_prim[discount_rub_vat_] = 0))",
                "lineageTag": "0cbbecc9-8525-4c51-85e0-9992c7bfc0d7"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_with_discount_sale_TO_rub_vat_client_price",
                "expression": " CALCULATE([f00003_fact_with_discount_sale_rub_vat_client_price], USERELATIONSHIP(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date], F00003_sales_prim[fact_sale_TO_dt]), REMOVEFILTERS(D00400_discount))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "lineageTag": "54dd42b6-2ca0-48ff-be59-e9e0db27ff43"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_without_discount_sale_TO_rub_vat_client_price",
                "expression": " CALCULATE([f00003_fact_without_discount_sale_rub_vat_client_price], USERELATIONSHIP(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date], F00003_sales_prim[fact_sale_TO_dt]), REMOVEFILTERS(D00400_discount))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "lineageTag": "2fe14dec-1f6f-4b76-a6df-62434041002c"
              },
              {
                "name": "discount_sale_rub_vat_invoice_price_%",
                "expression": "DIVIDE([discount_rub_vat], [fact_sale_rub_vat_invoice_price])",
                "lineageTag": "4872a050-809a-434e-bbd0-2dfd2aa055e0"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_sale_TO_SI",
                "expression": [
                  "SWITCH(SELECTEDVALUE(D00750_units[unit_id]),",
                  "                1, [fact_sale_TO_kg],  ",
                  "                2, [fact_sale_TO_packs],",
                  "                3, [fact_sale_TO_box],",
                  "                4, F00006_discount_prim[fact_promo_rub_vat_income_price],",
                  "                5, [fact_sale_TO_with_returns_rub_vat_invoice_price],",
                  "                6, [fact_sale_TO_rub_novat_client_price],",
                  "                7, F00006_discount_prim[fact_promo_rub_vat_income_price],",
                  "                9, [fact_sale_TO_tons],",
                  "                10,[fact_sale_TO_rub_vat_client_price] / 1000,",
                  "                11,[fact_sale_TO_rub_vat_client_price] / 1000000,",
                  "                12, [fact_sale_TO_qty],",
                  "                13, [fact_sale_TO_qty] / 1000,",
                  "                17, [fact_sale_TO_with_returns_rub_vat_client_price],",
                  "                BLANK()",
                  "            )"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },

              {

                "expression": "CALCULATE( [f00003_fact_sales_SI_vs_LY] ,USERELATIONSHIP(F00003_sales_prim[fact_sale_TO_dt],D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]), REMOVEFILTERS(D00400_discount))",

              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_TO_ytd_vs_LY_%",
                "expression": "DIVIDE([f00003_fact_TO_ytd]-[f00003_fact_TO_ly_ytd], [f00003_fact_TO_ly_ytd], BLANK())",

              },
              {
                "name": "fact_sale_TO_with_returns_kg",

                  "--CALCULATE([fact_sale_kg], USERELATIONSHIP(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date], F00003_sales_prim[fact_sale_TO_dt]), REMOVEFILTERS(D00400_discount))",
                  "CALCULATE(SUM([fact_sale_kg_]), USERELATIONSHIP(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date], F00003_sales_prim[fact_sale_TO_dt]), REMOVEFILTERS(D00400_discount))",
                  ""
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",

                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_all_measures",
                "expression": [
                  "var scale=SWITCH(SELECTEDVALUE('D01852_scales'[scale_id]),",
                  "            2, 1000,",
                  "            3, 1000000,",
                  "            1)",
                  "            var res=SWITCH(SELECTEDVALUE('D01850_metrics'[metric_id]),",
                  "                1, [f00003_fact_sale_SI_3LY]  / scale,",
                  "                2, [f00003_fact_sale_SI_2LY]  / scale,",
                  "                3, [f00003_fact_sales_SI_LY]  / scale,",
                  "                6, [f00500_plan_AOP]  / scale,",
                  "                7, [f00500_plan_RF]  / scale,",
                  "                8, [f00003_fact_sale_SI]  / scale,",
                  "                10, [f00500_plan_oper_SI]  / scale,",
                  "                11, ([f00003_fact_sale_SI] - [f00003_fact_sales_SI_LY])  / scale,",
                  "                12, FORMAT(DIVIDE([f00003_fact_sale_SI] - [f00003_fact_sales_SI_LY], [f00003_fact_sales_SI_LY]), \"0%\"),",
                  "                13, ([f00003_fact_sale_SI] - [f00500_plan_AOP])  / scale,",
                  "                14, FORMAT(DIVIDE([f00003_fact_sale_SI] - [f00500_plan_AOP], [f00500_plan_AOP]), \"0%\"),",
                  "                15, ([f00003_fact_sale_SI] - [f00500_plan_RF])  / scale,",
                  "                16, FORMAT(DIVIDE([f00003_fact_sale_SI] - [f00500_plan_RF], [f00500_plan_RF]), \"0%\"),",
                  "                17, ([f00003_fact_sale_SI] - [f00500_plan_oper_SI])  / scale,",
                  "                18, FORMAT(DIVIDE([f00003_fact_sale_SI] - [f00500_plan_oper_SI], [f00500_plan_oper_SI]), \"0%\"),",
                  "                19, ([f00003_fact_sale_SI] - [f00003_fact_sale_SI_2LY])  / scale,",
                  "                20, FORMAT(DIVIDE([f00003_fact_sale_SI] - [f00003_fact_sale_SI_2LY], [f00003_fact_sale_SI_2LY]), \"0%\"),",
                  "                [f00003_fact_sale_SI]  / scale",
                  "                )",
                  "            return res"
                ],
                "lineageTag": "da9d2518-2a1c-48ec-bbda-7716736403e1"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_sales_SI_vs_2LY",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([f00003_fact_sale_SI]-[f00003_fact_sale_SI_2LY],[f00003_fact_sale_SI_2LY])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_sales_SI_vs_3LY",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([f00003_fact_sale_SI]-[f00003_fact_sale_SI_3LY],[f00003_fact_sale_SI_3LY])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },

                "expression": "CALCULATE(SUM([fact_sale_cur_]),USERELATIONSHIP(F00003_sales_prim[fact_sale_TO_dt],D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]), REMOVEFILTERS(D00400_discount))",

                "formatString": "#,0.00"

                "expression": "CALCULATE(SUM([regular_rub_vat_client_price_]),USERELATIONSHIP(F00003_sales_prim[fact_sale_TO_dt],D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]), REMOVEFILTERS(D00400_discount))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_with_discount_sale_rub_novat_invoice_price",
                "expression": " sum(F00003_sales_prim[sale_docs_with_disc_rub_novat_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_with_discount_sale_TO_rub_novat_invoice_price",
                "expression": " CALCULATE([f00003_fact_with_discount_sale_rub_novat_invoice_price], USERELATIONSHIP(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date], F00003_sales_prim[fact_sale_TO_dt]), REMOVEFILTERS(D00400_discount))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_with_discount_sale_TO_client_price_%",
                "expression": "DIVIDE([f00003_fact_with_discount_sale_TO_rub_vat_client_price], [fact_sale_TO_with_returns_rub_vat_client_price])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_with_discount_sale_TO_kg_%",
                "expression": "DIVIDE([f00003_fact_with_discount_sale_TO_kg], [fact_sale_TO_with_returns_kg])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00003_fact_sale_TO_with_returns_SI",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE(",
                  "    [f00003_fact_sale_SI]",
                  "    , USERELATIONSHIP(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date], F00003_sales_prim[fact_sale_TO_dt]), REMOVEFILTERS(D00400_discount))"
                ],
                "lineageTag": "8026bbe1-859a-496c-8d42-3877635f67e3"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_sale_usd_novat_client_price",
                "expression": "if(SUM(F00003_sales_prim[fact_sale_usd_novat_client_price_])<>0,SUM(F00003_sales_prim[fact_sale_usd_novat_client_price_]),BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },

                "formatString": "#,0.00"

              {

                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },

                "expression": "SUM([fact_sale_packs_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_sale_with_returns_qty",
                "expression": "SUM([fact_sale_qty_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_sale_with_returns_tons",
                "expression": "SUM([fact_sale_kg_])/1000",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_sale_returns_box",
                "expression": "SUM([fact_sale_box_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              }
            ],

                  {
                    "name": "TabularEditor_TableSchema",
                    "value": "{\"Name\":\"F00006_discount_prim\",\"Schema\":\"dbo\",\"Database\":\"mart\",\"IncludedColumns\":[\"pitch_date\",\"disc_to_date\",\"prim_sale_doc_sku_guid\",\"manuf_warehouse_guid\",\"sku_guid\",\"aep_status_guid\",\"chain_guid\",\"client_guid\",\"discount_guid\",\"project_guid\",\"tender_appl_guid\",\"address_client_guid\",\"document_prim_guid\",\"currency_guid\",\"fact_promo_rub_vat_income_price_\",\"fact_promo_rub_novat_income_price_\",\"fact_promo_packs_\",\"fact_promo_kg_\",\"fact_promo_cur_\",\"fact_sale_sum_vat_cur_\",\"fact_sale_sum_novat_cur_\",\"order_prim_guid\"],\"SelectAll\":true}"
                  }
                ]
              }
            ],
            "measures": [
              {
                "name": "fact_promo_kg",
                "expression": "SUm(F00006_discount_prim[fact_promo_kg_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_promo_packs",
                "expression": "SUM(F00006_discount_prim[fact_promo_packs_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_promo_rub_vat_income_price",
                "expression": "SUM([fact_promo_rub_vat_income_price_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_prim_TMA_SI_packs",
                "expression": " CALCULATE(SUM(F00003_sales_prim[fact_sale_packs_]),D00400_discount[disc_type]=\"ТМА\")",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_prim_TMA_SI_rub_vat_invoice_price",
                "expression": "CALCULATE(SUM(F00003_sales_prim[fact_sale_rub_vat_invoice_price_]),D00400_discount[disc_type]=\"ТМА\")",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_prim_TMA_SI_kg",
                "expression": " CALCULATE(SUM(F00003_sales_prim[fact_sale_kg_]),D00400_discount[disc_type]=\"ТМА\")",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "discount_prim_TMA_SI_rub_vat_invoice_price",
                "expression": "CALCULATE(SUM(F00006_discount_prim[fact_promo_rub_vat_income_price_]),D00400_discount[disc_type]=\"ТМА\")",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_prim_TMA_SI_budget_rub_vat_client_price",
                "expression": "SUM(F00003_sales_prim[fact_sale_rub_vat_invoice_price_]) / (100 * sum(F00006_discount_prim[fact_promo_rub_vat_income_price_])/sum(F00003_sales_prim[fact_sale_rub_vat_invoice_price_]))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00006_fact_prim_TMA_general",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE(",
                  "\tSWITCH(SELECTEDVALUE(D00750_units[unit_id]),",
                  "        \t1,[fact_prim_TMA_SI_kg],",
                  "        \t2,[fact_prim_TMA_SI_packs],",
                  "        \t5,[fact_prim_TMA_SI_rub_vat_invoice_price],",
                  "        \t9,[fact_prim_TMA_SI_kg]/1000,",
                  "        \t10,[fact_prim_TMA_SI_rub_vat_invoice_price]/1000,",
                  "        \t11,[fact_prim_TMA_SI_rub_vat_invoice_price]/1000000),",
                  "\tREMOVEFILTERS(D00850_plans_versions[plan_version_name])",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f000006_plan_tma_completion_%",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([f00006_fact_prim_TMA_general], [f00007_plan_discount_prim_TMA_general])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F00006_fact_promo_general",
                "expression": [
                  " SWITCH(SELECTEDVALUE(D00750_units[unit_id]),",
                  "1, F00006_discount_prim[fact_promo_kg],",
                  "2, F00006_discount_prim[fact_promo_packs],",
                  "5, F00006_discount_prim[fact_promo_rub_vat_income_price],",
                  "F00006_discount_prim[fact_promo_rub_vat_income_price])"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F00006_fact_promo_general_scale",
                "expression": [
                  "SWITCH(SELECTEDVALUE(D01852_scales[scale_id]),",
                  "1, F00006_discount_prim[F00006_fact_promo_general],",
                  "2, F00006_discount_prim[F00006_fact_promo_general]/1000,",
                  "3, F00006_discount_prim[F00006_fact_promo_general]/1000000)"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F00006_fact_promo_vs_PROMO_%",
                "expression": "DIVIDE(calculate(F00006_discount_prim[F00006_fact_promo_general], D00400_discount[disc_promo_type] = \"Промо\"), F00006_discount_prim[F00006_fact_promo_general])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F00006_fact_promo_vs_BASELINE_%",
                "expression": "DIVIDE(calculate(F00006_discount_prim[F00006_fact_promo_general], D00400_discount[disc_promo_type] = \"BASELINE\"), F00006_discount_prim[F00006_fact_promo_general])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F00006_fact_promo_vs_EDLP_%",
                "expression": "DIVIDE(calculate(F00006_discount_prim[F00006_fact_promo_general], D00400_discount[disc_promo_type] = \"EDLP/EDPP\"), F00006_discount_prim[F00006_fact_promo_general])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F00006_fact_promo_general_scale_LY",
                "expression": "CALCULATE(F00006_discount_prim[F00006_fact_promo_general_scale], PREVIOUSYEAR(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F00006_fact_promo_vs_PROMO_LY_%",
                "expression": "DIVIDE(calculate(F00006_discount_prim[F00006_fact_promo_general_scale_LY], D00400_discount[disc_promo_type] = \"Промо\"), F00006_discount_prim[F00006_fact_promo_general_scale_LY])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F00006_fact_promo_vs_BASELINE_LY_%",
                "expression": "DIVIDE(calculate(F00006_discount_prim[F00006_fact_promo_general_scale_LY], D00400_discount[disc_promo_type] = \"BASELINE\"), F00006_discount_prim[F00006_fact_promo_general_scale_LY])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F00006_fact_promo_vs_EDLP_LY_%",
                "expression": "DIVIDE(calculate(F00006_discount_prim[F00006_fact_promo_general_scale_LY], D00400_discount[disc_promo_type] = \"EDLP/EDPP\"), F00006_discount_prim[F00006_fact_promo_general_scale_LY])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00006_fact_promo_days_fraction",
                "expression": " [f00006_fact_promo_qty_days] / COUNT(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date])",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00006_fact_promo_days_vs_plan",
                "expression": " [f00006_fact_promo_days_fraction] - F00007_plan_discount_prim[f00007_plan_promo_days_fraction]",
                "formatString": "0.00%;-0.00%;0.00%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00006_fact_promo_qty_days",
                "expression": " COUNT([pitch_date])",
                "formatString": "#,0",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00006_fact_promo_vs_SI_%",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([F00006_fact_promo_general_scale], [f00100_all_measures])",
                "formatString": "0.00%;-0.00%;0.00%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00006_fact_promo_completion",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([F00006_fact_promo_general_scale], [f00007_plan_promo_AOP_n_RF], BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.00%;-#,0.00%;#,0.00%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00006_fact_promo_vs_AOP_n_RF",
                "expression": " [F00006_fact_promo_general_scale] - [f00007_plan_promo_AOP_n_RF]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00006_fact_promo_vs_gl",
                "expression": " [f00006_fact_promo_vs_SI_%] - [F01270_average_gl_discount_%]",
                "formatString": "0.00%;-0.00%;0.00%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00006_fact_promo_price_vs_gl",
                "expression": " [f00006_fact_promo_price_per_kg] - [f01270_gl_price_rub]",
                "formatString": "0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00006_fact_promo_price_vs_gl_%",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([f00006_fact_promo_price_vs_gl],  [f00006_fact_promo_price_per_kg])",
                "formatString": "0.00%;-0.00%;0.00%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00006_fact_promo_price_per_kg",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([fact_promo_rub_vat_income_price], F00006_discount_prim[fact_promo_kg])",
                "formatString": "0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_promo_cur",
                "expression": "SUM(F00006_discount_prim[fact_promo_cur_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_promo_rub_novat_income_price",
                "expression": "SUM([fact_promo_rub_novat_income_price_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_promo_TO_kg",
                "expression": "CALCULATE([fact_promo_kg], USERELATIONSHIP(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date],F00006_discount_prim[disc_to_date]))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_promo_TO_packs",
                "expression": "CALCULATE([fact_promo_packs], USERELATIONSHIP(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date],F00006_discount_prim[disc_to_date]))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_promo_TO_rub_vat_income_price",
                "expression": "CALCULATE([fact_promo_rub_vat_income_price], USERELATIONSHIP(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date],F00006_discount_prim[disc_to_date]))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_promo_TO_rub_novat_income_price",
                "expression": "CALCULATE([fact_promo_rub_novat_income_price], USERELATIONSHIP(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date],F00006_discount_prim[disc_to_date]))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_promo_TO_cur",
                "expression": "CALCULATE([fact_promo_cur], USERELATIONSHIP(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date],F00006_discount_prim[disc_to_date]))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f000006_promo_TO_%",
                "expression": "DIVIDE([fact_promo_TO_rub_vat_income_price], [fact_sale_TO_with_returns_rub_vat_client_price])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%"
              },
              {
                "name": "f000006_promo_with_disc_TO_%",
                "expression": "DIVIDE([fact_promo_TO_rub_vat_income_price], F00003_sales_prim[f00003_fact_with_discount_sale_TO_rub_vat_client_price])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00006_fact_sale_sum_vat_cur",
                "expression": "CALCULATE(SUM([fact_sale_sum_vat_cur_]), USERELATIONSHIP(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date],F00006_discount_prim[disc_to_date]))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00006_fact_sale_sum_novat_cur",
                "expression": "CALCULATE(SUM([fact_sale_sum_novat_cur_]), USERELATIONSHIP(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date],F00006_discount_prim[disc_to_date]))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_promo_TO_cur_Promo",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE([fact_promo_cur], ",
                  "FILTER(",
                  "       'D00400_discount',",
                  "        'D00400_discount'[disc_type] IN {\"EDLP\",",
                  "            \"EDPP\",",
                  "            \"ТМА_сумма\",",
                  "            \"ТМА_проц\"}",
                  "    )",
                  "",
                  ",USERELATIONSHIP(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date],F00006_discount_prim[disc_to_date]))"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              }
            ],
            "annotations": [
              {
                "name": "_TM_ExtProp_QueryDefinition",
                "value": " \t\t\t\tSELECT [dbo].[F00006_discount_prim].*   FROM [dbo].[F00006_discount_prim] "
              },
              {
                "name": "_TM_ExtProp_DbTableName",
                "value": "F00006_discount_prim"
              },
              {
                "name": "_TM_ExtProp_DbSchemaName",
                "value": "dbo"
              },
              {
                "name": "TableWidgetSerialization",
                "value": [
                  "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-16\"?><Gemini xmlns=\"TableWidgetSerialization\"><AnnotationContent><![CDATA[<?xml version=\"1.0\"?>",
                  "<TableWidgetGridSerialization xmlns:xsd=\"http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema\" xmlns:xsi=\"http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance\">",
                  "  <ColumnSuggestedType />",
                  "  <ColumnFormat />",
                  "  <ColumnAccuracy />",
                  "  <ColumnCurrencySymbol />",
                  "  <ColumnPositivePattern />",
                  "  <ColumnNegativePattern />",
                  "  <ColumnWidths>",
                  "    <item>",
                  "      <key>",

                      "        <string>plan_type_guid</string>",
                      "      </key>",
                      "      <value>",
                      "        <int>10</int>",
                      "      </value>",
                      "    </item>",
                      "    <item>",
                      "      <key>",
                      "        <string>plan_version_guid</string>",
                      "      </key>",
                      "      <value>",
                      "        <int>11</int>",
                      "      </value>",
                      "    </item>",
                      "    <item>",
                      "      <key>",
                      "        <string>plan_promo_rub_net_client_price_</string>",
                      "      </key>",

                      "        <int>12</int>",
                      "      </value>",

                      "      </key>",

                      "      </key>",

                      "        <int>14</int>",
                      "      </value>",

                      "        <string>chain_guid</string>",
                      "      </key>",
                      "      <value>",
                      "        <int>15</int>",
                      "      </value>",
                      "    </item>",
                      "    <item>",
                      "      <key>",
                      "        <string>plan_promo_discount_prc_</string>",
                      "      </key>",
                      "      <value>",
                      "        <int>16</int>",
                      "      </value>",
                      "    </item>",
                      "  </ColumnDisplayIndex>",
                      "  <ColumnFrozen />",
                      "  <ColumnChecked>",
                      "    <item>",
                      "      <key>",

                      "        <boolean>true</boolean>",
                      "      </value>",
                      "    </item>",

                      "      <key>",
                      "        <string>address_client_guid</string>",
                      "      </key>",
                      "      <value>",
                      "        <boolean>true</boolean>",
                      "      </value>",
                      "    </item>",
                      "    <item>",
                      "      <key>",
                      "        <string>plan_type_guid</string>",
                      "      </key>",
                      "      <value>",
                      "        <boolean>true</boolean>",
                      "      </value>",
                      "    </item>",
                      "    <item>",
                      "      <key>",
                      "        <string>plan_version_guid</string>",
                      "      </key>",
                      "      <value>",
                      "        <boolean>true</boolean>",
                      "      </value>",
                      "    </item>",
                      "    <item>",
                      "      <key>",
                      "        <string>plan_promo_rub_net_client_price_</string>",
                      "      </key>",

                      "      </value>",

                      "      </key>",

                      "      </value>",

                      "      <key>",
                      "        <string>create_date</string>",
                      "      </key>",

                      "      </value>",
                      "    </item>",
                      "    <item>",
                      "      <key>",
                      "        <string>chain_guid</string>",
                      "      </key>",
                      "      <value>",
                      "        <boolean>true</boolean>",
                      "      </value>",

                      "</TableWidgetGridSerialization>]]></AnnotationContent></Gemini>"
