                ]
              }
            ],
            "measures": [
              {
                "name": "plan_promo_packs",
                "expression": "SUM([plan_promo_packs_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_promo_rub_vat_invoice_price",
                "expression": "SUM([plan_promo_rub_vat_invoice_price_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_promo_qty",
                "expression": "SUM([plan_promo_packs_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_promo_kg",
                "expression": "SUM([plan_promo_kg_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_promo_rub_vat_client_price",
                "expression": "SUM([plan_promo_rub_vat_client_price_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_plan_promo_general",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE(",
                  "\tSWITCH(SELECTEDVALUE(D00750_units[unit_id]),",
                  "        \t1,[plan_promo_kg],",
                  "        \t2,[plan_promo_packs],",
                  "        \t5,[plan_promo_rub_vat_client_price],",
                  "        \t6,[plan_promo_rub_net_client_price],",
                  "        \t9,[plan_promo_kg]/1000,",
                  "        \t10,[plan_promo_rub_vat_client_price]/1000,",
                  "        \t11,[plan_promo_rub_vat_client_price]/1000000,",
                  "        \t12,[plan_promo_qty],",
                  "        \t13,[plan_promo_qty]/1000,",
                  "        \t[plan_promo_rub_vat_client_price]",
                  "\t),",
                  "\tREMOVEFILTERS(D00850_plans_versions[plan_version_name])",
                  ")"
                ],
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_plan_promo_acb",
                "expression": "DISTINCTCOUNT(F00007_plan_discount_prim[address_client_guid])",
                "formatString": "#,0",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_plan_promo_AOP",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE(",
                  "    [f00007_plan_promo_general], ",
                  "    D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name]=\"AOP\"",
                  "    --LOWER(F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec[plan_status_name]) in {\"утвержден\", \"утверждён\"}",
                  ")"
                ],
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_plan_promo_AOP_acb",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE(",
                  "    [f00007_plan_promo_acb],",
                  "    D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name]=\"AOP\"",
                  "    --LOWER(F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec[plan_status_name]) in {\"утвержден\", \"утверждён\"}",
                  ")"
                ],
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_plan_promo_RF",
                "expression": [
                  "IF(",
                  "    HASONEVALUE(D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name]), ",
                  "    -- Если выбран конкретный план RF",
                  "    CALCULATE([f00007_plan_promo_general], D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = SELECTEDVALUE(D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name])),",
                  "    -- Если выбран Накопительный RF",
                  "    SWITCH(max(D00001_main_calendar[quarter]),",
                  "        \"1 квартал\", CALCULATE([f00007_plan_promo_general], D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"AOP\"),",
                  "        \"2 квартал\", CALCULATE([f00007_plan_promo_general], D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"RF1\"),",
                  "        \"3 квартал\", CALCULATE([f00007_plan_promo_general], D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"RF2\"),",
                  "        CALCULATE([f00007_plan_promo_general], D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"RF3\")",
                  "    )",
                  ")"
                ],
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_plan_promo_RF_acb",
                "expression": [
                  "IF(",
                  "    HASONEVALUE(D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name]), ",
                  "    -- Если выбран конкретный план RF",
                  "    CALCULATE([f00007_plan_promo_acb], D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = SELECTEDVALUE(D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name])),",
                  "    -- Если выбран Накопительный RF",
                  "    SWITCH(max(D00001_main_calendar[quarter]),",
                  "        \"1 квартал\", CALCULATE([f00007_plan_promo_acb], D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"AOP\"),",
                  "        \"2 квартал\", CALCULATE([f00007_plan_promo_acb], D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"RF1\"),",
                  "        \"3 квартал\", CALCULATE([f00007_plan_promo_acb], D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"RF2\"),",
                  "        CALCULATE([f00007_plan_promo_acb], D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"RF3\")",
                  "    )",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_plan_promo_Launch",
                "expression": "CALCULATE([f00007_plan_promo_general], D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name]=\"Лонч\")",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_plan_promo_Launch_acb",
                "expression": "CALCULATE([f00007_plan_promo_acb], D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name]=\"Лонч\")",
                "formatString": "#,0",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI",
                "expression": "CALCULATE([f00007_plan_promo_general], D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name]=\"DEMAND\")",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI_acb",
                "expression": "CALCULATE([f00007_plan_promo_acb], D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name]=\"DEMAND\")",
                "formatString": "#,0",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI_vs_AOP",
                "expression": " [f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI] - [f00007_plan_promo_AOP]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI_vs_AOP_%",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI_vs_AOP], [f00007_plan_promo_AOP])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI_vs_RF",
                "expression": " [f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI] - [f00007_plan_promo_RF]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI_vs_RF_%",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI_vs_RF], [f00007_plan_promo_RF])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI_vs_fact_SI_LY",
                "expression": " [f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI] - [f00003_fact_sales_SI_LY]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI_vs_fact_SI_LY_%",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI_vs_fact_SI_LY], [f00003_fact_sales_SI_LY])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI_vs_Launch",
                "expression": " [f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI] - [f00007_plan_promo_Launch]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI_vs_Launch_%",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI_vs_Launch], [f00003_fact_sales_SI_LY])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_plan_promo_disc_promo_completion",
                "expression": " DIVIDE(CALCULATE([f00007_plan_promo_general], 'D00400_discount'[disc_promo_type]=\"Промо\"), CALCULATE([f00007_plan_promo_general], REMOVEFILTERS('D00400_discount'[disc_promo_type])))",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_fact_vs_plan_promo_copletion",
                "expression": " [f00003_fact_SI_disc_promo_completion] - [f00007_plan_promo_disc_promo_completion]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_plan_promo_AOP_off_take",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([f00007_plan_promo_AOP], [f00007_plan_promo_AOP_acb])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI_disc_promo_completion",
                "expression": " DIVIDE(CALCULATE([f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI], 'D00400_discount'[disc_promo_type]=\"Промо\"), CALCULATE([f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI], REMOVEFILTERS('D00400_discount'[disc_promo_type])))",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_plan_promo_AOP_disc_promo_completion",
                "expression": " DIVIDE(CALCULATE([f00007_plan_promo_AOP], 'D00400_discount'[disc_promo_type]=\"Промо\"), CALCULATE([f00007_plan_promo_AOP], REMOVEFILTERS('D00400_discount'[disc_promo_type])))",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_plan_promo_RF_promo_completion",
                "expression": " DIVIDE(CALCULATE([f00007_plan_promo_RF], 'D00400_discount'[disc_promo_type]=\"Промо\"), CALCULATE([f00007_plan_promo_RF], REMOVEFILTERS('D00400_discount'[disc_promo_type])))",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_promo_demand_SI_vs_fact_SI_disc_promo",
                "expression": " CALCULATE([f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI] - [f00003_fact_sale_SI], 'D00400_discount'[disc_promo_type]=\"Промо\")",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_promo_demand_SI_vs_fact_SI_disc_promo_LY",
                "expression": " CALCULATE([f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI] - [f00003_fact_sales_SI_LY], 'D00400_discount'[disc_promo_type]=\"Промо\")",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_promo_demand_SI_vs_AOP_disc_promo",
                "expression": " CALCULATE([f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI] - [f00007_plan_promo_AOP], 'D00400_discount'[disc_promo_type]=\"Промо\")",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_promo_demand_SI_vs_RF_disc_promo",
                "expression": " CALCULATE([f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI] - [f00007_plan_promo_RF], 'D00400_discount'[disc_promo_type]=\"Промо\")",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI_vs_fact_SI_promo_completion",
                "expression": " [f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI_disc_promo_completion] - [f00003_fact_SI_disc_promo_completion]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI_vs_fact_SI_disc_promo_LY_copletion",
                "expression": " [f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI_disc_promo_completion] - [f00003_fact_SI_disc_promo_LY_completion]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI_vs_AOP_disc_promo_copletion",
                "expression": " [f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI_disc_promo_completion] - [f00007_plan_promo_AOP_disc_promo_completion]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI_vs_RF_disc_promo_completion",
                "expression": " [f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI_disc_promo_completion] - [f00007_plan_promo_RF_promo_completion]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_fact_SI_vs_promo_AOP_acb",
                "expression": " [f00003_fact_SI_acb] - [f00007_plan_promo_AOP_acb]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_fact_SI_vs_promo_AOP_acb_%",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([f00007_fact_SI_vs_promo_AOP_acb], [f00007_plan_promo_AOP_acb])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00%;-#,0.00%;#,0.00%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_fact_SI_vs_promo_RF_acb",
                "expression": " [f00003_fact_SI_acb] - [f00007_plan_promo_RF_acb]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_fact_SI_vs_promo_RF_acb_%",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([f00007_fact_SI_vs_promo_RF_acb], [f00007_plan_promo_RF_acb])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_fact_SI_vs_promo_Launch_acb",
                "expression": " [f00003_fact_SI_acb] - [f00007_plan_promo_Launch_acb]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_fact_SI_vs_promo_Launch_acb_%",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([f00007_fact_SI_vs_promo_Launch_acb], [f00007_plan_promo_Launch_acb])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_fact_SI_vs_LY_acb",
                "expression": " [f00003_fact_SI_acb] - [f00003_fact_SI_acb_LY]",
                "formatString": "#,0",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_fact_SI_vs_LY_acb_%",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([f00007_fact_SI_vs_LY_acb], [f00003_fact_SI_acb_LY])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_fact_SI_vs_promo_AOP",
                "expression": " [f00003_fact_sale_SI] - [f00007_plan_promo_AOP]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_fact_SI_vs_promo_AOP_%",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([f00007_fact_SI_vs_promo_AOP], [f00007_plan_promo_AOP])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_fact_SI_vs_promo_RF",
                "expression": " [f00003_fact_sale_SI] - [f00007_plan_promo_RF]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_fact_SI_vs_promo_RF_%",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([f00007_fact_SI_vs_promo_RF], [f00007_plan_promo_RF])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_fact_SI_vs_promo_Launch",
                "expression": " [f00003_fact_sale_SI] - [f00007_plan_promo_Launch]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_fact_SI_vs_promo_Launch_%",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([f00007_fact_SI_vs_promo_Launch], [f00007_plan_promo_Launch])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_fact_SI_vs_LY",
                "expression": " [f00003_fact_sale_SI] - [f00003_fact_sales_SI_Ly]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_fact_SI_vs_LY_%",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([f00007_fact_SI_vs_LY], [f00003_fact_sales_SI_Ly])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_budget_tdm",
                "expression": " [f00006_fact_promo_fact_competion] * [f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_plan_budget_ver_forecast",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([f00007_budget_tdm], [f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_plan_budget_ver_fact",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([fact_promo_rub_vat_income_price], [f00003_fact_sale_SI])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_plan_budget_ver_plan",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([f01250_plan_budget], [f00007_plan_promo_AOP_n_RF])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_plan_budget_forecast_vs_plan",
                "expression": " [f00007_plan_budget_ver_forecast] - [f00007_plan_budget_ver_plan]",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_plan_budget_fact_vs_plan",
                "expression": " [f00007_plan_budget_ver_fact] - [f00007_plan_budget_ver_plan]",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_promo_rub_net_client_price",
                "expression": "SUM([plan_promo_rub_net_client_price_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI_vs_AOP_disc_promo",
                "expression": " CALCULATE([f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI] - [f00007_plan_promo_AOP], 'D00400_discount'[disc_promo_type]=\"Промо\")",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_all_measures",
                "expression": [
                  "",
                  "var scale=SWITCH(SELECTEDVALUE('D01852_scales'[scale_id]),",
                  "            2, 1000,",
                  "            3, 1000000,",
                  "            1)",
                  "var res=SWITCH(SELECTEDVALUE('D01850_metrics'[metric_id]),",
                  "             1, [f00003_fact_sale_SI_3LY]  / scale,",
                  "             2, [f00003_fact_sale_SI_2LY]  / scale,",
                  "             3, [f00003_fact_sales_SI_LY]  / scale,",
                  "             4, [f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI]  / scale,",
                  "             5, [f00007_plan_promo_Launch]  / scale,",
                  "             6, [f00007_plan_promo_AOP]  / scale,",
                  "             7, [f00007_plan_promo_RF]  / scale,",
                  "             8, [f00003_fact_sale_SI]  / scale,",
                  "             9, [f00007_plan_promo_general]  / scale,",
                  "             11, [f00007_fact_SI_vs_LY]  / scale,",
                  "             12, FORMAT([f00007_fact_SI_vs_LY_%], \"0%\"),",
                  "             13, [f00007_fact_SI_vs_promo_AOP]  / scale,",
                  "             14, FORMAT([f00007_fact_SI_vs_promo_AOP_%], \"0%\"),",
                  "             15, [f00007_fact_SI_vs_promo_RF]  / scale,",
                  "             16, FORMAT([f00007_fact_SI_vs_promo_RF_%], \"0%\"),",
                  "             21, [f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI_vs_AOP] / scale,",
                  "             22, FORMAT([f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI_vs_AOP_%], \"0%\"),",
                  "             23, [f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI_vs_RF]  / scale,",
                  "             24, FORMAT([f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI_vs_RF_%], \"0%\"),",
                  "             25, [f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI_vs_fact_SI_LY]  / scale,",
                  "             26, FORMAT([f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI_vs_fact_SI_LY_%], \"0%\"),",
                  "             27, [f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI_vs_Launch]  / scale,",
                  "             28, FORMAT([f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI_vs_Launch_%], \"0%\"),",
                  "             29, FORMAT([f00007_plan_promo_disc_promo_completion], \"0%\"),",
                  "             30, FORMAT([f00003_fact_SI_disc_promo_completion], \"0%\"),",
                  "             31, FORMAT([f00007_fact_vs_plan_promo_copletion], \"0%\"),",
                  "             32, [f00003_fact_SI_acb_LY]  / scale,",
                  "             33, [f00007_plan_promo_AOP_acb] / scale,",
                  "             34, [f00007_plan_promo_RF_acb] / scale,",
                  "             35, [f00003_fact_SI_acb]  / scale,",
                  "             36, [f00007_plan_promo_Launch_acb]  / scale,",
                  "             37, [f00007_fact_SI_vs_promo_AOP_acb]  / scale,",
                  "             38, FORMAT([f00007_fact_SI_vs_promo_AOP_acb_%], \"0%\"),",
                  "             39, [f00007_fact_SI_vs_promo_RF_acb]  / scale,",
                  "             40, FORMAT([f00007_fact_SI_vs_promo_RF_acb_%], \"0%\"),",
                  "             41, [f00007_fact_SI_vs_LY_acb]  / scale,",
                  "             42, FORMAT([f00007_fact_SI_vs_LY_acb_%], \"0%\"),",
                  "             43, [f00007_fact_SI_vs_promo_Launch_acb]  / scale,",
                  "             44, FORMAT([f00007_fact_SI_vs_promo_Launch_acb_%], \"0%\"),",
                  "             45, [f00003_fact_SI_off_take_LY] / scale,",
                  "             46, [f00003_fact_SI_off_take] / scale,",
                  "             47, [f00007_plan_promo_AOP_off_take] / scale,",
                  "             55, FORMAT([f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI_disc_promo_completion], \"0%\"),",
                  "             56, FORMAT([f00003_fact_SI_disc_promo_LY_completion], \"0%\"),",
                  "             57, FORMAT([f00007_plan_promo_AOP_disc_promo_completion], \"0%\"),",
                  "             58, FORMAT([f00003_fact_SI_disc_promo_completion], \"0%\"),",
                  "             59, FORMAT([f00007_plan_promo_RF_promo_completion], \"0%\"),",
                  "             60, FORMAT([f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI_vs_fact_SI_disc_promo_LY_copletion], \"0%\"),",
                  "             61, FORMAT([f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI_vs_AOP_disc_promo_copletion], \"0%\"),",
                  "             62, FORMAT([f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI_vs_fact_SI_promo_completion], \"0%\"),",
                  "             63, FORMAT([f00007_plan_promo_demand_SI_vs_RF_disc_promo_completion], \"0%\"),",
                  "             64, [f00007_promo_demand_SI_vs_fact_SI_disc_promo_LY],",
                  "             65, [f00007_promo_demand_SI_vs_AOP_disc_promo],",
                  "             66, [f00007_promo_demand_SI_vs_fact_SI_disc_promo],",
                  "             67, [f00007_promo_demand_SI_vs_RF_disc_promo],",
                  "             [f00003_fact_sale_SI]  / scale",
                  "             )",
                  "           return res"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_fact_SI_vs_promo_LY_%",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([f00007_fact_SI_vs_LY], [f00003_fact_sales_SI_LY])",
                "formatString": "0.0%;-0.0%;0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_fact_SI_plan_promo_completion",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([f00003_fact_sale_SI], [f00007_plan_promo_AOP_n_RF])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f0007_budget_promo_completion",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([fact_promo_rub_vat_income_price], [f01250_plan_budget])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_plan_promo_AOP_n_RF",
                "expression": " CALCULATE([f00007_plan_promo_general], FILTER(F00007_plan_discount_prim, F00007_plan_discount_prim[plan_version_guid] in ALLSELECTED(D00850_plans_versions[plan_version_guid])))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_plan_discount_prim_TMA_general",
                "expression": [
                  " CALCULATE(",
                  "  SWITCH(SELECTEDVALUE(D00750_units[unit_id]),",
                  "          1,[plan_promo_kg],",
                  "          2,[fact_prim_TMA_SI_packs],",
                  "          5,[plan_promo_rub_vat_client_price],",
                  "          9,[plan_promo_kg]/1000,",
                  "          10,[plan_promo_rub_vat_client_price]/1000,",
                  "          11,[plan_promo_rub_vat_client_price]/1000000),",
                  "  REMOVEFILTERS(D00850_plans_versions[plan_version_name])",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_last_create_date",
                "expression": " MAX(f00007_plan_discount_prim[create_date])",
                "formatString": "General Date",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F00007_plan_promo_AOP_general_scale",
                "expression": [
                  "SWITCH(SELECTEDVALUE(D01852_scales[scale_id]),",
                  "1, [f00007_plan_promo_AOP],",
                  "2, [f00007_plan_promo_AOP]/1000,",
                  "3, [f00007_plan_promo_AOP]/1000000)"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F00007_plan_promo_AOP_vs_PROMO_%",
                "expression": "DIVIDE(calculate(F00007_plan_discount_prim[F00007_plan_promo_AOP_general_scale], D00400_discount[disc_promo_type] = \"Промо\"), F00007_plan_discount_prim[F00007_plan_promo_AOP_general_scale])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F00007_plan_promo_AOP_vs_EDLP_%",
                "expression": "DIVIDE(calculate(F00007_plan_discount_prim[F00007_plan_promo_AOP_general_scale], D00400_discount[disc_promo_type] = \"EDLP/EDPP\"), F00007_plan_discount_prim[F00007_plan_promo_AOP_general_scale])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F00007_plan_promo_AOP_vs_BASELINE_%",
                "expression": "DIVIDE(calculate(F00007_plan_discount_prim[F00007_plan_promo_AOP_general_scale], D00400_discount[disc_promo_type] = \"BASELINE\"), F00007_plan_discount_prim[F00007_plan_promo_AOP_general_scale])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_plan_promo_qty_days",
                "expression": "  COUNT([pitch_date])",
                "formatString": "#,0",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_plan_promo_days_fraction",
                "expression": " [f00007_plan_promo_qty_days] / COUNT(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date])",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_plan_promo_vs_plan_SI_%",
                "expression": " DIVIDE(F00007_plan_discount_prim[f00007_plan_promo_general], F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec[plan_general])",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_average_plan_promo_discount_prc",
                "expression": " AVERAGE(F00007_plan_discount_prim[plan_promo_discount_prc_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00%;-#,0.00%;#,0.00%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00007_plan_promo_discount_vs_gl",
                "expression": " [f00007_average_plan_promo_discount_prc] - [F01270_average_gl_discount_%]",
                "formatString": "0.00%;-0.00%;0.00%",
                "isHidden": true
              }
            ],
            "annotations": [

            "measures": [
              {
                "name": "plan_change_kg",
                "expression": "SUM([plan_change_kg_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_kg",
                "expression": "SUM([plan_kg_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "plans_kg_SI",
                "expression": [
                  "",
                  "IF(",
                  "    ISINSCOPE(D00905_doc_production_plan[production_plan_number]),",
                  "",
                  "    -- В строке конкретного документа → обычное значение",
                  "    SUM(F00050_plans_manufacturing_days[plan_kg_]),",
                  "",
                  "    -- В итоге → только последний документ",
                  "    VAR MaxPlanWithData =",
                  "        MAXX(",
                  "            FILTER(",
                  "                F00050_plans_manufacturing_days,",
                  "                NOT ISBLANK(F00050_plans_manufacturing_days[plan_kg_])",
                  "            ),",
                  "            RELATED(D00905_doc_production_plan[production_plan_number])",
                  "        )",
                  "    RETURN",
                  "        CALCULATE(",
                  "            SUM(F00050_plans_manufacturing_days[plan_kg_]),",
                  "            D00905_doc_production_plan[production_plan_number] = MaxPlanWithData",
                  "        )",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              }
            ],
            "annotations": [
              {
                "name": "_TM_ExtProp_QueryDefinition",

              },
              {
                "name": "plan_SI_kg",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE(",
                  "    sum(F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec[plan_kg_]),",
                  "    D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"ОПЕРАТИВНЫЙ\",",
                  "    D00852_statuses_plan[plan_status_name] = \"Утвержден\"",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "displayFolder": "F00500_operational_plan_sellin"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_SI_packs",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE(",

              {
