              {
                "name": "plan_SO_kg",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE(sum(F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec[plan_kg_]),D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"ВТОРИЧНЫЕ ПРОДАЖИ\")",
                  ""
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "displayFolder": "F00500_operational_plan_SellOut"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_SO_packs",
                "expression": "CALCULATE(sum(F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec[plan_packs_]),D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"ВТОРИЧНЫЕ ПРОДАЖИ\")",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "displayFolder": "F00500_operational_plan_SellOut"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_SO_rub_vat_client_price",
                "expression": "CALCULATE(sum(F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec[plan_rub_vat_client_price_]),D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"ВТОРИЧНЫЕ ПРОДАЖИ\")",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "displayFolder": "F00500_operational_plan_SellOut"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_SO_rub_novat_client_price",
                "expression": "CALCULATE(sum(F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec[plan_rub_net_client_price_]),D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"ВТОРИЧНЫЕ ПРОДАЖИ\")",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "displayFolder": "F00500_operational_plan_SellOut"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_discount_rub_vat_client_price",
                "expression": "SUM([plan_discount_rub_vat_client_price_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_discount_rub_novat_client_price",
                "expression": "SUM([plan_discount_rub_novat_client_price_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_demand_SI_kg",
                "expression": [
                  "SUMX(",
                  "    FILTER(",
                  "        FILTER(",
                  "            FILTER(F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec, RELATED(D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name]) = \"DEMAND\"), ",
                  "            RELATED(D00852_statuses_plan[plan_status_name]) = \"Утвержден\"",
                  "        ),",
                  "        RELATED(D00850_plans_versions[plan_version_name]) = F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec[max_plan_version]",
                  "    ),",
                  "    F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec[plan_kg_]",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "displayFolder": "F00500_plan_demand_Sellin"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_demand_SI_packs",
                "expression": [
                  "SUMX(",
                  "    FILTER(",
                  "        FILTER(",
                  "            FILTER(F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec, RELATED(D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name]) = \"DEMAND\"), ",
                  "            RELATED(D00852_statuses_plan[plan_status_name]) = \"Утвержден\"",
                  "        ),",
                  "        RELATED(D00850_plans_versions[plan_version_name]) = F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec[max_plan_version]",
                  "    ),",
                  "    F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec[plan_packs_]",
                  ")",
                  ""
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "displayFolder": "F00500_plan_demand_Sellin"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_demand_SI_rub_vat_client_price",
                "expression": [
                  "SUMX(",
                  "    FILTER(",
                  "        FILTER(",
                  "            FILTER(F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec, RELATED(D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name]) = \"DEMAND\"), ",
                  "            RELATED(D00852_statuses_plan[plan_status_name]) = \"Утвержден\"",
                  "        ),",
                  "        RELATED(D00850_plans_versions[plan_version_name]) = F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec[max_plan_version]",
                  "    ),",
                  "    F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec[plan_rub_vat_client_price_]",
                  ")",
                  ""
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "displayFolder": "F00500_plan_demand_Sellin"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_demand_SI_rub_novat_client_price",
                "expression": [
                  "SUMX(",
                  "    FILTER(",
                  "        FILTER(",
                  "            FILTER(F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec, RELATED(D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name]) = \"DEMAND\"), ",
                  "            RELATED(D00852_statuses_plan[plan_status_name]) = \"Утвержден\"",
                  "        ),",
                  "        RELATED(D00850_plans_versions[plan_version_name]) = F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec[max_plan_version]",
                  "    ),",
                  "    F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec[plan_rub_net_client_price_]",
                  ")",
                  ""
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "displayFolder": "F00500_plan_demand_Sellin"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_budget_kg",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE(",
                  "    sum(F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec[plan_kg_]), ",
                  "    D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"AOP\", ",
                  "    D00852_statuses_plan[plan_status_name] = \"Утвержден\"",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "displayFolder": "F00500_plan_budget"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_budget_packs",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE(",
                  "    sum('F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec'[plan_packs_]), ",
                  "    D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"AOP\",",
                  "    D00852_statuses_plan[plan_status_name] = \"Утвержден\"",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "displayFolder": "F00500_plan_budget"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_budget_rub_vat_client_price",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE(",
                  "    sum(F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec[plan_rub_vat_client_price_]),",
                  "    D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"AOP\",",
                  "    D00852_statuses_plan[plan_status_name] = \"Утвержден\"",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "displayFolder": "F00500_plan_budget"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_budget_rub_net_client_price",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE(",
                  "    sum(F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec[plan_rub_net_client_price_]),",
                  "    D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"AOP\",",
                  "    D00852_statuses_plan[plan_status_name] = \"Утвержден\"",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "displayFolder": "F00500_plan_budget"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_forecast_kg",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE(",
                  "    SUM(F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec[plan_kg_]),",
                  "    D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"ПРОГНОЗ\"",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "displayFolder": "F00500_plan_forecast"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_forecast_packs",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE(",
                  "    sum(F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec[plan_packs_]),",
                  "    D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"ПРОГНОЗ\"",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "displayFolder": "F00500_plan_forecast"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_forecast_rub_vat_client_price",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE(",
                  "    sum(F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec[plan_rub_vat_client_price_]),",
                  "    D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"ПРОГНОЗ\"",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "displayFolder": "F00500_plan_forecast"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_forecast_rub_net_client_price",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE(",
                  "    sum(F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec[plan_rub_net_client_price_]),",
                  "    D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"ПРОГНОЗ\"",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "displayFolder": "F00500_plan_forecast"
              },
              {
                "name": "cumulative_RF_kg",
                "expression": [
                  "VAR CurrentQuarter = MAX(D00001_main_calendar[quarter])",
                  "",
                  "var HasRF2 = CALCULATE(",
                  "            [f00500_plan_kg]",
                  "            ,D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"RF2\"",
                  "            , D00852_statuses_plan[plan_status_name] = \"Утвержден\"",
                  "            ,ALLEXCEPT(D00001_main_calendar,D00001_main_calendar[year])",
                  "        )<>BLANK()",
                  "",
                  "var HasRF3 = CALCULATE(",
                  "            [f00500_plan_kg]",
                  "            ,D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"RF3\"",
                  "            , D00852_statuses_plan[plan_status_name] = \"Утвержден\"",
                  "            ,ALLEXCEPT(D00001_main_calendar,D00001_main_calendar[year])",
                  "        )<>BLANK()",
                  "        ",
                  "VAR PlanTypeForQuarter =",
                  "    SWITCH(",
                  "        TRUE(),",
                  "        CurrentQuarter = \"1 квартал\", \"AOP\",",
                  "        CurrentQuarter = \"2 квартал\", \"RF1\",",
                  "        CurrentQuarter = \"3 квартал\", IF(HasRF2, \"RF2\", \"RF1\"),",
                  "        CurrentQuarter = \"4 квартал\", IF(HasRF3, \"RF3\", IF(HasRF2, \"RF2\", \"RF1\"))",
                  "    ) ",
                  "    ",
                  "RETURN",
                  "CALCULATE(",
                  "    [f00500_plan_kg],",
                  "    D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = PlanTypeForQuarter,",
                  "    D00852_statuses_plan[plan_status_name] = \"Утвержден\"",
                  ")",
                  "",
                  "/*SWITCH(max(D00001_main_calendar[quarter]),",
                  "    \"1 квартал\", CALCULATE([f00500_plan_kg], D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"AOP\", D00852_statuses_plan[plan_status_name] = \"Утвержден\"),",
                  "    \"2 квартал\", CALCULATE([f00500_plan_kg], D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"RF1\", D00852_statuses_plan[plan_status_name] = \"Утвержден\"),",
                  "    \"3 квартал\", CALCULATE([f00500_plan_kg], D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"RF2\", D00852_statuses_plan[plan_status_name] = \"Утвержден\"),",
                  "    CALCULATE([f00500_plan_kg], D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"RF3\", D00852_statuses_plan[plan_status_name] = \"Утвержден\")",
                  ")*/"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "displayFolder": "F00500_cumulative_RF"
              },
              {
                "name": "cumulative_RF_packs",
                "expression": [
                  "SWITCH(max(D00001_main_calendar[quarter]),",
                  "    \"1 квартал\", CALCULATE([plan_packs], D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"AOP\", D00852_statuses_plan[plan_status_name] = \"Утвержден\"),",
                  "    \"2 квартал\", CALCULATE([plan_packs], D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"RF1\", D00852_statuses_plan[plan_status_name] = \"Утвержден\"),",
                  "    \"3 квартал\", CALCULATE([plan_packs], D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"RF2\", D00852_statuses_plan[plan_status_name] = \"Утвержден\"),",
                  "    CALCULATE([plan_packs], D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"RF3\", D00852_statuses_plan[plan_status_name] = \"Утвержден\")",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "displayFolder": "F00500_cumulative_RF"
              },
              {
                "name": "cumulative_RF_rub_vat_client_price",
                "expression": [
                  "SWITCH(max(D00001_main_calendar[quarter]),",
                  "    \"1 квартал\", CALCULATE([plan_rub_vat_client_price], D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"AOP\", D00852_statuses_plan[plan_status_name] = \"Утвержден\"),",
                  "    \"2 квартал\", CALCULATE([plan_rub_vat_client_price], D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"RF1\", D00852_statuses_plan[plan_status_name] = \"Утвержден\"),",
                  "    \"3 квартал\", CALCULATE([plan_rub_vat_client_price], D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"RF2\", D00852_statuses_plan[plan_status_name] = \"Утвержден\"),",
                  "    CALCULATE([plan_rub_vat_client_price], D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"RF3\", D00852_statuses_plan[plan_status_name] = \"Утвержден\")",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "displayFolder": "F00500_cumulative_RF"
              },
              {
                "name": "cumulative_RF_novat_client_price",
                "expression": [
                  "SWITCH(max(D00001_main_calendar[quarter]),",
                  "    \"1 квартал\", CALCULATE([plan_rub_net_client_price], D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"AOP\", D00852_statuses_plan[plan_status_name] = \"Утвержден\"),",
                  "    \"2 квартал\", CALCULATE([plan_rub_net_client_price], D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"RF1\", D00852_statuses_plan[plan_status_name] = \"Утвержден\"),",
                  "    \"3 квартал\", CALCULATE([plan_rub_net_client_price], D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"RF2\", D00852_statuses_plan[plan_status_name] = \"Утвержден\"),",
                  "    CALCULATE([plan_rub_net_client_price], D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"RF3\", D00852_statuses_plan[plan_status_name] = \"Утвержден\")",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "displayFolder": "F00500_cumulative_RF"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_forecast_general",
                "expression": [
                  "SWITCH(SELECTEDVALUE(D00750_units[unit_id]),",
                  "        1, [plan_forecast_current_kg],",
                  "        2, [plan_forecast_current_packs],",
                  "        5, [plan_forecast_current_rub_vat_client_price],",
                  "        6, [plan_forecast_current_rub_net_client_price],",
                  "        9, [plan_forecast_current_kg] / 1000,",
                  "        10, [plan_forecast_current_rub_vat_client_price] / 1000,",
                  "        11, [plan_forecast_current_rub_vat_client_price] / 1000000,",
                  "        12, [plan_forecast_current_packs],",
                  "        13, [plan_forecast_current_packs] / 1000,",
                  "        [plan_forecast_current_rub_vat_client_price]",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "displayFolder": "F00500_plan_forecast"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_forecast_filter",
                "description": "Скрытая мера для фильтрации данных по единицам измерения",
                "expression": [
                  " SWITCH(SELECTEDVALUE(D00750_units[unit_id]),",
                  "        1,[plan_forecast_kg],",
                  "        2,[plan_forecast_packs],",
                  "        5,[plan_forecast_rub_vat_client_price],",
                  "        6,[plan_forecast_rub_net_client_price],",
                  "        9,[plan_forecast_kg] / 1000,",
                  "        10,[plan_forecast_rub_vat_client_price] / 1000,",
                  "        11,[plan_forecast_rub_vat_client_price] / 1000000,",
                  "        12,[plan_forecast_packs],",
                  "        13,[plan_forecast_packs]/1000,",
                  "        [plan_forecast_rub_vat_client_price]",
                  "        )"
                ],
                "isHidden": true,
                "displayFolder": "F00500_plan_forecast"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_forecast_1_week general",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE(",
                  "    [plan_forecast_filter],",
                  "    FILTER(",
                  "        D00850_plans_versions,",
                  "        D00850_plans_versions[plan_version_name] = \"Прогноз 1\"",
                  "    )",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "displayFolder": "F00500_plan_forecast"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_forecast_2_week general",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE(",
                  "    [plan_forecast_filter],",
                  "    FILTER(",
                  "        D00850_plans_versions,",
                  "        D00850_plans_versions[plan_version_name] = \"Прогноз 2\"",
                  "    )",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "displayFolder": "F00500_plan_forecast"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_forecast_3_week general",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE(",
                  "    [plan_forecast_filter],",
                  "    FILTER(",
                  "        D00850_plans_versions,",
                  "        D00850_plans_versions[plan_version_name] = \"Прогноз 3\"",
                  "    )",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "displayFolder": "F00500_plan_forecast"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_forecast_4_week general",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE(",
                  "    [plan_forecast_filter],",
                  "    FILTER(",
                  "        D00850_plans_versions,",
                  "        D00850_plans_versions[plan_version_name] = \"Прогноз 4\"",
                  "    )",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "displayFolder": "F00500_plan_forecast"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_forecast_5_week general",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE(",
                  "    [plan_forecast_filter],",
                  "    FILTER(",
                  "        D00850_plans_versions,",
                  "        D00850_plans_versions[plan_version_name] = \"Прогноз 5\"",
                  "    )",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "displayFolder": "F00500_plan_forecast"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_LKA_Direct_kg",
                "expression": "CALCULATE(sum(F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec[plan_kg_]), D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"LKA Direct\")",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_LKA_Direct_rub_vat_client_price",
                "expression": "CALCULATE(sum(F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec[plan_rub_vat_client_price_]),D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"LKA Direct\")",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_LKA_InDirect_kg",
                "expression": "CALCULATE(sum(F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec[plan_kg_]), D00850_plans_versions[lka_indirect_plan_version_name] = \"LKA_INDIRECT\")",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_LKA_InDirect_rub_vat_client_price",
                "expression": "CALCULATE(sum(F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec[plan_rub_vat_client_price_]), D00850_plans_versions[lka_indirect_plan_version_name] = \"LKA_INDIRECT\")",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_LKA_Direct_general",
                "expression": [
                  "SWITCH(SELECTEDVALUE(D00750_units[unit_id]),",
                  "\t\t1,[plan_LKA_Direct_kg],",
                  "\t\t5,[plan_LKA_Direct_rub_vat_client_price],",
                  "\t\t[plan_LKA_Direct_rub_vat_client_price]",
                  "\t\t)"
                ],
                "formatString": "0.00",
                "displayFolder": "F00500_plan_LKA"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_LKA_InDirect_general",
                "expression": [
                  "\tSWITCH(\tSELECTEDVALUE(D00750_units[unit_id]),",
                  "\t\t1,[plan_LKA_InDirect_kg],",
                  "\t\t5,[plan_LKA_InDirect_rub_vat_client_price],",
                  "\t\t[plan_LKA_InDirect_rub_vat_client_price]",
                  "\t\t)"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "displayFolder": "F00500_plan_LKA"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_LKA_general",
                "expression": [
                  "SWITCH(\tSELECTEDVALUE(D00750_units[unit_id]),",
                  "\t\t1,[plan_LKA_InDirect_kg] + [plan_LKA_Direct_kg],",
                  "\t\t5,[plan_LKA_InDirect_rub_vat_client_price] + [plan_LKA_Direct_rub_vat_client_price],",
                  "\t\t[plan_LKA_InDirect_rub_vat_client_price] + [plan_LKA_Direct_rub_vat_client_price]",
                  "\t\t)"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "displayFolder": "F00500_plan_LKA"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_general",
                "expression": [
                  "SWITCH(SELECTEDVALUE(D00750_units[unit_id]),",
                  "\t\t1,[f00500_plan_kg],",
                  "\t\t2,[plan_packs],",
                  "\t\t3, [plan_box],",
                  "\t\t4, [plan_promo_spend_rub_vat_client_price],",
                  "\t\t5,[plan_rub_vat_client_price],",
                  "\t\t6, [plan_rub_net_client_price],",
                  "\t\t7, [plan_discount_rub_vat_client_price],",
                  "\t\t8, [plan_discount_rub_novat_client_price],",
                  "\t\t9,[f00500_plan_kg]/1000,",
                  "\t\t10,[plan_rub_vat_client_price]/1000,",
                  "\t\t11,[plan_rub_vat_client_price]/1000000,",
                  "\t\t12,[f00500_plan_qty],",
                  "\t\t13,[f00500_plan_qty]/1000,",
                  "\t\t18,[plan_cubic_meters],",
                  "\t\t[plan_rub_vat_client_price]",
                  "\t\t)"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_forecast_LKA_InDirect_kg",
                "expression": "CALCULATE(sum(F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec[plan_kg_]),D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"LKA_INDIRECT_ПРОГНОЗ\")",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_forecast_LKA_InDirect_rub_vat_client_price",
                "expression": "CALCULATE(sum(F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec[plan_rub_vat_client_price_]),D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"LKA_INDIRECT_ПРОГНОЗ\")",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_forecast_LKA_InDirect_general",
                "expression": [
                  "",
                  "var max_plan = CALCULATE(",
                  "                MAX(D00850_plans_versions[plan_version_name]), ",
                  "                FILTER(all(F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec), F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec[plan_kg_SI] in VALUES(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date])),",
                  "                D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"LKA_INDIRECT_ПРОГНОЗ\"",
                  "            )",
                  "           ",
                  "RETURN IF(",
                  "    [plan_forecast_LKA_InDirect_sum_general],",
                  "    COALESCE(CALCULATE([plan_forecast_LKA_InDirect_sum_general], D00850_plans_versions[plan_version_name] = max_plan), 0),",
                  "    BLANK()",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "displayFolder": "F00500_plan_LKA"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_forecast_LKA_1_week InDirect_general",
                "expression": "CALCULATE([plan_forecast_LKA_InDirect_sum_general], D00850_plans_versions[plan_version_name] = \"Прогноз 1\")",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "displayFolder": "F00500_plan_LKA"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_forecast_LKA_2_week InDirect_general",
                "expression": "CALCULATE([plan_forecast_LKA_InDirect_sum_general], D00850_plans_versions[plan_version_name] = \"Прогноз 2\")",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "displayFolder": "F00500_plan_LKA"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_forecast_LKA_3_week InDirect_general",
                "expression": "CALCULATE([plan_forecast_LKA_InDirect_sum_general], D00850_plans_versions[plan_version_name] = \"Прогноз 3\")",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "displayFolder": "F00500_plan_LKA"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_forecast_LKA_4_week InDirect_general",
                "expression": "CALCULATE([plan_forecast_LKA_InDirect_sum_general], D00850_plans_versions[plan_version_name] = \"Прогноз 4\")",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "displayFolder": "F00500_plan_LKA"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_ACB_AOP",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE(",
                  "    'F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec'[plan_ACB], ",
                  "    D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"AOP\",",
                  "    LOWER(F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec[plan_status_name]) in {\"утвержден\", \"утверждён\"}",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_ACB_RF",
                "expression": "CALCULATE([plan_ACB], D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"Накопительный RF\")",
                "formatString": "#,0",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_ACB_Lonch",
                "expression": "CALCULATE('F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec'[plan_ACB], D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"Лонч\")",
                "formatString": "#,0",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_AOP_rub_vat_client_price",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE(",
                  "    sum(F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec[plan_rub_vat_client_price_]),",
                  "    D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"AOP\",",
                  "    LOWER(F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec[plan_status_name]) in {\"утвержден\", \"утверждён\"}",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_AOP_kg",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE(",
                  "    sum(F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec[plan_kg_]), ",
                  "    D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"AOP\", ",
                  "    LOWER(F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec[plan_status_name]) in {\"утвержден\", \"утверждён\"}",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_AOP_packs",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE(",
                  "    sum('F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec'[plan_packs_]), ",
                  "    D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"AOP\",",
                  "    LOWER(F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec[plan_status_name]) in {\"утвержден\", \"утверждён\"}",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "cumulative_RF_qty",
                "expression": [
                  "SWITCH(max(D00001_main_calendar[quarter]),",
                  "    \"1 квартал\", CALCULATE([f00500_plan_qty], D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"AOP\", LOWER(F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec[plan_status_name]) in {\"утвержден\", \"утверждён\"}),",
                  "    \"2 квартал\", CALCULATE([f00500_plan_qty], D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"RF1\", LOWER(F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec[plan_status_name]) in {\"утвержден\", \"утверждён\"}),",
                  "    \"3 квартал\", CALCULATE([f00500_plan_qty], D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"RF2\", LOWER(F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec[plan_status_name]) in {\"утвержден\", \"утверждён\"}),",
                  "    CALCULATE([f00500_plan_qty], D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"RF3\", LOWER(F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec[plan_status_name]) in {\"утвержден\", \"утверждён\"})",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true,
                "displayFolder": "F00500_cumulative_RF"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_SI_qty",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE(",
                  "    sum(F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec[plan_qty_]),",
                  "    D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"ОПЕРАТИВНЫЙ\",",
                  "    D00852_statuses_plan[plan_status_name] = \"Утвержден\"",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true,
                "displayFolder": "F00500_operational_plan_sellin"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00500_plan_kg",
                "expression": "SUM([plan_kg_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00500_plan_RF",
                "expression": [
                  " SWITCH(SELECTEDVALUE(D00750_units[unit_id]),",
                  "                1,  [cumulative_RF_kg],  ",
                  "                2,  [cumulative_RF_packs],",
                  "                5,  [cumulative_RF_rub_vat_client_price],",
                  "                6,  [cumulative_RF_novat_client_price],",
                  "                9,  [cumulative_RF_kg] / 1000,",
                  "                10, [cumulative_RF_rub_vat_client_price]/ 1000,",
                  "                11, [cumulative_RF_rub_vat_client_price] / 1000000,",
                  "                12,[cumulative_RF_qty],",
                  "                13,[cumulative_RF_qty]/1000,",
                  "                [cumulative_RF_rub_vat_client_price]",
                  "            )"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "displayFolder": "F00500_cumulative_RF"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00500_plan_oper_SI",
                "expression": [
                  " SWITCH(SELECTEDVALUE(D00750_units[unit_id]),",
                  "                1, [plan_SI_kg],  ",
                  "                2, [plan_SI_packs],",
                  "                5, [plan_SI_rub_vat_client_price],",
                  "                6, [plan_SI_rub_novat_client_price],",
                  "                9, [plan_SI_kg] / 1000,",
                  "                10, [plan_SI_rub_vat_client_price] / 1000,",
                  "                11, [plan_SI_rub_vat_client_price] / 1000000,",
                  "                12,[plan_SI_qty],",
                  "                13,[plan_SI_qty]/1000,",
                  "                [plan_SI_rub_vat_client_price]",
                  "            )"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "displayFolder": "F00500_operational_plan_sellin"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00500_plan_oper_SO",
                "expression": [
                  " SWITCH(SELECTEDVALUE(D00750_units[unit_id]),",
                  "                1, [plan_SO_kg],  ",
                  "                2, [plan_SO_packs],",
                  "                5, [plan_SO_rub_vat_client_price],",
                  "                6, [plan_SO_rub_novat_client_price],",
                  "                9, [plan_SO_kg] / 1000,",
                  "                10, [plan_SO_rub_vat_client_price] / 1000,",
                  "                11, [plan_SO_rub_vat_client_price] / 1000000,",
                  "                12,[plan_SO_packs],",
                  "                13,[plan_SO_packs]/1000,",
                  "                [plan_SO_rub_vat_client_price]",
                  "            )"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "displayFolder": "F00500_operational_plan_SellOut"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00500_plan_oper_SI+SO",
                "expression": [
                  " SWITCH(SELECTEDVALUE(D00750_units[unit_id]),",
                  "                1,  [plan_SI_kg] + [plan_SO_kg],  ",
                  "                2,  [plan_SI_packs] + [plan_SO_packs],",
                  "                5,  [plan_SI_rub_vat_client_price] + [plan_SO_rub_vat_client_price],",
                  "                6,  [plan_SI_rub_novat_client_price] + [plan_SO_rub_novat_client_price],",
                  "                9,  ([plan_SI_kg] + [plan_SO_kg]) / 1000,",
                  "                10,  ([plan_SI_rub_vat_client_price] + [plan_SO_rub_vat_client_price]) / 1000,",
                  "                11,  ([plan_SI_rub_vat_client_price] + [plan_SO_rub_vat_client_price]) / 100000,",
                  "                12, [plan_SI_qty] + [plan_SO_packs],",
                  "                13, ([plan_SI_qty] + [plan_SO_packs])/1000,",
                  "                 [plan_SI_rub_vat_client_price] + [plan_SO_rub_vat_client_price]",
                  "            )"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00500_plan_qty",
                "expression": "SUM([plan_qty_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00500_plan_AOP",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE(",
                  "    F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec[plan_general], ",
                  "    D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name]=\"AOP\",",
                  "    LOWER(F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec[plan_status_name]) in {\"утвержден\", \"утверждён\"}",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00500_plan_AOP_Ytd",
                "expression": [
                  "TOTALYTD(",
                  "\t[f00500_plan_AOP], ",
                  "\tDATESBETWEEN(",
                  "\t\tD00001_main_calendar[calendar_date], ",
                  "\t\tMIN(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]), ",
                  "\t\tTODAY()",
                  "\t)",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00500_plan_RF_Ytd",
                "expression": [
                  "TOTALYTD(",
                  "\t[f00500_plan_RF], ",
                  "\tDATESBETWEEN(",
                  "\t\tD00001_main_calendar[calendar_date], ",
                  "\t\tMIN(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]), ",
                  "\t\tTODAY()",
                  "\t)",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00500_plan_SI_ytd",
                "expression": [
                  " CALCULATE(",
                  "    [f00500_plan_oper_SI],",
                  "    FILTER(",
                  "      ALL('D00001_main_calendar'),",
                  "      'D00001_main_calendar'[year] = MAX('D00001_main_calendar'[year]) &&",
                  "      'D00001_main_calendar'[month_number] <= MAX('D00001_main_calendar'[month_number])))"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true,
                "displayFolder": "F00500_operational_plan_sellin"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00500_plan_SI_pm_ytd",
                "expression": [
                  " CALCULATE(",
                  "    [f00500_plan_oper_SI],",
                  "    FILTER(",
                  "      ALL('D00001_main_calendar'),",
                  "      'D00001_main_calendar'[year] = IF(",
                  "        MAX('D00001_main_calendar'[month_number]) = 1,",
                  "        MAX('D00001_main_calendar'[year]) - 1,",
                  "        MAX('D00001_main_calendar'[year])) &&",
                  "      'D00001_main_calendar'[month_number] <= IF(",
                  "        MAX('D00001_main_calendar'[month_number]) = 1,",
                  "        12,",
                  "        MAX('D00001_main_calendar'[month_number]) - 1)))"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true,
                "displayFolder": "F00500_operational_plan_sellin"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00500_plan_SI_fy",
                "expression": [
                  " CALCULATE(",
                  "    [f00500_plan_oper_SI],",
                  "    FILTER(",
                  "      ALL('D00001_main_calendar'),",
                  "      'D00001_main_calendar'[year] IN {'D00001_main_calendar'[year]}))"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true,
                "displayFolder": "F00500_operational_plan_sellin"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_sales_vs_oper",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([fact_sale_Direct_InDirect_general]-[f00500_plan_oper_SI+SO],[f00500_plan_oper_SI+SO])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_sale_Direct_InDirect_general_LY",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE(",
                  "    [fact_sale_Direct_InDirect_general], ",
                  "    DATEADD(",
                  "        DATESBETWEEN(",
                  "            'D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date], ",
                  "            MIN('D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date]), ",
                  "            MAX('D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date])",
                  "\t),",
                  "        -1,",
                  "        YEAR",
                  "    )",
                  ")",
                  ""
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_sale_Direct_InDirect_general_2LY",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE(",
                  "    [fact_sale_Direct_InDirect_general], ",
                  "    DATEADD(",
                  "        DATESBETWEEN(",
                  "            'D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date], ",
                  "            MIN('D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date]), ",
                  "            MAX('D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date])",
                  "\t),",
                  "        -2,",
                  "        YEAR",
                  "    )",
                  ")",
                  ""
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_sale_Direct_InDirect_general_3LY",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE(",
                  "    [fact_sale_Direct_InDirect_general], ",
                  "    DATEADD(",
                  "        DATESBETWEEN(",
                  "            'D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date], ",
                  "            MIN('D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date]), ",
                  "            MAX('D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date])",
                  "\t),",
                  "        -3,",
                  "        YEAR",
                  "    )",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_sale_Direct_InDirect_general_Ytd",
                "expression": "TOTALYTD([fact_sale_Direct_InDirect_general], D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_sale_Direct_InDirect_general_LY_Ytd",
                "expression": [
                  "TOTALYTD(",
                  "\t[fact_sale_Direct_InDirect_general_LY], ",
                  "\tDATESBETWEEN(",
                  "\t\tD00001_main_calendar[calendar_date], ",
                  "\t\tMIN(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]), ",
                  "\t\tTODAY()",
                  "\t)",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F_vs_LY_Ytd",
                "expression": "DIVIDE([fact_sale_Direct_InDirect_general_Ytd] - [fact_sale_Direct_InDirect_general_LY_Ytd], [fact_sale_Direct_InDirect_general_LY_Ytd])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F_vs_AOP_Ytd",
                "expression": "DIVIDE([fact_sale_Direct_InDirect_general_Ytd] - [f00500_plan_AOP_Ytd], [f00500_plan_AOP_Ytd])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F_vs_RF_Ytd",
                "expression": "DIVIDE([fact_sale_Direct_InDirect_general_Ytd] - [f00500_plan_RF_Ytd], [f00500_plan_RF_Ytd])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F_vs_AOP",
                "expression": "[fact_sale_Direct_InDirect_general] - [f00500_plan_AOP]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F_vs_AOP_%",
                "expression": "DIVIDE([F_vs_AOP], [f00500_plan_AOP])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F_vs_LY",
                "expression": " [fact_sale_Direct_InDirect_general] - [fact_sale_Direct_InDirect_general_LY]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F_vs_LY_%",
                "expression": "DIVIDE([F_vs_LY], [fact_sale_Direct_InDirect_general_LY])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F_vs_RF",
                "expression": "[fact_sale_Direct_InDirect_general] - [f00500_plan_RF]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F_vs_RF_%",
                "expression": "DIVIDE([F_vs_RF], [f00500_plan_RF])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F_vs_2LY",
                "expression": "[fact_sale_Direct_InDirect_general] - [fact_sale_Direct_InDirect_general_2LY]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F_vs_2LY_%",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([F_vs_2LY], [fact_sale_Direct_InDirect_general_2LY])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F_vs_oper_SI",
                "expression": " [fact_sale_Direct_InDirect_general] - [f00500_plan_oper_SI]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F_vs_oper_SI_%",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([F_vs_oper_SI], [f00500_plan_oper_SI])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00500_plan_forecast_general_qtd",
                "expression": " TOTALQTD([plan_forecast_general], 'D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date])",
                "formatString": "0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00500_plan_si_pm",
                "expression": " CALCULATE([f00500_plan_oper_SI], previousmonth(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00500_plan_si_qtd",
                "expression": " TOTALQTD([f00500_plan_oper_SI], 'D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00500_plan_SO_ly",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE(F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec[f00500_plan_oper_SO],",
                  "DATEADD('D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date], -1, YEAR))"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00500_plan_SO_ytd",
                "expression": [
                  " ",
                  "    TOTALYTD (",
                  "       [f00500_plan_oper_SO],",
                  "        D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00500_plan_SO_qtd",
                "expression": [
                  " ",
                  "    TOTALQTD (",
                  "        [f00500_plan_oper_SO],",
                  "        D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00500_plan_SO_ly_ytd",
                "expression": [
                  " ",
                  "TOTALYTD(",
                  "                  [f00500_plan_oper_SO],",
                  "                  DATESBETWEEN(",
                  "                  D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date],",
                  "                  MIN(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]),",
                  "                  MAX(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date])",
                  "))"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00500_sale_Direct_vs_Indirect_ytd",
                "expression": [
                  " ",
                  "DIVIDE(",
                  "    [f00100_fact_ytd]-[f00003_fact_ytd],",
                  "    [f00003_fact_ytd]",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F00500_plan_SI_t",
                "expression": " [plan_SI_kg]/1000",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true,
                "displayFolder": "F00500_operational_plan_sellin"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_cubic_meters",
                "expression": "SUM([plan_cubic_meters_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00500_last_create_date",
                "expression": " MAX(f00500_plans_sales_prim_sec[create_date])",
                "formatString": "General Date",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_forecast_current_kg",
                "expression": [
                  "var max_plan = CALCULATE(",
                  "    MAX(D00850_plans_versions[plan_version_name]), ",
                  "    FILTER(all(F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec), F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec[plan_kg_SI] in VALUES(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date])),",
                  "    D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"ПРОГНОЗ\"",
                  ")",
                  "",
                  "RETURN IF(",
                  "    [plan_forecast_kg],",
                  "    COALESCE(CALCULATE([plan_forecast_kg], D00850_plans_versions[plan_version_name] = max_plan), 0),",
                  "    BLANK()",
                  ")",
                  ""
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",

              },
              {
                "name": "plan_forecast_current_packs",
                "expression": [
                  "var max_plan = CALCULATE(",
                  "    MAX(D00850_plans_versions[plan_version_name]), ",
                  "    FILTER(all(F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec), F00500_plans_sales_prim_sec[plan_kg_SI] in VALUES(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date])),",
                  "    D00854_types_plans[plan_type_name] = \"ПРОГНОЗ\"",
                  ")",
                  "",
                  "RETURN IF(",
                  "    [plan_forecast_packs],",
                  "    COALESCE(CALCULATE([plan_forecast_packs], D00850_plans_versions[plan_version_name] = max_plan), 0),",
                  "    BLANK()",
                  ")",
                  ""
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",

                "lineageTag": "c4a7c8a5-b78d-4f56-9c1f-2e8778941094"

              },
              {
                "name": "plan_forecast_SO_filter",
                "expression": [
                  "SWITCH(SELECTEDVALUE(D00750_units[unit_id]),",
                  "        1, [plan_forecast_SO_kg],",
                  "        2, [plan_forecast_SO_packs],",
                  "        5, [plan_forecast_SO_rub_vat_client_price],",
                  "        6, [plan_forecast_SO_rub_net_client_price],",
                  "        9, [plan_forecast_SO_kg] / 1000,",
                  "        10, [plan_forecast_SO_rub_vat_client_price] / 1000,",
                  "        11, [plan_forecast_SO_rub_vat_client_price] / 1000000,",
                  "        12, [plan_forecast_SO_packs],",
                  "        13, [plan_forecast_SO_packs] / 1000,",
                  "        [plan_forecast_SO_rub_vat_client_price]",
                  ")"
                ],

            "measures": [
              {
                "name": "tender_packs",
                "expression": "SUM([tender_packs_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "tender_rub_vat_invoice_price",
                "expression": "SUM([tender_rub_vat_invoice_price_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "tender_NS_rub_vat_retail_price",
                "expression": "SUM([tender_NS_rub_vat_retail_price_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "tender_GM_rub_vat_retail_price",
                "expression": "SUM([tender_GM_rub_vat_retail_price_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "tender_GM_%",
                "expression": " [tender_GM_rub_vat_retail_price]/[tender_NS_rub_vat_retail_price]",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_rub_vat_retail_price",
                "expression": "SUM([plan_rub_vat_retail_price_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_qty",
                "expression": "SUM([plan_qty_])",
                "formatString": "#,0"
              },
              {
                "name": "F01020_tender_plan_count",
                "expression": " CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT(F01020_tender[tender_appl_guid]), filter(F01020_tender, F01020_tender[plan_rub_vat_retail_price_] > 0)) + 0",
                "formatString": "#,0",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F01020_tender_plan_count_vs_ask",
                "expression": " DIVIDE(CALCULATE([F01020_tender_plan_count], D00500_tenders[tenter_appl_type] = \"Запрос\"), [F01020_tender_plan_count], 0) + 0",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F01020_tender_plan_count_open",
                "expression": " CALCULATE([F01020_tender_plan_count], D00500_tenders[tender_appl_status] <> \"Не отобран\") + 0",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F01020_tender_plan_count_regi",
                "expression": " CALCULATE([F01020_tender_plan_count], D00500_tenders[tender_appl_status] <> \"Не отобран\", D00500_tenders[tender_appl_status] <> \"Не состоялся\") + 0",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F01020_tender_plan_count_contract",
                "expression": " CALCULATE([F01020_tender_plan_count], D00500_tenders[tender_appl_status] <> \"Не отобран\", D00500_tenders[tender_appl_status] <> \"Не состоялся\", D00500_tenders[tender_appl_status] <> \"Проигран\") + 0",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F01020_tender_plan_count_done",
                "expression": " CALCULATE([F01020_tender_plan_count], D00500_tenders[tender_appl_status] = \"Выполнен\") + 0",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              }
            ],

            "measures": [
              {
                "name": "plan_sale_kg",
                "expression": " TOTALMTD(SUM([plan_kg]),D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_next_month_kg",
                "expression": " CALCULATE(SUM([plan_kg]),NEXTMONTH(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "fill_fact_reserve",
                "expression": "DIVIDE(([fact_sale_kg]+F00055_reserve_stocks[reserved_kg]),[plan_sale_kg])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%"
              }
            ],

                  "query": "SELECT [dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[sku_ep_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[salesplace_parent_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[fact_sale_client_rub_vat_],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[fact_sale_may_rub_vat_],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[fact_sale_qty_],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[fact_sale_kg_],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[client_price_amount_],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[client_price_name],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[sale_date],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[sku_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[client_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[doc_type_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[salesplace_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[address_client_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[territory_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[chain_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[project_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[branch_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[document_sec_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[salesplace_acb_rmp],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[op_staff_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[plu_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[amount_rur_price_client_currency_],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[fact_sale_may_client_price_curr],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[nomenclature_id], [client_sale_qty_], [client_sale_kg_], [order_prim_guid]   FROM [dbo].[F00100_sales_sec]  where sale_date between '2024-01-01' and '2024-12-31'",
                  "dataSource": "SqlServer LTRUS1ERPR01 mart"
                },
                "annotations": [
                  {
                    "name": "QueryEditorSerialization",
                    "value": "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-16\"?><Gemini xmlns=\"QueryEditorSerialization\"><AnnotationContent><![CDATA[<RSQueryCommandText>SELECT [dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[sku_ep_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[salesplace_parent_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[fact_sale_client_rub_vat_],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[fact_sale_may_rub_vat_],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[fact_sale_qty_],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[fact_sale_kg_],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[client_price_amount_],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[client_price_name],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[sale_date],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[sku_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[client_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[doc_type_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[salesplace_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[address_client_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[territory_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[chain_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[project_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[branch_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[document_sec_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[salesplace_acb_rmp],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[op_staff_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[plu_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[amount_rur_price_client_currency_],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[fact_sale_may_client_price_curr],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[nomenclature_id], [client_sale_qty_], [client_sale_kg_], [order_prim_guid]   FROM [dbo].[F00100_sales_sec]  where sale_date between '2024-01-01' and '2024-12-31'</RSQueryCommandText><RSQueryCommandType>Text</RSQueryCommandType><RSQueryDesignState></RSQueryDesignState>]]></AnnotationContent></Gemini>"
                  }

              {
