              {
                "name": "F00100_sales_sec_2022",
                "source": {
                  "type": "query",
                  "query": "SELECT [dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[sku_ep_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[salesplace_parent_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[fact_sale_client_rub_vat_],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[fact_sale_may_rub_vat_],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[fact_sale_qty_],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[fact_sale_kg_],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[client_price_amount_],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[client_price_name],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[sale_date],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[sku_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[client_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[doc_type_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[salesplace_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[address_client_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[territory_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[chain_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[project_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[branch_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[document_sec_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[salesplace_acb_rmp],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[op_staff_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[plu_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[amount_rur_price_client_currency_],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[fact_sale_may_client_price_curr],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[nomenclature_id], [client_sale_qty_], [client_sale_kg_], [order_prim_guid]   FROM [dbo].[F00100_sales_sec] where sale_date between '2022-01-01' and '2022-12-31'",
                  "dataSource": "SqlServer LTRUS1ERPR01 mart"
                },
                "annotations": [
                  {
                    "name": "QueryEditorSerialization",
                    "value": "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-16\"?><Gemini xmlns=\"QueryEditorSerialization\"><AnnotationContent><![CDATA[<RSQueryCommandText>SELECT [dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[sku_ep_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[salesplace_parent_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[fact_sale_client_rub_vat_],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[fact_sale_may_rub_vat_],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[fact_sale_qty_],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[fact_sale_kg_],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[client_price_amount_],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[client_price_name],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[sale_date],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[sku_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[client_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[doc_type_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[salesplace_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[address_client_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[territory_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[chain_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[project_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[branch_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[document_sec_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[salesplace_acb_rmp],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[op_staff_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[plu_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[amount_rur_price_client_currency_],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[fact_sale_may_client_price_curr],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[nomenclature_id], [client_sale_qty_], [client_sale_kg_], [order_prim_guid]   FROM [dbo].[F00100_sales_sec] where sale_date between '2022-01-01' and '2022-12-31'</RSQueryCommandText><RSQueryCommandType>Text</RSQueryCommandType><RSQueryDesignState></RSQueryDesignState>]]></AnnotationContent></Gemini>"
                  }
                ]
              },
              {
                "name": "F00100_sales_sec_2025",
                "source": {
                  "type": "query",
                  "query": "SELECT [dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[sku_ep_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[salesplace_parent_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[fact_sale_client_rub_vat_],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[fact_sale_may_rub_vat_],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[fact_sale_qty_],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[fact_sale_kg_],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[client_price_amount_],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[client_price_name],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[sale_date],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[sku_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[client_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[doc_type_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[salesplace_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[address_client_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[territory_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[chain_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[project_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[branch_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[document_sec_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[salesplace_acb_rmp],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[op_staff_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[plu_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[amount_rur_price_client_currency_],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[fact_sale_may_client_price_curr],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[nomenclature_id], [client_sale_qty_], [client_sale_kg_], [order_prim_guid]  FROM [dbo].[F00100_sales_sec]  where sale_date between '2025-01-01' and '2025-11-30'",
                  "dataSource": "SqlServer LTRUS1ERPR01 mart"
                },
                "annotations": [
                  {
                    "name": "QueryEditorSerialization",
                    "value": "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-16\"?><Gemini xmlns=\"QueryEditorSerialization\"><AnnotationContent><![CDATA[<RSQueryCommandText>SELECT [dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[sku_ep_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[salesplace_parent_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[fact_sale_client_rub_vat_],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[fact_sale_may_rub_vat_],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[fact_sale_qty_],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[fact_sale_kg_],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[client_price_amount_],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[client_price_name],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[sale_date],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[sku_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[client_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[doc_type_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[salesplace_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[address_client_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[territory_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[chain_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[project_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[branch_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[document_sec_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[salesplace_acb_rmp],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[op_staff_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[plu_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[amount_rur_price_client_currency_],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[fact_sale_may_client_price_curr],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[nomenclature_id], [client_sale_qty_], [client_sale_kg_], [order_prim_guid]  FROM [dbo].[F00100_sales_sec]  where sale_date between '2025-01-01' and '2025-11-30'</RSQueryCommandText><RSQueryCommandType>Text</RSQueryCommandType><RSQueryDesignState></RSQueryDesignState>]]></AnnotationContent></Gemini>"
                  }
                ]
              }
            ],
            "measures": [
              {
                "name": "uniq_UP",
                "expression": "CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT(F00100_sales_sec[sku_ep_id]))",
                "formatString": "#,0"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_sale_Direct_InDirect_general",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE(",
                  "    SWITCH(",
                  "        SELECTEDVALUE(D00750_units[unit_id]),",
                  "        1, CALCULATE(F00003_sales_prim[fact_sale_kg], filter(D00551_address_client_source, D00551_address_client_source[address_source] = \"SI_to_SO\")) + ",
                  "            CALCULATE(F00100_sales_sec[f00100_fact_sale_kg], filter(D00551_address_client_source, D00551_address_client_source[address_source] = \"XML\")),",
                  "        2, CALCULATE(F00003_sales_prim[fact_sale_packs], filter(D00551_address_client_source, D00551_address_client_source[address_source] = \"SI_to_SO\")) + ",
                  "            CALCULATE(F00100_sales_sec[f00100_fact_sale_units], filter(D00551_address_client_source, D00551_address_client_source[address_source] = \"XML\")),",
                  "        3, CALCULATE(F00003_sales_prim[fact_sale_box], filter(D00551_address_client_source, D00551_address_client_source[address_source] = \"SI_to_SO\")),",
                  "        4, CALCULATE(F00006_discount_prim[fact_promo_rub_vat_income_price], filter(D00551_address_client_source, D00551_address_client_source[address_source] = \"SI_to_SO\")) + ",
                  "            CALCULATE(F00103_discount_sec[f00103_fact_promo_rub_vat_client_price], filter(D00551_address_client_source, D00551_address_client_source[address_source] = \"XML\")),",
                  "        5, CALCULATE(F00003_sales_prim[fact_sale_rub_vat_client_price], filter(D00551_address_client_source, D00551_address_client_source[address_source] = \"SI_to_SO\")) + ",
                  "            CALCULATE(F00100_sales_sec[f00100_fact_sale_rub_vat_client_price], filter(D00551_address_client_source, D00551_address_client_source[address_source] = \"XML\")),",
                  "        6, CALCULATE(F00003_sales_prim[fact_sale_rub_novat_client_price], filter(D00551_address_client_source, D00551_address_client_source[address_source] = \"SI_to_SO\")),",
                  "        7, CALCULATE(F00006_discount_prim[fact_promo_rub_vat_income_price], filter(D00551_address_client_source, D00551_address_client_source[address_source] = \"SI_to_SO\")) + ",
                  "            CALCULATE(F00103_discount_sec[f00103_fact_promo_rub_vat_client_price], filter(D00551_address_client_source, D00551_address_client_source[address_source] = \"XML\")),",
                  "        9, CALCULATE(F00003_sales_prim[fact_sale_tons], filter(D00551_address_client_source, D00551_address_client_source[address_source] = \"SI_to_SO\")) + ",
                  "            CALCULATE(F00100_sales_sec[f00100_fact_sale_kg] / 1000, filter(D00551_address_client_source, D00551_address_client_source[address_source] = \"XML\")),",
                  "        10, (CALCULATE(F00003_sales_prim[fact_sale_rub_vat_client_price], filter(D00551_address_client_source, D00551_address_client_source[address_source] = \"SI_to_SO\")) + ",
                  "            CALCULATE(F00100_sales_sec[f00100_fact_sale_rub_vat_client_price], filter(D00551_address_client_source, D00551_address_client_source[address_source] = \"XML\"))) / 1000,",
                  "        11, (CALCULATE(F00003_sales_prim[fact_sale_rub_vat_client_price], filter(D00551_address_client_source, D00551_address_client_source[address_source] = \"SI_to_SO\")) + ",
                  "            CALCULATE(F00100_sales_sec[f00100_fact_sale_rub_vat_client_price], filter(D00551_address_client_source, D00551_address_client_source[address_source] = \"XML\"))) / 1000000,",
                  "        12, CALCULATE(F00003_sales_prim[fact_sale_qty], filter(D00551_address_client_source, D00551_address_client_source[address_source] = \"SI_to_SO\")) + ",
                  "            CALCULATE(F00100_sales_sec[f00100_fact_sale_units], filter(D00551_address_client_source, D00551_address_client_source[address_source] = \"XML\")),",
                  "        13, (CALCULATE(F00003_sales_prim[fact_sale_qty], filter(D00551_address_client_source, D00551_address_client_source[address_source] = \"SI_to_SO\")) + ",
                  "            CALCULATE(F00100_sales_sec[f00100_fact_sale_units], filter(D00551_address_client_source, D00551_address_client_source[address_source] = \"XML\"))) / 1000,",
                  "        18, [f00100_fact_sale_rub_vat_may_price],",
                  "        CALCULATE(F00003_sales_prim[fact_sale_rub_vat_client_price], filter(D00551_address_client_source, D00551_address_client_source[address_source] = \"SI_to_SO\")) + ",
                  "            CALCULATE(F00100_sales_sec[f00100_fact_sale_rub_vat_client_price], filter(D00551_address_client_source, D00551_address_client_source[address_source] = \"XML\"))",
                  "    ),",
                  "    USERELATIONSHIP(F00003_sales_prim[address_guid], D00551_address_client_source[address_client_guid]),",
                  "    USERELATIONSHIP(F00003_sales_prim[fact_sale_TO_dt],D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date])",
                  "    )"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "uniq_UP_on_fact_acb_parent",
                "expression": [
                  "AVERAGEX(",
                  "  SUMMARIZE(",
                  "    'F00100_sales_sec',",
                  "    D00700_salesplace[salesplace_parent_code],",
                  "    \"DistinctCount\", DISTINCTCOUNT('F00100_sales_sec'[sku_ep_id])",
                  "  ),",
                  "  [DistinctCount]",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_acb_LY",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE( ",
                  "    [f00100_fact_acb], ",
                  "    DATEADD(",
                  "        DATESBETWEEN(",
                  "            'D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date], ",
                  "            MIN('D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date]), ",
                  "            MAX('D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date])",
                  "\t),",
                  "        -1,",
                  "        YEAR",
                  "    )",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F_vs_ACB_Lonch",
                "expression": "[f00100_fact_acb] - [plan_ACB_Lonch]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F_vs_ACB_AOP",
                "expression": "[f00100_fact_acb] - [plan_ACB_AOP]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F_vs_ACB_LY",
                "expression": "[f00100_fact_acb] - [fact_acb_LY]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F_vs_ACB_Lonch_%",
                "expression": "DIVIDE([F_vs_ACB_Lonch], [plan_ACB_Lonch], 1)",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F_vs_ACB_AOP_%",
                "expression": "DIVIDE([F_vs_ACB_AOP], [plan_ACB_AOP], 1)",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F_vs_ACB_LY_%",
                "expression": "DIVIDE([F_vs_ACB_LY], [fact_acb_LY], 1)",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F_vs_ACB_RF_%",
                "expression": "DIVIDE([F_vs_ACB_RF], [plan_ACB_RF], 1)",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F_vs_ACB_RF",
                "expression": "[f00100_fact_acb] - [plan_ACB_RF]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00100_fact_sale_rub_vat_client_price",
                "expression": "SUM([fact_sale_client_rub_vat_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00100_fact_sale_kg",
                "expression": "SUM([fact_sale_kg_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00100_fact_sale_units",
                "expression": "SUM([fact_sale_qty_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00100_fact_acb",
                "expression": "DISTINCTCOUNT([salesplace_id])",
                "formatString": "#,0"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00100_fact_acb_parent",
                "expression": "CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT(F00100_sales_sec[salesplace_acb_rmp]))",
                "formatString": "#,0"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00100_fact_sale_SO",
                "expression": [
                  " SWITCH(SELECTEDVALUE(D00750_units[unit_id]),",
                  "                1, [f00100_fact_sale_kg],  ",
                  "                5, [f00100_fact_sale_rub_vat_client_price],",
                  "                9, [f00100_fact_sale_kg] / 1000,",
                  "                10, [f00100_fact_sale_rub_vat_client_price] / 1000,",
                  "                11, [f00100_fact_sale_rub_vat_client_price] / 1000000,",
                  "                12, [f00100_fact_sale_units],",
                  "                13, [f00100_fact_sale_units]/1000,",
                  "                17, [f00100_fact_sale_rub_vat_may_price],",
                  "                19, [f00100_fact_sale_rub_vat_may_price]/1000000,",
                  "\tBLANK()",
                  "            ) ",
                  ""
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00100_fact_sale_SO_LY",
                "expression": [
                  " CALCULATE(",
                  "        [f00100_fact_sale_SO],",
                  "        DATEADD(",
                  "            DATESBETWEEN(",
                  "                'D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date],",
                  "                MIN('D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date]),",
                  "                MAX('D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date])",
                  "            ),",
                  "            -1,",
                  "            YEAR",
                  "        )",
                  "    )"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00100_all_measures",
                "expression": [
                  "",
                  "var scale=SWITCH(SELECTEDVALUE('D01852_scales'[scale_id]),",
                  "            2, 1000,",
                  "            3, 1000000,",
                  "            1)",
                  "            var res=SWITCH(SELECTEDVALUE('D01850_metrics'[metric_id]),",
                  "                1, [fact_sale_Direct_InDirect_general_3LY]  / scale,",
                  "                2, [fact_sale_Direct_InDirect_general_2LY]  / scale,",
                  "                3, [fact_sale_Direct_InDirect_general_LY]  / scale,",
                  "                6, [f00500_plan_AOP]  / scale,",
                  "                7, [f00500_plan_RF]  / scale,",
                  "                8, [fact_sale_Direct_InDirect_general]  / scale,",
                  "                10, [f00500_plan_oper_SI]  / scale,",
                  "                11, [F_vs_LY]  / scale,",
                  "                12, FORMAT([F_vs_LY_%], \"0%\"),",
                  "                13, [F_vs_AOP]  / scale,",
                  "                14, FORMAT([F_vs_AOP_%], \"0%\"),",
                  "                15, [F_vs_RF]  / scale,",
                  "                16, FORMAT([F_vs_RF_%], \"0%\"),",
                  "                17, [F_vs_oper_SI]  / scale,",
                  "                18, FORMAT([F_vs_oper_SI_%], \"0%\"),",
                  "                19, [F_vs_2LY]  / scale,",
                  "                20, FORMAT([F_vs_2LY_%], \"0%\"),",
                  "\t32, [fact_acb_LY],",
                  "                33, [plan_ACB_AOP] / scale,",
                  "                34, [plan_ACB_RF] / scale,",
                  "                35, [f00100_fact_acb]  / scale,",
                  "                36, [plan_ACB_Lonch]  / scale,",
                  "                37, [F_vs_ACB_AOP]  / scale,",
                  "                38, FORMAT([F_vs_ACB_AOP_%], \"0%\"),",
                  "                39, [F_vs_ACB_RF]  / scale,",
                  "                40, FORMAT([F_vs_ACB_RF_%], \"0%\"),",
                  "                41, [F_vs_ACB_LY]  / scale,",
                  "                42, FORMAT([F_vs_ACB_LY_%], \"0%\"),",
                  "                43, [F_vs_ACB_Lonch]  / scale,",
                  "                44, FORMAT([F_vs_ACB_Lonch_%], \"0%\"),",
                  "                [fact_sale_Direct_InDirect_general]  / scale",
                  "                )",
                  "            return res"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00100_comparison",
                "expression": [
                  "SWITCH(SELECTEDVALUE(D01851_comparisons[comparison_id]),",
                  "\t1, [F_vs_LY_%],    ",
                  "\t2, [F_vs_LY_Ytd],",
                  "    \t3, [F_vs_AOP_%],",
                  "    \t4, [F_vs_AOP_Ytd],",
                  "\t5, [F_vs_RF_%],",
                  "    \t6, [F_vs_RF_Ytd]",
                  "\t)"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00100_fact_ytd",
                "expression": " TOTALYTD([f00100_fact_sale_SO], D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00100_fact_qtd",
                "expression": " TOTALQTD([f00100_fact_sale_SO], D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00100_vs_LY_%",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([f00100_fact_sale_SO]-[f00100_fact_sale_SO_LY], [f00100_fact_sale_SO_LY])",
                "formatString": "0.0%;-0.0%;0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00100_vs_ytd_%",
                "expression": [
                  " ",
                  "    DIVIDE(",
                  "        [f00100_fact_ytd] - [f00100_ly_ytd],",
                  "        [f00100_ly_ytd]",
                  "    )"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00100_fact_vs_oper_SO_%",
                "expression": "DIVIDE([f00100_fact_sale_SO], [f00500_plan_oper_SO])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00100_fact_vs_oper_SO_ytd_%",
                "expression": " DIVIDE ([f00100_fact_ytd], [f00500_plan_SO_ytd])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00100_fact_vs_oper_SO_ly_%",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([f00100_fact_sale_SO_LY], [f00500_plan_SO_ly])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00100_fact_vs_oper_SO_qtd_%",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([f00100_fact_qtd], [f00500_plan_SO_qtd])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00100_ly_ytd",
                "expression": [
                  " TOTALYTD(",
                  "   [f00100_fact_sale_SO_LY],",
                  "    DATESBETWEEN(",
                  "                  D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date],",
                  "                  MIN(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]),",
                  "                  MAX(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date])",
                  "    )",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00100_vs_oper",
                "expression": " [f00100_fact_sale_SO] - [f00500_plan_oper_SO]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00100_vs_YTD_LY_%",
                "expression": [
                  " ",
                  "    DIVIDE(",
                  "        [f00100_fact_ytd] - [f00100_ly_ytd],",
                  "        [f00100_ly_ytd]",
                  "    )"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F00100_Fact_SKU_Buying",
                "expression": " AVERAGEX(SUMMARIZE(F00100_sales_sec, F00100_sales_sec[salesplace_id], \"buying\", DISTINCTCOUNT(F00100_sales_sec[sku_ep_id])), [buying])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F00100_Sales_Rub_VAT_Client_Price_Units",
                "expression": [
                  " ",
                  "    SWITCH(",
                  "        SELECTEDVALUE('D01852_scales'[scale_name]),",
                  "        \"ед\", [f00100_fact_sale_rub_vat_client_price],",
                  "        \"тыс\", [f00100_fact_sale_rub_vat_client_price] / 1000,",
                  "        \"млн\", [f00100_fact_sale_rub_vat_client_price] / 1000000",
                  "    )"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F00100_Sales_Rub_VAT_Client_Price_Units_LY",
                "expression": [
                  " ",
                  "    CALCULATE([F00100_Sales_Rub_VAT_Client_Price_Units], DATEADD(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date], -1, YEAR))"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F00100_acb_ytd",
                "expression": " TOTALYTD([f00100_fact_acb], D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F00100_acb_ytd_ly",
                "expression": " TOTALYTD([fact_acb_LY], D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F00100_vs_acb_ytd_ly_%",
                "expression": [
                  " ",
                  "    DIVIDE(",
                  "        [F00100_acb_ytd] - [F00100_acb_ytd_ly],",
                  "        [F00100_acb_ytd_ly]",
                  "    )"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "uniq_UP_on_fact_acb_parent_ly",
                "expression": " CALCULATE([uniq_UP_on_fact_acb_parent], DATEADD(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date], -1, YEAR))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "uniq_UP_on_fact_acb_parent_vs_ly_%",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([uniq_UP_on_fact_acb_parent] - [uniq_UP_on_fact_acb_parent_ly], [uniq_UP_on_fact_acb_parent_ly],1)",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00100_fact_sale_rub_vat_may_price",
                "expression": "SUM([fact_sale_may_rub_vat_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "client_price_amount",
                "expression": "AVERAGE([client_price_amount_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00100_amount_rur_price_client_currency",
                "expression": "SUM([amount_rur_price_client_currency_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_sale_may_client_price_curr",
                "expression": "SUM([fact_sale_may_client_price_curr_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "F00100_Avg_SKU_per_RMP_Month",
                "expression": [
                  "",
                  ""
                ],
                "isHidden": true,
                "lineageTag": "8a10a56f-9843-44b2-b7df-b4c69d16e999"
              },
              {
                "name": "F00100_Avg_SKU_per_RMP",
                "expression": [
                  "",
                  "AVERAGEX (",
                  "    VALUES ( 'D00001_main_calendar'[year_month] ),",
                  "",
                  "    VAR AvgPerRMP =",
                  "        AVERAGEX (",
                  "            VALUES ( D00700_salesplace[salesplace_parent_code] ),",
                  "",
                  "            VAR SKU_cnt =",
                  "                CALCULATE (",
                  "                    DISTINCTCOUNT ( F00100_sales_sec[nomenclature_id] ),",
                  "                    F00100_sales_sec[fact_sale_qty_] > 0",
                  "                )",
                  "",
                  "            VAR SalesQty =",
                  "                CALCULATE (",
                  "                    SUM ( F00100_sales_sec[fact_sale_qty_] )",
                  "                )",
                  "",
                  "            RETURN",
                  "                IF ( SalesQty > 0 && SKU_cnt > 0, SKU_cnt )",
                  "        )",
                  "",
                  "    RETURN",
                  "        AvgPerRMP",
                  ")",
                  ""
                ],
                "lineageTag": "515f30f7-e2e7-4063-b349-4e629bce51c9"
              },
              {
                "name": "F00100_acb_rmp_new",
                "expression": [
                  "SUMX (",
                  "    SUMMARIZE (",
                  "        'D00001_main_calendar',",
                  "        'D00001_main_calendar'[year_month],",
                  "        \"MonthStart\",",
                  "            DATE (",
                  "                YEAR ( MAX ( 'D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date] ) ),",
                  "                MONTH ( MAX ( 'D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date] ) ),",
                  "                1",
                  "            ),",
                  "        \"MonthEnd\",",
                  "            EOMONTH (",
                  "                DATE (",
                  "                    YEAR ( MAX ( 'D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date] ) ),",
                  "                    MONTH ( MAX ( 'D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date] ) ),",
                  "                    1",
                  "                ),",
                  "                0",
                  "            )",
                  "    ),",
                  "",
                  "    VAR MonthStart = [MonthStart]",
                  "    VAR MonthEnd   = [MonthEnd]",
                  "",
                  "    VAR PrevStart =",
                  "        EDATE ( MonthStart, -6 )",
                  "",
                  "    VAR PrevEnd =",
                  "        MonthStart - 1",
                  "",
                  "    VAR CurrentMonthSales =",
                  "        CALCULATETABLE (",
                  "            VALUES ( F00100_sales_sec[salesplace_id] ),",
                  "            F00100_sales_sec[fact_sale_kg_] > 0,",
                  "            DATESBETWEEN (",
                  "                'D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date],",
                  "                MonthStart,",
                  "                MonthEnd",
                  "            )",
                  "        )",
                  "",
                  "    VAR Prev6MonthSales =",
                  "        CALCULATETABLE (",
                  "            VALUES ( F00100_sales_sec[salesplace_id] ),",
                  "            F00100_sales_sec[fact_sale_kg_] > 0,",
                  "            DATESBETWEEN (",
                  "                'D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date],",
                  "                PrevStart,",
                  "                PrevEnd",
                  "            )",
                  "        )",
                  "",
                  "    RETURN",
                  "        COUNTROWS (",
                  "            EXCEPT ( CurrentMonthSales, Prev6MonthSales )",
                  "        )",
                  "",
                  ")"
                ],
                "lineageTag": "f2a58f0b-1be7-480d-9b75-cbfe81605093"
              },
              {
                "name": "F00100_Avg_EP_per_RMP_Month",
                "expression": [
                  "",
                  ""
                ],
                "isHidden": true,
                "lineageTag": "e5958863-1f5f-4e9a-a5d3-f28646a88ad3"
              },
              {
                "name": "F00100_Avg_EP_per_RMP",
                "expression": [
                  "",
                  "AVERAGEX (",
                  "    VALUES ( 'D00001_main_calendar'[year_month] ),",
                  "",
                  "    VAR AvgPerRMP =",
                  "        AVERAGEX (",
                  "            VALUES ( D00700_salesplace[salesplace_parent_code] ),",
                  "",
                  "            VAR EP_cnt =",
                  "                CALCULATE (",
                  "                    DISTINCTCOUNT ( F00100_sales_sec[sku_ep_id] ),",
                  "                    F00100_sales_sec[fact_sale_qty_] > 0",
                  "                )",
                  "",
                  "            VAR SalesQty =",
                  "                CALCULATE (",
                  "                    SUM ( F00100_sales_sec[fact_sale_qty_] )",
                  "                )",
                  "",
                  "            RETURN",
                  "                IF ( SalesQty > 0 && EP_cnt > 0, EP_cnt )",
                  "        )",
                  "",
                  "    RETURN",
                  "        AvgPerRMP",
                  ")",
                  ""
                ],
                "lineageTag": "e8b551fe-b101-4fe3-be87-67bfa92a4d60"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00100_fact_client_sale_qty",
                "expression": "SUM([client_sale_qty_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00100_freq_sales_fact",
                "expression": [
                  "VAR SelectedDate =",
                  "    MAX( 'D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date] )",
                  "VAR FirstDayOfSelectedMonth =",
                  "    DATE( YEAR( SelectedDate ), MONTH( SelectedDate ), 1 )",
                  "VAR FirstDayOfPeriod =",
                  "    EDATE( FirstDayOfSelectedMonth, -3 )",
                  "VAR LastDayOfPeriod =",
                  "    FirstDayOfSelectedMonth - 1",
                  "VAR DatesInPeriod_selected =",
                  "    DATESBETWEEN( 'D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date], FirstDayOfPeriod, LastDayOfPeriod )",
                  "VAR DatesWithSales = ",
                  "    FILTER(",
                  "        DatesInPeriod_selected,",
                  "        [f00100_fact_sale_kg] > 0",
                  "    )",
                  "RETURN",
                  "    COUNTROWS( DatesWithSales ) / 3",
                  "/*",
                  "    MAX( 'D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date] ) -- берет максимальную выбранную дату в срезе",
                  "VAR FirstDayOfSelectedMonth =",
                  "    DATE( YEAR( SelectedDate ), MONTH( SelectedDate ), 1 )",
                  "VAR FirstDayOfPeriod =",
                  "    EDATE( FirstDayOfSelectedMonth, -3 )",
                  "VAR LastDayOfPeriod =",
                  "    FirstDayOfSelectedMonth - 1",
                  "VAR DatesInPeriod_selected =",
                  "    DATESBETWEEN( 'D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date], FirstDayOfPeriod, LastDayOfPeriod )",
                  "RETURN",
                  "    SUMX(",
                  "        DatesInPeriod_selected,",
                  "        IF( [f00100_fact_sale_kg] > 0, 1, 0 )",
                  "    )/3",
                  "*/    "
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00100_fact_client_sale_kg",
                "expression": "SUM([client_sale_kg_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              }
            ],
            "annotations": [
              {
                "name": "_TM_ExtProp_QueryDefinition",
                "value": "SELECT [dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[sku_ep_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[salesplace_parent_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[fact_sale_client_rub_vat_],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[fact_sale_may_rub_vat_],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[fact_sale_qty_],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[fact_sale_kg_],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[client_price_amount_],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[client_price_name],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[sale_date],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[sku_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[client_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[doc_type_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[salesplace_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[address_client_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[territory_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[chain_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[project_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[branch_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[document_sec_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[salesplace_acb_rmp],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[op_staff_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[plu_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[amount_rur_price_client_currency_],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[fact_sale_may_client_price_curr],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[nomenclature_id], [client_sale_qty_], [client_sale_kg_], [order_prim_guid]   FROM [dbo].[F00100_sales_sec]  where sale_date >= '2025-12-01'"
              },
              {
                "name": "_TM_ExtProp_DbTableName",
                "value": "F00100_sales_sec"
              },
              {
                "name": "_TM_ExtProp_DbSchemaName",
                "value": "dbo"
              },
              {
                "name": "QueryEditorSerialization",
                "value": "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-16\"?><Gemini xmlns=\"QueryEditorSerialization\"><AnnotationContent><![CDATA[<RSQueryCommandText>SELECT [dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[sku_ep_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[salesplace_parent_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[fact_sale_client_rub_vat_],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[fact_sale_may_rub_vat_],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[fact_sale_qty_],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[fact_sale_kg_],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[client_price_amount_],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[client_price_name],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[sale_date],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[sku_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[client_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[doc_type_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[salesplace_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[address_client_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[territory_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[chain_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[project_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[branch_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[document_sec_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[salesplace_acb_rmp],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[op_staff_id],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[plu_guid],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[amount_rur_price_client_currency_],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[fact_sale_may_client_price_curr],[dbo].[F00100_sales_sec].[nomenclature_id], [client_sale_qty_], [client_sale_kg_], [order_prim_guid]   FROM [dbo].[F00100_sales_sec]  where sale_date >= '2025-12-01'</RSQueryCommandText><RSQueryCommandType>Text</RSQueryCommandType><RSQueryDesignState></RSQueryDesignState>]]></AnnotationContent></Gemini>"
              }
            ]
          },
          {

            "partitions": [
              {
                "name": "F00101_stock_client_current",

                  {
                    "name": "TabularEditor_TableSchema",
                    "value": "{\"Name\":\"F00101_stock_client\",\"Schema\":\"dbo\",\"Database\":\"mart\",\"IncludedColumns\":[\"stock_date\",\"sku_guid\",\"client_guid\",\"address_client_guid\",\"project_guid\",\"so_stock_rub_vat_\",\"so_stock_kg_\",\"so_stock_qty_\"],\"SelectAll\":true}"
                  }
                ]
              }
            ],
            "measures": [
              {
                "name": "so_stock_kg",
                "expression": "CALCULATE(SUM([so_stock_kg_]),LASTDATE(F00101_stock_client[stock_date]))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "so_stock_packs",
                "expression": "CALCULATE(SUM([so_stock_qty_]),LASTDATE(F00101_stock_client[stock_date]))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "so_stock_rub_vat_client_price",
                "expression": "CALCULATE(SUM([so_stock_rub_vat_]),LASTDATE(F00101_stock_client[stock_date]))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "so_stock_general",
                "expression": [
                  " SWITCH(    SELECTEDVALUE(D00750_units[unit_id]),",
                  "        1,[so_stock_kg],",
                  "        2,[so_stock_packs],",
                  "        5,[so_stock_rub_vat_client_price],",
                  "        9,[so_stock_kg]/1000,",
                  "        10,[so_stock_rub_vat_client_price]/1000,",
                  "        11,[so_stock_rub_vat_client_price]/1000000,",
                  "        12,[so_stock_packs],",
                  "        17, [so_stock_baza_prices_rub_vat],",
                  "        18, [so_stock_baza_prices_rub_vat],",
                  "       BLANK()",
                  "        )"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00101_so_stock_ly",
                "expression": " CALCULATE([so_stock_general], DATEADD('D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date], -1, YEAR))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00101_so_stock_work_day",
                "expression": [
                  "/* ",
                  "DIVIDE(",
                  "    [so_stock_general], ",
                  "    DIVIDE(",
                  "        [f00100_fact_sale_SO],",
                  "        [F01030_number_works_days]",
                  "    )",
                  ")",
                  "*/",
                  "",
                  "DIVIDE([so_stock_general],[f00100_fact_sale_SO])*[F01030_number_works_days]"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00101_so_stock_work_day_ly",
                "expression": " CALCULATE([f00101_so_stock_work_day], DATEADD('D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date], -1, YEAR))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "so_stock_baza_prices_rub_vat",
                "expression": "CALCULATE(SUM([so_stock_baza_prices_rub_vat_]),LASTDATE(F00101_stock_client[stock_date]))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "so_stock_packs copy",
                "expression": "CALCULATE(SUM([client_stock_qty_]),LASTDATE(F00101_stock_client[stock_date]))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "client_stock_kg",
                "expression": "CALCULATE(SUM([client_stock_kg_]),LASTDATE(F00101_stock_client[stock_date]))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              }
            ],
            "annotations": [
              {

            "measures": [
              {
                "name": "fact_manufacturing_kg",
                "expression": " TOTALMTD(SUM(F00051_manufacturing_products_months[fact_kg_]),D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_implementation_manufacturing_%",
                "expression": " DIVIDE(F00051_manufacturing_products_months[fact_manufacturing_kg],F00052_plans_manufacturing_months[f00052_plan_kg])",
                "formatString": "0.0%;-0.0%;0.0%"
              }
            ],

            "measures": [
              {
                "name": "fact_movement_on_date_kg",
                "expression": "CALCULATE (SUM (F00053_movements_products[fact_movement_kg_]),LASTNONBLANK (F00053_movements_products[movements_date],max(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]) ))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_movement_kg",
                "expression": [
                  " TOTALMTD(SUM(F00053_movements_products[fact_movement_kg_]), D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date])",
                  " "
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_movement_with_order_kg",
                "expression": " [fact_movement_kg] + [fact_order_prim_kg]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_movement_with_order_planned_%",
                "expression": "DIVIDE( ([fact_movement_kg] + [fact_order_prim_kg]), [plan_sale_kg])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%"
              }
            ],
            "annotations": [
              {
                "name": "_TM_ExtProp_QueryDefinition",

            "measures": [
              {
                "name": "stock_materials_kg",
                "expression": " CALCULATE (SUM([stock_materials_kg_]),FIRSTNONBLANK (F00350_stock_materials[stock_date],SUM (F00350_stock_materials[stock_materials_kg_]) ))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "stock_materials_kg_rub_vat_cost",
                "expression": " CALCULATE (SUM([stock_materials_kg_rub_vat_cost_]),LASTNONBLANK (F00350_stock_materials[stock_date],SUM (F00350_stock_materials[stock_materials_kg_rub_vat_cost_]) ))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_stock_materials_kg",
                "expression": " F00350_stock_materials[stock_materials_kg] - [plan_consumption_materials_qty] + [fact_supplies_materials_kg]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "OSG_materials_%",
                "expression": [
                  " if(DATEDIFF(TODAY(),max(F00350_stock_materials[expiration_date]),DAY) <> 0",
                  "\t,1 - DATEDIFF(max(F00350_stock_materials[manuf_date]),TODAY(), DAY)/DATEDIFF(TODAY(),max(F00350_stock_materials[expiration_date]),DAY)",
                  "\t,BLANK())"
                ],
                "formatString": "0.0%;-0.0%;0.0%"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_materials_expiration_date_day",
                "expression": " DATEDIFF(max(F00350_stock_materials[manuf_date]),max(F00350_stock_materials[expiration_date]),day)",
                "formatString": "#,0"
              },
              {
                "name": "stock_materials_qty",
                "expression": [
                  " SUM('F00357_stock_materials_begmonth'[materials_beginmonth_qty_])",
                  " "
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              }
            ],
            "annotations": [
              {
                "name": "_TM_ExtProp_QueryDefinition",
                "value": " \t\t\t\tSELECT [dbo].[F00350_stock_materials].*   FROM [dbo].[F00350_stock_materials] "

            ],
            "measures": [
              {
                "name": "fact_add_consumption_materials_kg",
                "expression": "SUM([fact_add_consumption_materials_kg_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "provision_%",
                "expression": " DIVIDE( F00350_stock_materials[stock_materials_kg], [plan_consumption_materials_qty])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%"
              },
              {
                "name": "provision_with_income_%",
                "expression": "  DIVIDE((F00350_stock_materials[stock_materials_kg] + [fact_supplies_materials_kg]), [plan_consumption_materials_qty])",
                "formatString": "0.0%;-0.0%;0.0%"
              },
              {
                "name": "pure_need",
                "expression": [
                  "",
                  "\t IF(ISFILTERED(D00001_main_calendar[month_name]),",
                  "\t\tif(max(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]) <= EOMONTH(TODAY(),0),",
                  "\t\t\t(CALCULATE(F00350_stock_materials[stock_materials_kg], DAY(F00350_stock_materials[stock_date]) = 1)",
                  "\t\t\t- F00351_consumption_materials[plan_consumption_materials_qty]",
                  "\t\t\t+ F00353_orders_materials[fact_order_materials_kg]",
                  "\t\t\t+ CALCULATE(F00354_insurance_stock_materials[fact_ insurance_kg], NEXTMONTH(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]))),",
                  "\t\t\t",
                  "\t\t\t(CALCULATE(F00350_stock_materials[plan_stock_materials_kg], DAY(F00350_stock_materials[stock_date]) = 1)",
                  "\t\t\t- F00351_consumption_materials[plan_consumption_materials_qty]",
                  "\t\t\t+ F00353_orders_materials[fact_order_materials_kg]",
                  "\t\t\t+ CALCULATE(F00354_insurance_stock_materials[fact_ insurance_kg], NEXTMONTH(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date])))",
                  "\t\t),",
                  "\tBLANK()",
                  "\t)"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_consumption_materials_qty",
                "expression": "SUM([plan_consumption_materials_qty_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_consumption_materials_per_unit",
                "expression": " sum(F00351_consumption_materials[plan_consumption_materials_per_unit_qty_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00000",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_consumption_materials_loss_qty_0",
                "expression": "SUM([plan_consumption_materials_loss_qty_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00000",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_consumption_materials_loss_rate",
                "expression": "DIVIDE([plan_consumption_materials_loss_qty_0], [plan_consumption_materials_per_unit])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_consumption_materials_loss_qty",
                "expression": "[plan_consumption_materials_loss_qty_0] + [plan_consumption_materials_per_unit]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00000",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_opercontrol_cum",
                "expression": [
                  "SUM('F00358_opercontrol_cum'[opercontrol_cum_out_qty])",
                  ""
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              }
            ],
            "annotations": [
              {

                      "      <value>",
                      "        <int>3</int>",
                      "      </value>",
                      "    </item>",
                      "    <item>",
                      "      <key>",
                      "        <string>cash_reg_akb_</string>",
                      "      </key>",
                      "      <value>",
                      "        <int>4</int>",
                      "      </value>",
                      "    </item>",
                      "    <item>",
                      "      <key>",
                      "        <string>cash_sale_qty_</string>",
                      "      </key>",
                      "      <value>",
                      "        <int>5</int>",
                      "      </value>",
                      "    </item>",
                      "    <item>",
                      "      <key>",
                      "        <string>cash_sale_rub_vat_</string>",
                      "      </key>",
                      "      <value>",
                      "        <int>6</int>",
                      "      </value>",
                      "    </item>",
                      "    <item>",
                      "      <key>",
                      "        <string>cash_sale_kg_</string>",
                      "      </key>",
                      "      <value>",
                      "        <int>8</int>",
                      "      </value>",
                      "    </item>",
                      "    <item>",
                      "      <key>",
                      "        <string>salesplace_type_guid</string>",
                      "      </key>",
                      "      <value>",
                      "        <int>9</int>",
                      "      </value>",
                      "    </item>",
                      "  </ColumnDisplayIndex>",
                      "  <ColumnFrozen />",
                      "  <ColumnChecked>",
                      "    <item>",
                      "      <key>",
                      "        <string>cash_type_price_id</string>",
                      "      </key>",
                      "      <value>",
                      "        <boolean>true</boolean>",
                      "      </value>",
                      "    </item>",
                      "    <item>",
                      "      <key>",
                      "        <string>cash_sale_kg_</string>",
                      "      </key>",
                      "      <value>",
                      "        <boolean>true</boolean>",
                      "      </value>",
                      "    </item>",
                      "    <item>",
                      "      <key>",
                      "        <string>salesplace_type_guid</string>",
                      "      </key>",
                      "      <value>",
                      "        <boolean>true</boolean>",
                      "      </value>",
                      "    </item>",

                    ]
                  }
                ]
              }
            ],
            "measures": [
              {
                "name": "fact_sale_avg_price_rub_vat_client_price",
                "expression": " DIVIDE( [f00400_fact_sale_rub_vat_client_price],[f00400_fact_sale_units])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "sale_general",
                "expression": [
                  "SWITCH(SELECTEDVALUE(D00750_units[unit_id]),",
                  "    1,[f00400_fact_sale_kg],",
                  "    5,[f00400_fact_sale_rub_vat_client_price],",
                  "    9,[f00400_fact_sale_kg] / 1000,",
                  "    10,[f00400_fact_sale_rub_vat_client_price]/1000,",
                  "    11,[f00400_fact_sale_rub_vat_client_price]/1000000,",
                  "    12,[f00400_fact_sale_units],",
                  "    13,[f00400_fact_sale_units]/1000,",
                  "    19,[f00400_ACB],",
                  "    [f00400_fact_sale_rub_vat_client_price]",
                  "            ) "
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00400_ACB",
                "expression": "DISTINCTCOUNT([cash_reg_akb_])",
                "formatString": "#,0"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00400_fact_sale_units",
                "expression": "SUM([cash_sale_qty_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00400_fact_sale_rub_vat_client_price",
                "expression": "SUM([cash_sale_rub_vat_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00400_ACB_UP",
                "expression": "CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT(F00400_sales_Net[cash_reg_akb_]),D01100_unit_salescash[sku_cash_manuf_name]= \"MAY-FOODS\")",
                "formatString": "#,0"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00400_akb_3_months",
                "expression": [
                  " CALCULATE(",
                  "    DISTINCTCOUNT(F00400_sales_Net[cash_reg_akb_]),",
                  "    DATESINPERIOD(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date], MAX(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]),  -3,  MONTH)",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00400_sales_month",
                "expression": " TOTALMTD(sum(F00400_sales_Net[cash_sale_rub_vat_]),D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00400_off_take_ACB",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([f00400_sales_month], [f00400_akb_3_months])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_sale_avg_price_rub_vat_client_price_LY",
                "expression": [
                  " CALCULATE(",
                  "    [fact_sale_avg_price_rub_vat_client_price], ",
                  "    DATEADD(",
                  "        DATESBETWEEN(",
                  "            'D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date], ",
                  "            MIN('D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date]), ",
                  "            MAX('D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date])",
                  "\t),",
                  "        -1,",
                  "        YEAR",
                  "    )",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00400_sale_general_Ytd",
                "expression": " TOTALYTD([f00400_sale_general], 'D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00400_sale_general_LY_Ytd",
                "expression": [
                  " CALCULATE(",
                  "    [f00400_sale_general_Ytd], ",
                  "    DATEADD(",
                  "        DATESBETWEEN(",
                  "            'D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date], ",
                  "            MIN('D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date]), ",
                  "            MAX('D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date])",
                  "\t),",
                  "        -1,",
                  "        YEAR",
                  "    )",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00400_sale_general_vs_LY_Ytd",
                "expression": " [f00400_sale_general_Ytd] - [f00400_sale_general_LY_Ytd]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00400_sale_general_vs_LY_Ytd_%",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([f00400_sale_general_vs_LY_Ytd], [f00400_sale_general_LY_Ytd])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00400_sale_general_LY",
                "expression": " CALCULATE([f00400_sale_general], DATEADD('D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date], -1, YEAR))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00400_sales_general_UP",
                "expression": "CALCULATE([f00400_sale_general], D01100_unit_salescash[sku_cash_manuf_name]=\"MAY-FOODS\")",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00400_sales_general_UP_LY",
                "expression": [
                  " CALCULATE(",
                  "    [f00400_sales_general_UP], ",
                  "    DATEADD(",
                  "        DATESBETWEEN(",
                  "            'D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date], ",
                  "            MIN('D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date]), ",
                  "            MAX('D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date])",
                  "\t),",
                  "        -1,",
                  "        YEAR",
                  "    )",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00400_sales_general_UP_Ytd",
                "expression": " TOTALYTD([f00400_sales_general_UP], 'D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00400_sales_general_UP_LY_Ytd",
                "expression": [
                  " CALCULATE(",
                  "    [f00400_sales_general_UP_Ytd], ",
                  "    DATEADD(",
                  "        DATESBETWEEN(",
                  "            'D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date], ",
                  "            MIN('D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date]), ",
                  "            MAX('D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date])",
                  "\t),",
                  "        -1,",
                  "        YEAR",
                  "    )",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00400_sales_general_UP_vs_LY_Ytd",
                "expression": " [f00400_sales_general_UP_Ytd] - [f00400_sales_general_UP_LY_Ytd]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00400_sales_general_UP_vs_LY_Ytd_%",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([f00400_sales_general_UP_vs_LY_Ytd], [f00400_sales_general_UP_LY_Ytd])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00400_ACB_LY",
                "expression": [
                  " CALCULATE(",
                  "    [f00400_ACB], ",
                  "    DATEADD( 'D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date], ",
                  "        -1,",
                  "        YEAR",
                  "    )",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00400_fact_sale_kg",
                "expression": "SUM([cash_sale_kg_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00400_sale_general",
                "expression": [
                  "SWITCH(SELECTEDVALUE(D00750_units[unit_id]),",
                  "    1,[f00400_fact_sale_kg],",
                  "    5,[f00400_fact_sale_rub_vat_client_price],",
                  "    9,[f00400_fact_sale_kg] / 1000,",
                  "    10,[f00400_fact_sale_rub_vat_client_price]/1000,",
                  "    11,[f00400_fact_sale_rub_vat_client_price]/1000000,",
                  "    12,[f00400_fact_sale_units],",
                  "    13,[f00400_fact_sale_units]/1000,",
                  "    19,[f00400_ACB],",
                  "    [f00400_fact_sale_rub_vat_client_price]",
                  "            )"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00400_acb_per_sku",
                "expression": [
                  " SUMX(",
                  "    VALUES(D01100_unit_salescash[sku_cash_manuf_name]),",
                  "    SUMX(",
                  "        VALUES(D01100_unit_salescash[cash_sale_sku_id]),",
                  "       [f00400_ACB]",
                  "    )",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00400_acb_per_sku_all_manuf",
                "expression": [
                  " DIVIDE(",
                  "    [f00400_acb_per_sku], ",
                  "    CALCULATE(",
                  "        [f00400_acb_per_sku], ",
                  "        REMOVEFILTERS('D01100_unit_salescash'[sku_cash_manuf_name])",
                  "        )",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00400_off_take_qty",
                "expression": [
                  " DIVIDE([f00400_sales_month_qty], [f00400_akb_3_months])",
                  ""
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00400_distribution_diff",
                "expression": [
                  "SUMX (",
                  "        VALUES ( D01100_unit_salescash[cash_sale_sku_id] ),",
                  "        ([f00400_ACB] - [f00400_ACB_LY]) * [f00400_off_take_LY_qty] * [fact_sale_avg_price_rub_vat_client_price_LY] / 1000000",
                  "    )"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00400_price_diff",
                "expression": "[f00400_sale_general_vs_LY_Ytd] - [f00400_off_take_diff] - [f00400_distribution_diff]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00400_off_take_LY_qty",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE([f00400_off_take_qty],",
                  "    DATEADD(",
                  "         'D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date], ",
                  "        -1,",
                  "        YEAR",
                  "    )",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00400_off_take_diff",
                "expression": [
                  " ",
                  "    SUMX (",
                  "         VALUES ( D01100_unit_salescash[cash_sale_sku_id]),",
                  "        ([f00400_off_take_qty] - [f00400_off_take_LY_qty]) * [f00400_ACB_LY] * [fact_sale_avg_price_rub_vat_client_price_LY] / 1000000",
                  "    )"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00400_sale_general_per_manuf",
                "expression": [
                  " DIVIDE(",
                  "    [f00400_sale_general], ",
                  "    CALCULATE(",
                  "        [f00400_sale_general], ",
                  "        ALLSELECTED('D01100_unit_salescash'[sku_cash_manuf_name])",
                  "        )",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00400_sale_general_per_aroma",
                "expression": [
                  " DIVIDE(",
                  "    [f00400_sale_general], ",
                  "    CALCULATE(",
                  "        [f00400_sale_general], ",
                  "        ALLSELECTED('D01100_unit_salescash'[sku_cash_taste_profile])",
                  "        )",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00400_acb_per_sku_all_aroma",
                "expression": [
                  " DIVIDE(",
                  "    [f00400_acb_per_sku], ",
                  "    CALCULATE(",
                  "        [f00400_acb_per_sku], ",
                  "        ALLSELECTED('D01100_unit_salescash'[sku_cash_taste_profile])",
                  "        )",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00400_sales_month_kg",
                "expression": " TOTALMTD(sum(F00400_sales_Net[cash_sale_kg_]),D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00400_sales_month_qty",
                "expression": " TOTALMTD(sum(F00400_sales_Net[cash_sale_qty_]),D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00400_off_take_kg",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([f00400_sales_month_kg], [f00400_akb_3_months])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00400_fact_purchase_rub_vat_cost",
                "expression": "SUM([fact_purchase_rub_vat_cost_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00400_fact_purchase_avg_price_rub_vat_cost",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([f00400_fact_purchase_rub_vat_cost],[f00400_fact_sale_units])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00400_GM",
                "expression": [
                  "VAR Ratio = DIVIDE(",
                  "[f00400_fact_purchase_rub_vat_cost],",
                  "[f00400_fact_sale_rub_vat_client_price],",
                  "BLANK()",
                  ")",
                  "RETURN",
                  "IF( ISBLANK(Ratio), BLANK(), 1 - Ratio)"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00400_markup_chain_percent",
                "expression": [
                  " DIVIDE(",
                  "    [f00400_fact_sale_rub_vat_client_price] - [f00400_fact_purchase_rub_vat_cost],",
                  "    [f00400_fact_purchase_rub_vat_cost],",
                  "    BLANK()",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "0.00%;-0.00%;0.00%"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00400_margin_chain_percent",
                "expression": [
                  "DIVIDE(",
                  "    [f00400_fact_sale_rub_vat_client_price] - [f00400_fact_purchase_rub_vat_cost],",
                  "    [f00400_fact_sale_rub_vat_client_price],",
                  "    BLANK()",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "0.00%;-0.00%;0.00%"
              }
            ],
            "annotations": [
              {

            "measures": [
              {
                "name": "D01800_retired_staff_qty",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE(COUNT(D01800_staff[staff_guid]), NOT ISBLANK(D01800_staff[absence_dt]), FILTER(D01800_staff, D01800_staff[absence_dt] IN VALUES(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date])))",
                  ""
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0"
              },
              {
                "name": "D01800_worked_staff_qty",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE(COUNT(D01800_staff[staff_guid]), FILTER(D01800_staff, ISBLANK(D01800_staff[absence_dt]) || D01800_staff[absence_dt] > MIN(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date])))",
                  ""
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0"
              },
              {
                "name": "D01800_worked_staff_avg",
                "expression": [
                  " Averagex('D00001_main_calendar', [D01800_worked_staff_qty])",
                  ""
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "D01800_staff_turnover, %",
                "expression": [
                  " D01800_staff[D01800_retired_staff_qty]/D01800_staff[D01800_worked_staff_avg]",
                  ""
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%"
              },
              {
                "name": "D01800_staff_members",
                "expression": [
                  " IF(MAX(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]) >= TODAY(),",
                  "\tBLANK(),",
                  "\tCALCULATE(",
                  "\t    SUM([staff_member]),",
                  "\t    FILTER(",
                  "\t        D01800_staff,",
                  "\t        D01800_staff[start_dt] <= MAX(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]) && (D01800_staff[finish_dt] > MIN(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]) || ISBLANK(D01800_staff[finish_dt]) = TRUE())    ))",
                  "\t )"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "D01800_staff_members_avg",
                "expression": [
                  "  IF(MAX(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]) >= TODAY(),",
                  "\tBLANK(),",
                  "\tCALCULATE([D01800_staff_members],ALLSELECTED('D00001_main_calendar'))",
                  "\t)"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "D01800_staff_manager_members",
                "expression": [
                  " IF(MAX(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]) >= TODAY(),",
                  "\tBLANK(),",
                  "\tCALCULATE(",
                  "\t    SUM([staff_manager_member]),",
                  "\t    FILTER(",
                  "\t        D01800_staff,",
                  "\t        D01800_staff[start_dt] <= MAX(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]) && (D01800_staff[finish_dt] > MIN(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]) || ISBLANK(D01800_staff[finish_dt]) = TRUE())    )",
                  "\t)",
                  "\t)"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "D01800_staff_manager_members_avg",
                "expression": [
                  "  IF(MAX(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]) >= TODAY(),",
                  "\tBLANK(),",
                  "\tCALCULATE([D01800_staff_manager_members],ALLSELECTED('D00001_main_calendar'))",
                  "\t)"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "D01800_management_norm",
                "expression": "DIVIDE([D01800_staff_members],[D01800_staff_manager_members])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "D01800_management_norm_avg",
                "expression": [
                  " IF(MAX(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]) >= TODAY(),",
                  "\tBLANK(),",
                  "\tCALCULATE([D01800_management_norm],ALLSELECTED('D00001_main_calendar'))",
                  "\t)"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "D01800_worked_day",
                "expression": [
                  "VAR S = MIN ( D01800_staff[start_dt] )",
                  "VAR E = COALESCE( MAX ( D01800_staff[finish_dt]), TODAY() )",
                  "RETURN",
                  "IF(",
                  "    S = DATE(1900,1,1),",
                  "    \"нет даты начала работы\",",
                  "    DATEDIFF( S, E, DAY )",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0"
              }
            ],
            "annotations": [

                  {
                    "name": "TableWidgetSerialization",
                    "value": [
                      "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-16\"?><Gemini xmlns=\"TableWidgetSerialization\"><AnnotationContent><![CDATA[<?xml version=\"1.0\"?>",
                      "<TableWidgetGridSerialization xmlns:xsd=\"http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema\" xmlns:xsi=\"http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance\">",
