          {
            "name": "F01000_stocks_wms",
            "columns": [
              {
                "name": "sku_guid",
                "dataType": "string",
                "isHidden": true,
                "sourceColumn": "sku_guid",
                "sourceProviderType": "Char"
              },
              {
                "name": "stock_kg_",
                "dataType": "double",
                "isHidden": true,
                "sourceColumn": "stock_kg_",
                "sourceProviderType": "Numeric"
              },
              {
                "name": "stock_box_",
                "dataType": "int64",
                "isHidden": true,
                "sourceColumn": "stock_box_",
                "sourceProviderType": "BigInt"
              },
              {
                "name": "stock_packs_",
                "dataType": "int64",
                "isHidden": true,
                "sourceColumn": "stock_packs_",
                "sourceProviderType": "BigInt"
              },
              {
                "name": "stock_pallet_",
                "dataType": "int64",
                "isHidden": true,
                "sourceColumn": "stock_pallet_",
                "sourceProviderType": "BigInt"
              },
              {
                "name": "manuf_date",
                "dataType": "dateTime",
                "sourceColumn": "manuf_date"
              },
              {
                "name": "expiration_date",
                "dataType": "dateTime",
                "sourceColumn": "expiration_date"
              },
              {
                "name": "stock_date",
                "dataType": "dateTime",
                "isHidden": true,
                "sourceColumn": "stock_date"
              },
              {
                "name": "sku_state_name",
                "dataType": "string",
                "sourceColumn": "sku_state_name"
              }
            ],
            "partitions": [
              {
                "name": "F01000_stocks_wms_current",
                "dataView": "full",
                "source": {
                  "type": "query",
                  "query": "SELECT [dbo].[F01000_stocks_wms].*   FROM [dbo].[F01000_stocks_wms] where stock_date >= '2025-01-01'",
                  "dataSource": "SqlServer LTRUS1ERPR01 mart"
                }
              },
              {
                "name": "F01000_stocks_wms_2024",
                "dataView": "full",
                "source": {
                  "type": "query",
                  "query": [
                    "SELECT [dbo].[F01000_stocks_wms].*   ",
                    "FROM [dbo].[F01000_stocks_wms]",
                    " where stock_date between '2024-01-01' and '2024-12-31'"
                  ],
                  "dataSource": "SqlServer LTRUS1ERPR01 mart"
                }
              },
              {
                "name": "F01000_stocks_wms_2023",
                "dataView": "full",
                "source": {
                  "type": "query",
                  "query": [
                    "SELECT [dbo].[F01000_stocks_wms].*   ",
                    "FROM [dbo].[F01000_stocks_wms] ",
                    "where stock_date between '2023-01-01' and '2023-12-31'"
                  ],
                  "dataSource": "SqlServer LTRUS1ERPR01 mart"
                }
              },
              {
                "name": "F01000_stocks_wms_2022",
                "dataView": "full",
                "source": {
                  "type": "query",
                  "query": [
                    "SELECT [dbo].[F01000_stocks_wms].*   ",
                    "FROM [dbo].[F01000_stocks_wms]",
                    " where stock_date between '2022-01-01' and '2022-12-31'"
                  ],
                  "dataSource": "SqlServer LTRUS1ERPR01 mart"
                }
              }
            ],
            "measures": [
              {
                "name": "OSG_%",
                "expression": [
                  "",
                  "CALCULATE(",
                  "        DIVIDE(",
                  "            DATEDIFF(min(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]), max(F01000_stocks_wms[expiration_date]), DAY),",
                  "            DATEDIFF(max(F01000_stocks_wms[manuf_date]), max(F01000_stocks_wms[expiration_date]), DAY)",
                  "    ),",
                  "    FILTER(",
                  "        D00001_main_calendar,",
                  "        D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date] <= MAX(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date])",
                  "    )",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%"
              },
              {
                "name": "f01000_stock_kg",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE(LASTNONBLANKVALUE(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date],sum(F01000_stocks_wms[stock_kg_])),",
                  "                FILTER(",
                  "                    D00001_main_calendar,",
                  "                    D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date] <= MAX(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date])",
                  "                )",
                  "            )"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f01000_stock_box",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE(LASTNONBLANKVALUE(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date],sum(F01000_stocks_wms[stock_box_])),",
                  "                FILTER(",
                  "                    D00001_main_calendar,",
                  "                    D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date] <= MAX(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date])",
                  "                )",
                  "            )"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f01000_stock_packs",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE(LASTNONBLANKVALUE(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date],sum(F01000_stocks_wms[stock_packs_])),",
                  "                FILTER(",
                  "                    D00001_main_calendar,",
                  "                    D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date] <= MAX(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date])",
                  "                )",
                  "            )"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f01000_stock_pallet",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE(LASTNONBLANKVALUE(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date],sum(F01000_stocks_wms[stock_pallet_])),",
                  "                FILTER(",
                  "                    D00001_main_calendar,",
                  "                    D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date] <= MAX(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date])",
                  "                )",
                  "            )"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              }
            ],

            "measures": [
              {
                "name": "plan_quota_qty",
                "expression": " if(SUM(F01120_quotas[plan_quota_qty_])<>0, sum(F01120_quotas[plan_quota_qty_]),BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_quota_kg",
                "expression": "if(SUM([plan_quota_kg_])<>0,SUM([plan_quota_kg_]),BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "free_quota_qty",
                "expression": "if([free_quota_qty_0]<>0, [free_quota_qty_0],BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "free_quota_kg",
                "expression": "if([free_quota_kg_0]<>0, [free_quota_kg_0],BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "stock_quota_qty",
                "expression": " IF(round([stock_quota_qty_0],2) <> 0.0, [stock_quota_qty_0], BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "stock_quota_kg",
                "expression": "IF(round([stock_quota_kg_0],2) <> 0.0, [stock_quota_kg_0], BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_partners_qty",
                "expression": "if(SUM(F01120_quotas[plan_partners_qty_])<>0,SUM(F01120_quotas[plan_partners_qty_]),BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_partners_kg",
                "expression": "if(SUM(F01120_quotas[plan_partners_kg_])<>0,SUM(F01120_quotas[plan_partners_kg_]),BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_quota_with_plan_qty",
                "expression": "if(SUM([fact_quota_qty_with_plan_])<> 0, sum(F01120_quotas[fact_quota_qty_with_plan_]), BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_quota_without_plan_qty",
                "expression": "if(SUM([fact_quota_qty_without_plan_])<>0, sum(F01120_quotas[fact_quota_qty_without_plan_]),BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_quota_with_plan_kg",
                "expression": "if(SUM([fact_quota_kg_with_plan_])<> 0, sum(F01120_quotas[fact_quota_kg_with_plan_]), BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_quota_without_plan_kg",
                "expression": "if(SUM([fact_quota_kg_without_plan_])<>0, sum(F01120_quotas[fact_quota_kg_without_plan_]),BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "free_quota_qty_0",
                "expression": "   SUMX( VALUES(F01120_quotas[quota_guid]),  FIRSTNONBLANK(F01120_quotas[plan_stock_qty_], 1) )",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "free_quota_kg_0",
                "expression": " SUMX( VALUES(F01120_quotas[quota_guid]),  FIRSTNONBLANK(F01120_quotas[plan_stock_kg_], 1) )",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "stock_quota_qty_0",
                "expression": "  [plan_partners_qty]-[fact_quota_with_plan_qty]-[fact_quota_without_plan_qty]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "stock_quota_kg_0",
                "expression": "   [plan_partners_kg]-[fact_quota_with_plan_kg]-[fact_quota_without_plan_kg]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              }
            ],

            "measures": [
              {
                "name": "cost_materials_units_rub_vat_cost_price",
                "expression": [
                  "AVERAGEX (",
                  "\tSUMMARIZE(F00356_cost_materials, F00356_cost_materials[sku_guid], ",
                  "\t\t\"sku_last_cost\",  LASTNONBLANKVALUE (F00356_cost_materials[cost_date], sum(F00356_cost_materials[cost_materials_units_rub_vat_cost_price_]))),",
                  "\t\t[sku_last_cost])"

            "measures": [
              {
                "name": "fact_expired_acc_rec_TO_rub_vat_income_price",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE(",
                  "\t\tLASTNONBLANKVALUE(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date],",
                  "\t\t\tIF(SUM([fact_acc_rec_rub_vat_income_price_])<>0,SUM([fact_acc_rec_rub_vat_income_price_]),BLANK())",
                  "\t\t\t),",
                  "\t\tDATEDIFF(max(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]),F01160_accounts_receivable[payment_date],DAY)<0,",
                  "\tUSERELATIONSHIP(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date],F01160_accounts_receivable[payment_date])",
                  "\t)"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_no_expired_acc_rec_TO_rub_vat_income_price",
                "expression": [
                  "",
                  "\tCALCULATE(",
                  "\t\tLASTNONBLANKVALUE(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date],",
                  "\t\t\tIF(SUM([fact_acc_rec_rub_vat_income_price_])<>0,SUM([fact_acc_rec_rub_vat_income_price_]),BLANK())",
                  "\t\t\t),",
                  "\t\tDATEDIFF(max(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]),F01160_accounts_receivable[payment_date],DAY)>=0,",
                  "\t\tUSERELATIONSHIP(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date],F01160_accounts_receivable[payment_date])",
                  "\t)"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_acc_rec_TO_сur",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE(",
                  "\tLASTNONBLANKVALUE(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date],",
                  "\t\tIF(SUM([fact_acc_rec_cur_])<>0,SUM([fact_acc_rec_cur_]),BLANK())",
                  "\t\t)",
                  "\t)"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_acc_rec_day",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE(",
                  "\t\tIF(DATEDIFF(min(F01160_accounts_receivable[payment_date]),max(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]),DAY)>0,",
                  "\t\tDATEDIFF(min(F01160_accounts_receivable[payment_date]),max(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]),DAY)",
                  "\t\t,BLANK()",
                  "\t\t)",
                  "\t)"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_expired_acc_rec_rub_vat_income_price",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE(",
                  "\t\tSUM([fact_acc_rec_rub_vat_income_price_])",
                  "\t\t,FILTER(F01160_accounts_receivable,DATEDIFF(F01160_accounts_receivable[payment_date],max(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]),DAY)<0)",
                  "\t)"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_no_expired_acc_rec_rub_vat_income_price",
                "expression": [
                  "",
                  "\tCALCULATE(",
                  "\t\tSUM([fact_acc_rec_rub_vat_income_price_])",
                  "\t,FILTER(F01160_accounts_receivable,DATEDIFF(F01160_accounts_receivable[payment_date],max(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]),DAY)>=0)",
                  "\t)"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "expired_acc_rec_%",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([fact_expired_acc_rec_TO_rub_vat_income_price],([fact_expired_acc_rec_TO_rub_vat_income_price]+[fact_no_expired_acc_rec_TO_rub_vat_income_price]))",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_expired_acc_rec_TO_rub_vat_income_price_1_7_without_advance",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE(",
                  "\t[fact_expired_acc_rec_TO_rub_vat_income_price]-[fact_advance_acc_rec]",
                  "\t,DATEDIFF(F01160_accounts_receivable[payment_date],SELECTEDVALUE(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]),DAY)>0&&",
                  "\tDATEDIFF(F01160_accounts_receivable[payment_date],SELECTEDVALUE(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]),DAY)<=7",
                  "\t)"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_expired_acc_rec_TO_rub_vat_income_price_8_14_without_advance",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE(",
                  "\t[fact_expired_acc_rec_TO_rub_vat_income_price]-[fact_advance_acc_rec]",
                  "\t,DATEDIFF(F01160_accounts_receivable[payment_date],SELECTEDVALUE(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]),DAY)>=8&&",
                  "\tDATEDIFF(F01160_accounts_receivable[payment_date],SELECTEDVALUE(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]),DAY)<=14",
                  "\t)"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_expired_acc_rec_TO_rub_vat_income_price_15_30_without_advance",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE(",
                  "    [fact_expired_acc_rec_TO_rub_vat_income_price]-[fact_advance_acc_rec]",
                  "    -- Поле F01160_accounts_receivable[count_debt_days] было удалено, чтобы процессинг куба не падал с ошибкой закомментировал",
                  "    --,F01160_accounts_receivable[count_debt_days]>=15 && F01160_accounts_receivable[count_debt_days]<=30",
                  "    )"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_expired_acc_rec_TO_rub_vat_income_price_31_60_without_advance",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE(",
                  "    [fact_expired_acc_rec_TO_rub_vat_income_price]-[fact_advance_acc_rec]",
                  "    -- Поле F01160_accounts_receivable[count_debt_days] было удалено, чтобы процессинг куба не падал с ошибкой закомментировал",
                  "    --,F01160_accounts_receivable[count_debt_days]>=31&&F01160_accounts_receivable[count_debt_days]<=60",
                  "    )"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_expired_acc_rec_TO_rub_vat_income_price_61_90_without_advance",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE(",
                  "    [fact_expired_acc_rec_TO_rub_vat_income_price]-[fact_advance_acc_rec]",
                  "    -- Поле F01160_accounts_receivable[count_debt_days] было удалено, чтобы процессинг куба не падал с ошибкой закомментировал",
                  "    --,F01160_accounts_receivable[count_debt_days]>=61&&F01160_accounts_receivable[count_debt_days]<=90",
                  "    )"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_expired_acc_rec_TO_rub_vat_income_price_90_without_advance",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE(",
                  "    [fact_expired_acc_rec_TO_rub_vat_income_price]-[fact_advance_acc_rec]",
                  "    -- Поле F01160_accounts_receivable[count_debt_days] было удалено, чтобы процессинг куба не падал с ошибкой закомментировал",
                  "    --,F01160_accounts_receivable[count_debt_days]>=91",
                  "    )"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_expired_acc_rec_TO_rub_vat_income_price_1_7",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE([fact_expired_acc_rec_TO_rub_vat_income_price])",
                  "-- Поле F01160_accounts_receivable[count_debt_days] было удалено, чтобы процессинг куба не падал с ошибкой закомментировал",
                  "    --,F01160_accounts_receivable[count_debt_days]>0 && F01160_accounts_receivable[count_debt_days]<=7)"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_expired_acc_rec_TO_rub_vat_income_price_8_14",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE([fact_expired_acc_rec_TO_rub_vat_income_price]",
                  "-- Поле F01160_accounts_receivable[count_debt_days] было удалено, чтобы процессинг куба не падал с ошибкой закомментировал    ",
                  "--,F01160_accounts_receivable[count_debt_days]>=8&&F01160_accounts_receivable[count_debt_days]<=14",
                  "    )"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_expired_acc_rec_TO_rub_vat_income_price_15_30",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE([fact_expired_acc_rec_TO_rub_vat_income_price])",
                  "-- Поле F01160_accounts_receivable[count_debt_days] было удалено, чтобы процессинг куба не падал с ошибкой закомментировал",
                  "    --,F01160_accounts_receivable[count_debt_days]>=15 && F01160_accounts_receivable[count_debt_days]<=30)"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_expired_acc_rec_TO_rub_vat_income_price_31_60",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE([fact_expired_acc_rec_TO_rub_vat_income_price]",
                  "-- Поле F01160_accounts_receivable[count_debt_days] было удалено, чтобы процессинг куба не падал с ошибкой закомментировал    ",
                  "--,F01160_accounts_receivable[count_debt_days]>=31&&F01160_accounts_receivable[count_debt_days]<=60",
                  "    )"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_expired_acc_rec_TO_rub_vat_income_price_61_90",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE([fact_expired_acc_rec_TO_rub_vat_income_price]",
                  "-- Поле F01160_accounts_receivable[count_debt_days] было удалено, чтобы процессинг куба не падал с ошибкой закомментировал    ",
                  "--,F01160_accounts_receivable[count_debt_days]>=61&&F01160_accounts_receivable[count_debt_days]<=90",
                  "    )"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_expired_acc_rec_TO_rub_vat_income_price_90",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE([fact_expired_acc_rec_TO_rub_vat_income_price]",
                  "-- Поле F01160_accounts_receivable[count_debt_days] было удалено, чтобы процессинг куба не падал с ошибкой закомментировал    ",
                  "--,F01160_accounts_receivable[count_debt_days]>=91",
                  "    )"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_advance_acc_rec",
                "expression": [
                  "",
                  "\tCALCULATE (IF(SUM([fact_advance_acc_rec_])<>0,SUM([fact_advance_acc_rec_]),BLANK()),LASTNONBLANK (F01160_accounts_receivable[pitch_date],max(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]) ))",
                  "",
                  ""
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "income_acc_rec",
                "expression": "IF(SUM([income_acc_rec_])<>0,SUM([income_acc_rec_]),blank())",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_acc_rec_rub_vat_income_price",
                "expression": [
                  "",
                  "\tCALCULATE(",
                  "\t\tLASTNONBLANKVALUE(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date],",
                  "\t\t\tIF(SUM([fact_acc_rec_rub_vat_income_price_])<>0,SUM([fact_acc_rec_rub_vat_income_price_]),BLANK())",
                  "\t\t),",
                  "\t   FILTER(",
                  "                    ALL(D00001_main_calendar),",
                  "                    D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date] <= MAX(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date])",
                  "                )",
                  "",
                  "\t)"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "Копия fact_advance_acc_rec",
                "expression": [
                  "",
                  "\tIF(SUM([fact_advance_acc_rec_])<>0,SUM([fact_advance_acc_rec_]),BLANK())",
                  "",
                  ""
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "Копия fact_expired_acc_rec_rub_vat_income_price",
                "expression": [
                  "CALCULATE(",
                  "\t\tLASTNONBLANKVALUE(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date],",
                  "\t\t\tIF(SUM([fact_acc_rec_rub_vat_income_price_])<>0,SUM([fact_acc_rec_rub_vat_income_price_]),BLANK())",
                  "\t\t)",
                  "\t\t,FILTER(F01160_accounts_receivable,[fact_acc_rec_day]<0)",
                  "\t)"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              }
            ],
            "annotations": [

            ],
            "partitions": [
              {
                "name": "F01180_nielsen_current",
                "source": {
                  "type": "query",
                  "query": "SELECT [dbo].[F01180_nielsen].*   FROM [dbo].[F01180_nielsen] where sale_date >= '01.01.2025'",
                  "dataSource": "SqlServer LTRUS1ERPR01 mart"
                },
                "annotations": [
                  {
                    "name": "QueryEditorSerialization",
                    "value": "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-16\"?><Gemini xmlns=\"QueryEditorSerialization\"><AnnotationContent><![CDATA[<RSQueryCommandText>SELECT [dbo].[F01180_nielsen].*   FROM [dbo].[F01180_nielsen] where sale_date >= '01.01.2025'</RSQueryCommandText><RSQueryCommandType>Text</RSQueryCommandType><RSQueryDesignState></RSQueryDesignState>]]></AnnotationContent></Gemini>"
                  }
                ]
              },
              {
                "name": "F01180_nielsen_2024",
                "mode": "import",
                "source": {
                  "type": "query",
                  "query": "SELECT [dbo].[F01180_nielsen].*   FROM [dbo].[F01180_nielsen] where sale_date >= '01.01.2024' and sale_date < '01.01.2025'",
                  "dataSource": "SqlServer LTRUS1ERPR01 mart"
                },
                "annotations": [
                  {
                    "name": "QueryEditorSerialization",
                    "value": "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-16\"?><Gemini xmlns=\"QueryEditorSerialization\"><AnnotationContent><![CDATA[<RSQueryCommandText>SELECT [dbo].[F01180_nielsen].*   FROM [dbo].[F01180_nielsen] where sale_date >= '01.01.2024' and sale_date < '01.01.2025'</RSQueryCommandText><RSQueryCommandType>Text</RSQueryCommandType><RSQueryDesignState></RSQueryDesignState>]]></AnnotationContent></Gemini>"
                  }
                ]
              },
              {
                "name": "F01180_nielsen_2023",
                "dataView": "full",
                "source": {
                  "type": "query",
                  "query": "SELECT [dbo].[F01180_nielsen].*   FROM [dbo].[F01180_nielsen] where sale_date >= '01.01.2023' and sale_date < '01.01.2024'",
                  "dataSource": "SqlServer LTRUS1ERPR01 mart"
                }
              },
              {
                "name": "F01180_nielsen_2022",
                "dataView": "full",
                "source": {
                  "type": "query",
                  "query": "SELECT [dbo].[F01180_nielsen].*   FROM [dbo].[F01180_nielsen] where sale_date >= '01.01.2022' and sale_date < '01.01.2023'",
                  "dataSource": "SqlServer LTRUS1ERPR01 mart"
                }
              }
            ],
            "measures": [
              {
                "name": "selling_distr_num_prc",
                "expression": "DIVIDE([universe], calculate(DISTINCTCOUNT(F01180_nielsen[universe_]), ALLSELECTED()))",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "weight_selling_distr_prc",
                "expression": "AVERAGE(F01180_nielsen[weight_selling_distr_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "share_value_prc",
                "expression": "DIVIDE(sum(F01180_nielsen[nielsen_sale_rub_vat_]), calculate(sum(F01180_nielsen[nielsen_sale_rub_vat_]), ALLSELECTED()))",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%"
              },
              {
                "name": "sku_per_seller",
                "expression": [
                  " DIVIDE(",
                  "\tSUMX(",
                  "\t\tSUMMARIZE(F01180_nielsen,F01180_nielsen[universe_],",
                  "\t\t\t\"sku_count\", DISTINCTCOUNT(F01180_nielsen[nielsen_sale_unit_id])",
                  "\t\t\t),",
                  "\t\t[sku_count]),",
                  "\t[universe])"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "share_volume_prc",
                "expression": "DIVIDE(sum(F01180_nielsen[nielsen_sale_kg_]), calculate(sum(F01180_nielsen[nielsen_sale_kg_]), ALLSELECTED()))",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%"
              },
              {
                "name": "sales_value_thousand_rub",
                "expression": "SUM(F01180_nielsen[nielsen_sale_rub_vat_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "sales_value_thousand_kg",
                "expression": "SUM(F01180_nielsen[nielsen_sale_kg_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "off_take_kg",
                "expression": "DIVIDE(sum(F01180_nielsen[nielsen_sale_kg_]), [universe])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "off_take_items",
                "expression": "DIVIDE(sum(F01180_nielsen[nielsen_sale_qty_]), [universe])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "off_take_sku_kg",
                "expression": [
                  "AVERAGEX(",
                  "\tSUMMARIZE(F01180_nielsen,F01180_nielsen[nielsen_sale_unit_id],",
                  "\t\t\"sku_total_sales\", sum(F01180_nielsen[nielsen_sale_kg_]),",
                  "\t\t\"sku_total_AKB\", DISTINCTCOUNT(F01180_nielsen[universe_])",
                  "\t\t),",
                  "\tDIVIDE([sku_total_sales],  [sku_total_AKB])",
                  "\t)"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "universe",
                "expression": "DISTINCTCOUNT([universe_])",
                "formatString": "#,0"
              },
              {
                "name": "sales_value_thousand_qty",
                "expression": "SUM(F01180_nielsen[nielsen_sale_qty_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f01180_nielsen_sale_kg",
                "expression": "SUM([nielsen_sale_kg_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f01180_nielsen_sale_qty",
                "expression": "SUM([nielsen_sale_qty_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f01180_nielsen_sale_rub_vat",
                "expression": "SUM([nielsen_sale_rub_vat_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f01180_nielsen_sale",
                "expression": [
                  " SWITCH(SELECTEDVALUE(D00750_units[unit_id]),",
                  "    1, [f01180_nielsen_sale_kg],",
                  "    5, [f01180_nielsen_sale_rub_vat],",
                  "    9, [sales_value_thousand_kg],",
                  "    10, [sales_value_thousand_rub],",
                  "    11, [f01180_nielsen_sale_rub_vat] / 1000000,",
                  "    12, [f01180_nielsen_sale_qty],",
                  "    13,[sales_value_thousand_qty],",
                  "    [f01180_nielsen_sale_rub_vat]",
                  "    )"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f01180_nielsen_sale_LY",
                "expression": [
                  " CALCULATE(",
                  "    [f01180_nielsen_sale], ",
                  "    DATEADD(",
                  "        DATESBETWEEN(",
                  "            'D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date], ",
                  "            MIN('D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date]), ",
                  "            MAX('D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date])",
                  "\t),",
                  "        -1,",
                  "        YEAR",
                  "    )",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f01180_nielsen_chain_sale",
                "expression": " CALCULATE([f01180_nielsen_sale], TREATAS({\"National Urban Hypermarkets\", \"National Urban Superettes\", \"National Urban Supermarkets\"}, D01551_nielsen_market[nielsen_market_name]))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f01180_nielsen_chain_sale_LY",
                "expression": " CALCULATE([f01180_nielsen_sale_LY], TREATAS({\"National Urban Hypermarkets\", \"National Urban Superettes\", \"National Urban Supermarkets\"}, D01551_nielsen_market[nielsen_market_name]))",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f01180_nielsen_price_kg_rub",
                "expression": "DIVIDE([f01180_nielsen_sale_rub_vat],[f01180_nielsen_sale_kg],BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "F01180_Value_Share_CM_vs_PM_%",
                "expression": [
                  " ",
                  "    DIVIDE(",
                  "        [share_value_prc] - CALCULATE([share_value_prc], dateadd(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date], -1, MONTH)),",
                  "        CALCULATE([share_value_prc], dateadd(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date], -1, MONTH))",
                  "    )"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F01180_Value_Share_CM_vs_PY_%",
                "expression": [
                  " ",
                  "    DIVIDE(",
                  "        [share_value_prc] - CALCULATE([share_value_prc], dateadd(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date], -1, YEAR)),",

                  "        69, FORMAT([F01180_price_kg_rub_CM_vs_PY_%], \"Percent\"),",
                  "        70, ROUND([F01180_price_kg_rub_CM_vs_PM], 2),",
                  "        71, ROUND([F01180_price_kg_rub_CM_vs_PY], 2)",
                  "    )"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F01180_Off_Take_per_SKU_kg_CM_vs_PM_%",
                "expression": [
                  " ",
                  "    DIVIDE(",
                  "        [off_take_sku_kg] - CALCULATE([off_take_sku_kg], dateadd(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date], -1, MONTH)),",
                  "        CALCULATE([off_take_sku_kg], dateadd(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date], -1, MONTH))",
                  "    )"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F01180_Off_Take_per_SKU_kg_CM_vs_PY_%",
                "expression": [
                  " ",
                  "    DIVIDE(",
                  "        [off_take_sku_kg] - CALCULATE([off_take_sku_kg], dateadd(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date], -1, YEAR)),",
                  "        CALCULATE([off_take_sku_kg], dateadd(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date], -1, YEAR))",
                  "    )"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F01180_Off_Take_per_SKU_kg_CM_vs_PM",
                "expression": [
                  " ",
                  "    [off_take_sku_kg] - CALCULATE([off_take_sku_kg], dateadd(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date], -1, MONTH))"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F01180_Off_Take_per_SKU_kg_CM_vs_PY",
                "expression": [
                  " ",
                  "    [off_take_sku_kg] - CALCULATE([off_take_sku_kg], dateadd(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date], -1, YEAR))"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F01180_Off_Take_per_SKU_kg_measures",
                "expression": [
                  " ",
                  "    SWITCH(",
                  "        SELECTEDVALUE('D01850_metrics'[metric_id]),",
                  "        68, FORMAT([F01180_Off_Take_per_SKU_kg_CM_vs_PM_%], \"Percent\"),",
                  "        69, FORMAT([F01180_Off_Take_per_SKU_kg_CM_vs_PY_%], \"Percent\"),",
                  "        70, ROUND([F01180_Off_Take_per_SKU_kg_CM_vs_PM], 2),",
                  "        71, ROUND([F01180_Off_Take_per_SKU_kg_CM_vs_PY], 2)",
                  "    )"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f01180_nielsen_price_unit_rub",
                "expression": "DIVIDE([f01180_nielsen_sale_rub_vat],[f01180_nielsen_sale_qty],BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "sales_value_thousand_rub_YTD",
                "expression": "TOTALYTD([sales_value_thousand_rub],D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "sales_value_thousand_kg_YTD",
                "expression": "TOTALYTD([sales_value_thousand_kg],D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "sales_value_thousand_qty_YTD",
                "expression": "TOTALYTD([sales_value_thousand_qty],D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "sales_value_thousand_rub_MAT",
                "expression": [
                  " CALCULATE([sales_value_thousand_rub],",
                  "    DATESINPERIOD(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date],   MAX(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date]), -12, MONTH )",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "sales_value_thousand_kg_MAT",
                "expression": [
                  " CALCULATE([sales_value_thousand_kg],",

                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00"

              {

                "expression": "TOTALYTD([sales_value_thousand_rub], DATEADD(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date], -1, YEAR))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {

            "measures": [
              {
                "name": "F01102_Connected_Distributors_Qty",
                "expression": " DISTINCTCOUNT('F01102_motiv_general_price'[client_guid])",
                "formatString": "#,0",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F01102_Members_Qty",
                "expression": " CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT('F01102_motiv_general_price'[staff_guid]), D01800_staff[staff_type] = \"Торговый представитель\")",
                "formatString": "#,0",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F01102_Members_Bonus_Qty",
                "expression": " CALCULATE([F01102_Members_Qty], 'F01102_motiv_general_price'[bonus] = 1)",
                "formatString": "#,0",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F01102_Sales_Volume_MPG_Mln_Rub",
                "expression": " SUM('F01102_motiv_general_price'[fact_sale_mop_rub]) / 1000000",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F01102_Investments_%",
                "expression": " DIVIDE(SUM(F01102_motiv_general_price[fact_budget_mop_rub]), SUM(F01102_motiv_general_price[fact_sale_mop_rub]), BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F01102_Members_Bonus_Qty_%",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([F01102_Members_Bonus_Qty], [F01102_Members_Qty], BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F01102_Sales_Volume_Completion_%",
                "expression": " DIVIDE(SUM('F01102_motiv_general_price'[fact_sale_mop_rub]), SUM(F01101_motiv_general_price_plan[plan_sale_mop_rub]), BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F01102_AKB_MPG_Completion_%",
                "expression": " DIVIDE(SUM('F01102_motiv_general_price'[fact_akb_mop]), SUM(F01101_motiv_general_price_plan[plan_akb_mop]), BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              }
            ],

            "measures": [
              {
                "name": "f01250_plan_budget",
                "expression": " SUM(F01250_promo_budget_prim_plan[plan_bugdet_novat_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F01250_Budget_Plan_Without_VAT_Units",
                "expression": [
                  " ",
                  "    SWITCH(",
                  "        SELECTEDVALUE('D01852_scales'[scale_name]),",
                  "        \"ед\", [f01250_plan_budget],",
                  "        \"тыс\", [f01250_plan_budget] / 1000,",
                  "        \"млн\", [f01250_plan_budget] / 1000000",
                  "    )"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F01250_Budget_Plan_Without_VAT_Units_LY",
                "expression": " CALCULATE([F01250_Budget_Plan_Without_VAT_Units], DATEADD(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date], -1, YEAR))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F01250_Budget_%",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([f01250_plan_budget], [f00100_fact_sale_rub_vat_client_price], BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F01250_Budget_LY_%",
                "expression": " CALCULATE([F01250_Budget_%], DATEADD(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date], -1, YEAR))",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F01250_Investments_%",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([f01250_plan_budget], [f00100_fact_sale_rub_vat_client_price], BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F01250_Investments_vs_LY_%",
                "expression": " [F01250_Investments_%] - CALCULATE([F01250_Investments_%], DATEADD(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date], -1, YEAR))",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F01250_Average_Discount_%",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([f01250_plan_budget], [f00103_fact_promo_rub_vat_client_price], BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F01250_Average_Discount_vs_LY_%",
                "expression": " [F01250_Average_Discount_%] - CALCULATE([F01250_Average_Discount_%], DATEADD(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date], -1, YEAR))",
                "formatString": "0.0%;-0.0%;0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "f00006_fact_promo_fact_competion",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([F00006_fact_promo_general_scale], [f00100_all_measures])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              }
            ],

            ],
            "measures": [
              {
                "name": "bonus_persent",
                "expression": "AVERAGE([bonus_persent_])/100",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%"
              },
              {
                "name": "bonus_with_blockfactor_persent",
                "expression": "AVERAGE([bonus_with_blockfactor_persent_])/100",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_bonus",
                "expression": "if(SUM([fact_bonus_])<>0,SUM([fact_bonus_]),BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_bonus_with_vat",
                "expression": "if(SUM([fact_bonus_with_vat_])<>0,SUM([fact_bonus_with_vat_]),BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "storno",
                "expression": "if(SUM([storno_])<>0,SUM([storno_]),BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "storno_with_vat",
                "expression": "if(SUM([storno_with_vat_])<>0,SUM([storno_with_vat_]),BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_bonus_with_storno",
                "expression": "[fact_bonus]+[storno]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_bonus_with_storno_with_vat",
                "expression": "[fact_bonus_with_vat]+[storno_with_vat]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "regl_bonus_novat",
                "expression": "if(SUM([regl_bonus_novat_])<>0,SUM([regl_bonus_novat_]),BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              }
            ],

            ],
            "measures": [
              {
                "name": "f00103_fact_promo_packs",
                "expression": "SUM([fact_promo_packs_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00103_fact_promo_rub_vat_client_price",
                "expression": "SUM([fact_promo_rub_vat_client_price_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00103_fact_promo_rub_vat_invoice_price",
                "expression": "SUM([fact_promo_rub_vat_invoice_price_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00103_fact_promo_TMA_SO_packs",
                "expression": " CALCULATE(SUM(F00103_discount_sec[fact_promo_packs_]),D00400_discount[disc_type]=\"ТМА\")",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00103_fact_promo_TMA_SO_rub_vat_client_price",
                "expression": " CALCULATE(SUM(F00103_discount_sec[fact_promo_rub_vat_client_price_]),D00400_discount[disc_type]=\"ТМА\")",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "f00103_fact_promo_TMA_SO_rub_vat_invoice_price",
                "expression": " CALCULATE(SUM(F00103_discount_sec[fact_promo_rub_vat_invoice_price_]),D00400_discount[disc_type]=\"ТМА\")",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "F00103_Fact_Promovolume_Rub_VAT_Client_Price_Units",
                "expression": [
                  " ",
                  "    SWITCH(",
                  "        SELECTEDVALUE('D01852_scales'[scale_name]),",
                  "        \"ед\", [f00103_fact_promo_rub_vat_client_price],",
                  "        \"тыс\", [f00103_fact_promo_rub_vat_client_price] / 1000,",
                  "        \"млн\", [f00103_fact_promo_rub_vat_client_price] / 1000000",
                  "    )"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F00103_Fact_Promovolume_Rub_VAT_Client_Price_Units_LY",
                "expression": [
                  " ",
                  "    CALCULATE([F00103_Fact_Promovolume_Rub_VAT_Client_Price_Units], DATEADD(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date], -1, YEAR))"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F00103_Promovolume_%",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([f00103_fact_promo_rub_vat_client_price], [f00100_fact_sale_rub_vat_client_price], BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F00103_Promovolume_LY_%",
                "expression": " CALCULATE([F00103_Promovolume_%], DATEADD(D00001_main_calendar[calendar_date], -1, YEAR))",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "F00103_promovolume_qty_%",
                "expression": [
                  " ",
                  "    DIVIDE(",
                  "        DISTINCTCOUNT(F00103_discount_sec[sku_guid]),",
                  "        DISTINCTCOUNT(F00100_sales_sec[sku_guid])",
                  "    )"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "isHidden": true
              }
            ],
            "annotations": [

            "measures": [
              {
                "name": "plan_work_days_qty",
                "expression": "SUM([plan_work_days_qty_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_work_hours_qty",
                "expression": "SUM([plan_work_hours_qty_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "absence_work_days_qty",
                "expression": "SUM([absence_work_days_qty_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "absence_work_hours_qty",
                "expression": "IF(SUM([absence_work_hours_qty_])<>0.00, SUM([absence_work_hours_qty_]), BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "vac_work_days_qty",
                "expression": "if(SUM([vac_work_days_qty_])<>0.00,SUM([vac_work_days_qty_]),BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "admin_leave_work_days_qty",
                "expression": "if(SUM([admin_leave_work_days_qty_]) <> 0.00, SUM([admin_leave_work_days_qty_]), BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "sick_work_days_qty",
                "expression": "IF(SUM([sick_work_days_qty_])<> 0.00,SUM([sick_work_days_qty_]),BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "epmloyee_count",
                "expression": "DISTINCTCOUNT([staff_guid])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "absence_%",
                "expression": " DIVIDE([absence_work_hours_qty],[plan_work_hours_qty])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00%;-#,0.00%;#,0.00%"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_work_days_without_vac",
                "expression": "[plan_work_days_qty]-[vac_work_days_qty]",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "sick_work_days_%",
                "expression": "divide([sick_work_days_qty],[plan_work_days_without_vac])",
                "formatString": "0.00%;-0.00%;0.00%"
              },
              {
                "name": "admin_leave_work_days_%",
                "expression": "divide([admin_leave_work_days_qty],[plan_work_days_without_vac])",
                "formatString": "0.00%;-0.00%;0.00%"
              },
              {
                "name": "absence_avg_%",
                "expression": " CALCULATE(DIVIDE([absence_work_hours_qty],[plan_work_hours_qty]),ALLSELECTED('D00001_main_calendar'))",
                "formatString": "#,0.00%;-#,0.00%;#,0.00%"
              }
            ],
            "annotations": [

            ],
            "measures": [
              {
                "name": "sales_qty_without_promo",
                "expression": "if(SUM([sales_qty_without_promo_])<>0, SUM([sales_qty_without_promo_]), BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "tma_sum_novat_invoice_price",
                "expression": "if(SUM([tma_sum_novat_invoice_price_])<>0,SUM([tma_sum_novat_invoice_price_]),BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "disc_in_invoice_rub",
                "expression": "if(SUM([disc_in_invoice_rub_])<>0,SUM([disc_in_invoice_rub_]),BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "disc_off_invoice_rub",
                "expression": "if(SUM([disc_off_invoice_rub_])<>0,SUM([disc_off_invoice_rub_]),BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_promo_sale_sum",
                "expression": "if(SUM([plan_promo_sale_sum_])<>0, SUM([plan_promo_sale_sum_]), BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_discount_sum_off_invoice",
                "expression": "if(SUM([fact_discount_sum_off_invoice_])<>0, SUM([fact_discount_sum_off_invoice_]),BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_discount_sum_on_invoice",
                "expression": "if(SUM([fact_discount_sum_on_invoice_])<>0, SUM([fact_discount_sum_on_invoice_]), BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_promo_sale_sum",
                "expression": "if(SUM([tma_camp_fact_promo_sum_])<>0,SUM([tma_camp_fact_promo_sum_]),BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_promo_budget",
                "expression": "if(SUM([fact_promo_budget_])<>0,SUM([fact_promo_budget_]),BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "tma_camp_fact_kg",
                "expression": "if(SUM([tma_camp_fact_kg_])<>0,SUM([tma_camp_fact_kg_]),BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_fixed_costs",
                "expression": "if(SUM([fact_fixed_costs_])<>0,SUM([fact_fixed_costs_]),BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "tma_camp_fact_qty",
                "expression": "if(SUM([tma_camp_fact_qty_])<>0,SUM([tma_camp_fact_qty_]),BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "disc_on_invoice_perc",
                "expression": " divide([fact_discount_sum_on_invoice], SUM([tma_camp_fact_promo_sum_]))",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%"
              },
              {
                "name": "disc_off_invoice_perc",
                "expression": " divide([fact_discount_sum_off_invoice], SUM([tma_camp_fact_promo_sum_]))",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_turnover_cost_perc",
                "expression": "SUM ( F01500_campaign_tma[plan_turnover_cost_perc_] )",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_turnover_cost_perc",
                "expression": "SUM ( F01500_campaign_tma[fact_turnover_cost_perc_] )",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_plan_promo_rub_perc",
                "expression": " DIVIDE(F01500_campaign_tma[fact_promo_sale_sum], F01500_campaign_tma[plan_promo_sale_sum])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_plan_promo_kg_perc",
                "expression": " DIVIDE(F01500_campaign_tma[tma_camp_fact_kg], F00007_plan_discount_prim[plan_promo_kg])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_plan_promo_packs_perc",
                "expression": " DIVIDE(F01500_campaign_tma[tma_camp_fact_qty], F00007_plan_discount_prim[plan_promo_packs])",
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%"
              },
              {
                "name": "discount_sum_rub",
                "expression": "if(SUM([discount_sum_rub_])<>0,SUM([discount_sum_rub_]),BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_promo_sale_packs",
                "expression": "if(SUM([plan_promo_sale_packs_])<>0, SUM([plan_promo_sale_packs_]), BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_promo_sale_kg",
                "expression": "if(SUM([plan_promo_sale_kg_])<>0, SUM([plan_promo_sale_kg_]), BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "plan_customer_disc_perc",
                "expression": [
                  "VAR v =",
                  "    SUM ( F01500_campaign_tma[plan_customer_disc_perc_] )",
                  "RETURN",
                  "    IF ( v = 0, BLANK(), v )"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "lineageTag": "57d1c800-f443-498e-a07a-908f3751b8f2"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_customer_disc_perc",
                "expression": [
                  "DIVIDE(",
                  "    [sum_sale_price], ",
                  "    SUM(F01500_campaign_tma[fact_promo_sale_sum_])",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.0%;-#,0.0%;#,0.0%",
                "lineageTag": "99bef7f8-2c21-46c2-98ec-d777ff1ae5d2"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_customer_disc_perc_1",
                "expression": [
                  "",
                  "DIVIDE(",
                  "    SUMX(",
                  "        F01500_campaign_tma,",
                  "        (F01500_campaign_tma[fact_customer_disc_perc_] / 100)",
                  "            * F01500_campaign_tma[fact_promo_sale_sum_]",
                  "    ),",
                  "    SUM(F01500_campaign_tma[fact_promo_sale_sum_]),",
                  "    0",
                  ")"
                ],
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "sum_sale_price",
                "expression": [
                  "",
                  "SUMX(",
                  "    F01500_campaign_tma,",
                  "    (F01500_campaign_tma[fact_customer_disc_perc_]) *",
                  "    F01500_campaign_tma[fact_promo_sale_sum_]",
                  ")"
                ],
                "isHidden": true
              }
            ],
            "annotations": [

            ],
            "measures": [
              {
                "name": "bonus_vat_cur",
                "expression": "if(ROUND([bonus_vat_current],2)<>0.0, [bonus_vat_current],BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "bonus_novat_cur",
                "expression": "if(ROUND([bonus_novat_current],2)<>0.0, [bonus_novat_current],BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_bonus_novat_cur",
                "expression": "IF([fact_bonus_novat_cur_]<> 0, [fact_bonus_novat_cur_], BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_bonus_vat_cur",
                "expression": "IF([fact_bonus_vat_cur_]<> 0, [fact_bonus_vat_cur_], BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "stock_vat_cur",
                "expression": "  IF(ROUND([stock_vat_cur_],2)<> 0.0, [stock_vat_cur_], BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "stock_novat_cur",
                "expression": " IF(round([stock_novat_cur_],2)<> 0.0, [stock_novat_cur_], BLANK())",
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              },
              {
                "name": "stock_vat_cur_",
                "expression": "   SUMX( VALUES(F01221_cda_client_act[accrual_retrobonus_guid]),  FIRSTNONBLANK(F01221_cda_client_act[stock_vat_current], 1) )",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "stock_novat_cur_",
                "expression": "    SUMX( VALUES(F01221_cda_client_act[accrual_retrobonus_guid]),  FIRSTNONBLANK(F01221_cda_client_act[stock_novat_current], 1) )",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_bonus_vat_cur_",
                "expression": "SUMX( VALUES(F01221_cda_client_act[accrual_retrobonus_guid]),  FIRSTNONBLANK(F01221_cda_client_act[fact_bonus_with_vat_], 1) )",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "fact_bonus_novat_cur_",
                "expression": " SUMX( VALUES(F01221_cda_client_act[accrual_retrobonus_guid]),  FIRSTNONBLANK(F01221_cda_client_act[fact_bonus_], 1) )",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "bonus_vat_current",
                "expression": " sum(F01221_cda_client_act[bonus_vat_cur_])\t",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              },
              {
                "name": "bonus_novat_current",
                "expression": " sum(F01221_cda_client_act[bonus_novat_cur_])",
                "formatString": "#,0.00",
                "isHidden": true
              }
            ],

              {
                "name": "f01181_sku_count_total",
                "expression": [
                  "SWITCH (",
                  "    TRUE(),",
                  "    ISINSCOPE ( 'D01550_nielsen_unit'[nielsen_name] ),",
                  "        AVERAGE ( 'F01181_nielsen_pp'[sku_sku_count_total_] ),",
                  "    ISINSCOPE ( 'D01550_nielsen_unit'[nielsen_brand_name] ),",
                  "        AVERAGE ( 'F01181_nielsen_pp'[brand_sku_count_total_] ),",
                  "    ISINSCOPE ( 'D01550_nielsen_unit'[nielsen_manufacturer] ),",
                  "        AVERAGE ( 'F01181_nielsen_pp'[manuf_sku_count_total_] ),",
                  "    SUM ( 'F01181_nielsen_pp'[sku_sku_count_total_] )",

                  "    ISINSCOPE ( 'D01550_nielsen_unit'[nielsen_manufacturer] ),",
                  "        AVERAGE ( 'F01181_nielsen_pp'[manuf_avg_value_per_seller_sp_] ),",
                  "    AVERAGE ( 'F01181_nielsen_pp'[sku_avg_value_per_seller_sp_] )",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,##0.00",
                "lineageTag": "8a599738-70df-4bb4-bb17-6db9387853b9"
              },
              {
                "name": "f01181_sp_value_share_sp",
                "expression": [
                  "SWITCH (",
                  "    TRUE(),",
                  "    ISINSCOPE ( 'D01550_nielsen_unit'[nielsen_name] ),",
                  "        AVERAGE ( 'F01181_nielsen_pp'[sku_sp_value_share_] ),",
                  "    ISINSCOPE ( 'D01550_nielsen_unit'[nielsen_brand_name] ),",
                  "        AVERAGE ( 'F01181_nielsen_pp'[brand_sp_value_share_] ),",
                  "    ISINSCOPE ( 'D01550_nielsen_unit'[nielsen_manufacturer] ),",
                  "        AVERAGE ( 'F01181_nielsen_pp'[manuf_sp_value_share_] ),",
                  "    AVERAGE ( 'F01181_nielsen_pp'[sku_sp_value_share_] )",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,##0.00",
                "lineageTag": "2117e698-bf44-4b84-96d8-c9892a9b40c6"
              },
              {
                "name": "f01181_avg_sku_per_seller_sp",
                "expression": [
                  "SWITCH (",
                  "    TRUE(),",
                  "    ISINSCOPE ( 'D01550_nielsen_unit'[nielsen_name] ),",
                  "        AVERAGE ( 'F01181_nielsen_pp'[sku_avg_sku_per_seller_sp_] ),",
                  "    ISINSCOPE ( 'D01550_nielsen_unit'[nielsen_brand_name] ),",
                  "        AVERAGE ( 'F01181_nielsen_pp'[brand_avg_sku_per_seller_sp_] ),",
                  "    ISINSCOPE ( 'D01550_nielsen_unit'[nielsen_manufacturer] ),",
                  "        AVERAGE ( 'F01181_nielsen_pp'[manuf_avg_sku_per_seller_sp_] ),",
                  "    AVERAGE ( 'F01181_nielsen_pp'[sku_avg_sku_per_seller_sp_] )",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,##0.00",
                "lineageTag": "4fe8480a-ffb7-4498-b5a8-dd6289dc5cea"
              }
            ],

              {

                "value": " \t\t\t\tSELECT [dbo].[F01181_nielsen_pp].*   FROM [dbo].[F01181_nielsen_pp] "

                "value": "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-16\"?><Gemini xmlns=\"QueryEditorSerialization\"><AnnotationContent><![CDATA[<RSQueryCommandText>SELECT [dbo].[F01181_nielsen_pp].*   FROM [dbo].[F01181_nielsen_pp] where dt >= '01.01.2025'</RSQueryCommandText><RSQueryCommandType>Text</RSQueryCommandType><RSQueryDesignState></RSQueryDesignState>]]></AnnotationContent></Gemini>"
              }

            ],
            "measures": [
              {
                "name": "managers_count",
                "expression": [
                  "",
                  "CALCULATE (",
                  "    COUNTROWS ( F01800_employee_position_monthly ),",
                  "    FILTER (",
                  "        D01803_position_category,",
                  "        D01803_position_category[position_category_name]",
                  "            IN {",
                  "                \"Исполнительное руководство\",",
                  "                \"Высшее руководство\",",
                  "                \"Среднее руководство\",",
                  "                \"Младшее руководство (1)\"",
                  "            }",
                  "    )",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0"
              },
              {
                "name": "employees_сount",
                "expression": [
                  "",
                  "COUNTROWS (F01800_employee_position_monthly)"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0"
              },
              {
                "name": "management_ratio",
                "expression": [
                  "",
                  "DIVIDE (",
                  "    [employees_сount],",
                  "    [managers_count]",
                  ")"
                ],
                "formatString": "#,0.00"
              }
            ],
